**Urgent from _CNN_ : Sherrod Brown's Democratic Senate seat in Ohio is one of the MOST LIKELY to flip red**
Friend, this is serious:
Democrats have a one-seat majority, meaning Senate control could all come down to our toss-up race in Ohio.

**That's why Washington Republicans are going ALL IN to defeat Sherrod – from mobilizing their shady mega-donors to launching misleading attack ads. Now,_CNN_ is calling Sherrod's seat one of the most likely to flip red!**
Sherrod Brown is a champion for working families – and we need his progressive voice in the Senate. **But we're falling 1,832 Blue Ohio Members short of what we need to fight back – and we're running out of time to close the gap. **

subject: may I quickly explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
Your support now is so important if we’re going to defeat Boebert in 2024. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60642214/397759546/-1392034954?refcode=X_032323_Frisch_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDI1NWIyMS1kOWM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zFgYjrwmzz_chEI_kJkLM_82AzmEtA0U2pCGben4hGY=) **** Hello, **[_In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign for Congress against Lauren Boebert._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60642215/397759547/-1392034954?refcode=X_032323_Frisch_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDI1NWIyMS1kOWM5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zFgYjrwmzz_chEI_kJkLM_82AzmEtA0U2pCGben4hGY=) But before I do, please let me explain why your support now is so important if we’re going to defeat Boebert in 2024.** Very few people believed we could win in 2022. All of the national pundits said it was a “Safe Republican” seat. So when the results started coming in on Election Night, the talking heads on cable news couldn’t believe their eyes. The race went to a recount, and ultimately, after all the ballots were counted, we came just 546 votes short of defeating Boebert. Ours was the closest race in the entire country. By driving 24,000 miles in my red pickup truck to every corner of the district, showing up, meeting people where they were, and listening to everyone. We put in the work, and people like you who volunteered, donated, made phone calls, etc... You made it all possible. This time, things are going to get even nastier. I’m sure of it. Boebert’s Super PACs will try to smear me on every TV across the district. **We can counter their lies and win, but I’m counting on your support now to do it. My team has set a goal of getting 50,000 Founding Donors to our campaign so we have the resources we need to start strong and defeat Boebert:** [**If you’re able to, can I count on you to make a donation to my campaign right now – no amount is too small – to help us hit our goal and finally kick Lauren Boebert out of Congress? clean_body: Your support now is so important if we’re going to defeat Boebert in 2024. | = ** Hello, = But before I do, please let me explain why your support now is so important if we’re going to defeat Boebert in 2024. Very few people believed we could win in 2022. All of the national pundits said it was a “Safe Republican” seat. So when the results started coming in on Election Night, the talking heads on cable news couldn’t believe their eyes. The race went to a recount, and ultimately, after all the ballots were counted, we came just 546 votes short of defeating Boebert. Ours was the closest race in the entire country. By driving 24,000 miles in my red pickup truck to every corner of the district, showing up, meeting people where they were, and listening to everyone. We put in the work, and people like you who volunteered, donated, made phone calls, etc... You made it all possible. This time, things are going to get even nastier. I’m sure of it. Boebert’s Super PACs will try to smear me on every TV across the district. We can counter their lies and win, but I’m counting on your support now to do it. My team has set a goal of getting 50,000 Founding Donors to our campaign so we have the resources we need to start strong and defeat Boebert: = Early resources are critical to building and sustaining a campaign that can meet every voter and win. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Adam Frisch & Michael Bennet will go through immediately: | | | **=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** With gratitude - Adam Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

Hi team, We’re just about one week away from the end of the first quarter of 2023, and just over a week after that we’ll be closing out the Maryland legislative session. Wes and Aruna got to work on Day 1 in office to start delivering on the promises they made to move Maryland forward. Soon, Wes will be signing a slew of bills to protect reproductive rights, raise the state minimum wage to $15 this October, lower taxes for veterans, make the earned income tax credit permanent for 400,000 Marylanders, and so much more. **As we look ahead to the next quarter of 2023, Wes and Aruna want to hear from you. body:
We’re terrified
| **_BREAKING:_** **Jon Tester is the lone Democrat standing between Republicans and their desired Senate Majority** This is DIRE! Republicans’ path to the Senate Majority runs straight through Montana... and they’re _foaming at the mouth_ to defeat Sen. Tester.

**IF** we sit back right now and wait until it’s closer to Election Day to start our fight, we’ll lose the Senate to MAGA Republican rule.

_**BUT IF**_ we all start early, we’ll match Republican fundraising and keep Democrats like Jon Tester – and our Senate Majority – safe and sound!

subject: Reminder: This Saturday - Coffee with Canepa
body:
| | | |
---
| | | **Join Us this Saturday!**
---
| [ ](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=3d6f03dad6&e=c0babbc643)
---
|
---
| Dear friends, Please join me and some special guest speakers for our monthly Caffeinate and Conversate with Canepa series 10 a.m., Saturday, March 25, Drip & Melt Café-Deli, 301 87th St., Broadmoor. We will hear about the resources the county provides related to health equity in partnership with the San Mateo County Office of Diversity and Equity’s Latino Collaborative, which strives to eliminate stigma, oppression, racism and poverty.
---
The Latino Collaborative promotes holistic practices designed to build safe, strong, resilient families in San Mateo County. We work to increase access to stigma-free services and treatment involving mind, spirit and body to all San Mateo County residents, regardless of insurance eligibility. We believe that services that integrate Latino heritage, culture, spirituality and family values will nurture and strengthen the health of Latino individuals and families.

[RSVP HERE!](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=e40848b8b6&e=c0babbc643)

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Announcing... UNLEASHED with Heidi Ganahl!
body:
A new weekly podcast show that will EXPOSE Colorado politics...
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkdjtuy-ttjjilthht-r/) Hi friends! I'm excited to reconnect. First of all, thank you from the bottom of my heart for your support. We've created a movement a million strong that has become the voice of reason and optimism for a brighter Colorado future. Since the election, I've been researching ways to keep our movement strong and impactful, and visiting folks around the country that have done the same. Here's an update.Coloradans have told me they don't trust the media, the politicians, or the power players to tell the truth (on both sides).I heard that you've lost hope in our political system, in our government, in our leadership. And honestly, after what I learned in the trenches, I'm with you. But you also know me well enough to know I don't back down from adversity. **So, here 's what I'm proposing we do about it.**Even though our movement had GRIT, a message that resonated, and amazing people involved, we didn't have the money, the infrastructure, or enough media that allowed us to get through to voters.We learned some tough lessons running a statewide campaign in Colorado, and we discovered what's missing. We worked the entire campaign trying to create stuff that should have already existed, but it didn't.

And that can never happen again.We'll fill in those gaps. That's what we're building. We shouldn't rely on a party, consultants, or political organizations to change things for us. Instead, we need to rely on each other. Those of us that were in the trenches, not pontificating from the sidelines.So if you'll join me - we'll continue to do that work - together.The mission is to keep the momentum in our movement, to keep people excited and engaged, to create new methods to get our message out, and to raise the money we need to build and sustain it.
### **We 're starting with _Unleashed with Heidi Ganahl_ , a weekly show that will expose the truth - and lies - about how Colorado politics works. How the power players, the consultant class, and the so-called "experts" work... or rather don't. You need to know what we learned so we can fix it.**
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkdjtuy-ttjjilthht-y/)
### **EPISODE ONE IS LIVE WITH SPECIAL GUESTS DANNY MOORE, ERIN LEE, GREGORY CARLSON, AND JIMMY SENGENBERGER.**
[LISTEN HERE](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkdjtuy-ttjjilthht-j/) We've stuck together through this whole journey. I'm so grateful. But we're not done, we're just beginning. Let's start by exposing what is REALLY going on behind the curtain in Colorado, who is helping, and who is getting in our way. I want you to feel empowered and informed because that's the only way we're going to change the direction of our state. We are suffering from misinformation, led by bad actors - on both sides politically.
### **Unleashed is just the first step, with some big things to follow soon ...we can turn things around, together!**
Make sure you're following me **@heidiganahl** on social media for all the updates and subscribe to my [YouTube](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkdjtuy-ttjjilthht-t/) and [Rumble](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkdjtuy-ttjjilthht-i/) channels for video versions of the podcast. See you soon!Heidi [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkdjtuy-ttjjilthht-d/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkdjtuy-ttjjilthht-h/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkdjtuy-ttjjilthht-k/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkdjtuy-ttjjilthht-b/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkdjtuy-ttjjilthht-n/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkdjtuy-ttjjilthht-p/) | Heidi GanahlLone Tree, CO [Preferences](https://heidi4gov.updatemyprofile.com/i-qkdjtuy-E8C3E4FD-ttjjilthht-x) | [Unsubscribe](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-u-qkdjtuy-ttjjilthht-m/)
---

name: Al Canata
subject: Biden = Reckless Teenager with a Credit Card
body:
Spending is out of hand at all levels of government.

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhounsmdqhd5vq1p9193qk6mjebkfbehr97u5qg0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdim4o32cth2bs)

Friend,

President Biden's budget binge reminds me of all those stories about the reckless teenager left alone for a weekend with his parent's credit card.

Spending is out of hand at all levels of government. And Congress keeps raising the debt ceiling and helping him spend more.

**It 's clear that Congress does not have your interest in mind, friend. They only care about themselves. **

But luckily for you, you have a voice to fight back.

My name is Al Canata, the Vice President of Strategic Partnerships at the National Taxpayers Union (NTU). NTU is the voice for taxpayers in D.C. We advocate for policy changes that will benefit you, the taxpayer.

[_**Will you help our team work with -- **__**and pressure, if needed**_ _** -- Congress to cut the proverbial credit card? Click here to rush your support with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0a0vkad7f6idjihh4j5dndk3d3krj1d483u4g78_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdim4o32cth2bs)

_Congress could be responsible and cut spending ... _

Instead, Congress likes to blame their fiscal crisis on tax cut programs like NTU's Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, their favorite deficit scapegoat, and empower the IRS to reach deeper into the pockets of taxpayers.

Congress recently gave the IRS $80 BILLION to pursue an aggressive strategy centered on heavier-handed enforcement to shake taxpayers down for every penny.

They will do anything besides cutting spending and sticking to a budget.

But don't worry, friend, NTU is looking out for you.

[_**Your donation will help us keep the government 's hand from reaching even further into the taxpayers' pockets and work towards making America more economically free. Will you rush your urgent support today? Click here to send your gift >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgon9b68o9ri5rbeqe37fsif10epsa1c528h3u0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdim4o32cth2bs)

In addition to the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, NTU has been part of every significant taxpayer victory of the last five decades.

We were there when the federal tax code was overhauled under President Reagan in 1986. We championed the cause for a **" Taxpayer Bill of Rights"** in the late 80s and 90s, with follow-on legislation, the **2019 Taxpayer First Act**. And in 2020, our public education arm launched the **Taxpayer Defense Center** to fight for taxpayers in court. TDC has already helped to hand the IRS major defeats in the Supreme Court and at the state level.

It's no wonder Congress likes to blame NTU for their problems -- NTU's victories benefit the taxpayer, not politicians or special interests.

Will you help us win another taxpayer victory by sending in your support now before another "silly season" with the budget gets even sillier? **Click any link below. **

[_**Donate $10 >>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9n6860fodcsq2eb6d25qrd9h2lgsn7p7btefcao_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdim4o32cth2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpuc95o7n5os9oeskvircf5i4365c1fede06anvo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdim4o32cth2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpp7u7j6dov5be9578df9e5o19r9b46k4nbbvr08_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdim4o32cth2bs)

clean_body: Spending is out of hand at all levels of government. Friend, President Biden's budget binge reminds me of all those stories about the reckless teenager left alone for a weekend with his parent's credit card. Spending is out of hand at all levels of government. And Congress keeps raising the debt ceiling and helping him spend more. It 's clear that Congress does not have your interest in mind, friend. They only care about themselves. But luckily for you, you have a voice to fight back. My name is Al Canata, the Vice President of Strategic Partnerships at the National Taxpayers Union (NTU). NTU is the voice for taxpayers in D.C. We advocate for policy changes that will benefit you, the taxpayer. Congress could be responsible and cut spending ... Instead, Congress likes to blame their fiscal crisis on tax cut programs like NTU's Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, their favorite deficit scapegoat, and empower the IRS to reach deeper into the pockets of taxpayers. Congress recently gave the IRS $80 BILLION to pursue an aggressive strategy centered on heavier-handed enforcement to shake taxpayers down for every penny. They will do anything besides cutting spending and sticking to a budget. But don't worry, friend, NTU is looking out for you. In addition to the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, NTU has been part of every significant taxpayer victory of the last five decades. We were there when the federal tax code was overhauled under President Reagan in 1986. We championed the cause for a " Taxpayer Bill of Rights" in the late 80s and 90s, with follow-on legislation, the 2019 Taxpayer First Act. And in 2020, our public education arm launched the Taxpayer Defense Center to fight for taxpayers in court. TDC has already helped to hand the IRS major defeats in the Supreme Court and at the state level. It's no wonder Congress likes to blame NTU for their problems -- NTU's victories benefit the taxpayer, not politicians or special interests. Will you help us win another taxpayer victory by sending in your support now before another "silly season" with the budget gets even sillier? Click any link below. Thank you, Al Canata Vice President of Strategic Partnerships National Taxpayers Union NTU is a 501(c)(4) nonprofit, nonpartisan citizen group whose members work every day for lower taxes and smaller government at all levels. American Defense News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Candace Owens, Chair of BLEXIT at TPUSA
subject: Why BLEXIT is joining Turning Point USA
body:
Candace Owens here – and I’ve got exciting news.

| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zd4bde83m3de1i5s6lfsjiav92lt5hhg2k9frrn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdim4o30c5h2bs)
---
Fellow American, Candace Owens here – and I’ve got exciting news. **BLEXIT -- the nonprofit I founded to free minorities from the Left’s victimhood mentality, or “plantation of the mind” -- is joining Turning Point USA!** Alongside my friend Charlie Kirk, the Turning Point USA team, and grassroots patriots like you, I am ready to: _Defeat_ toxic and racist Leftist ideologies like Critical Race Theory – getting them out of our kids’ classrooms forever, _Free_ black Americans and all minorities from the tyranny of the Left's victimhood mentality and inspire them to pursue their American Dreams, and _Win_ against the radical Left as Turning Point USA goes toe-to-toe with fake news media, toxic pop culture, biased “educators,” Big Tech, and more! [**To accomplish these massive – and important goals – I must raise $100,000 as soon as possible. Can I count on your support of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zj0dnfqvcbjrshbnsq2npfk2ut5phlj5khaaiptg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdim4o30c5h2bs)
---
[**Stand with Candace and Turning Point USA**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zl21feufk6iiskr1ompc4fnbqop1hgb6vse38hc0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdim4o30c5h2bs)
---
When the BLEXIT team and I decided that it was time for us to offer _even more_ life-changing programs ... expose _even more_ of the Left’s toxic and racist lies ... and reach _even more_ minorities with our inspiring message about the American Dream, I thought of my friend Charlie Kirk and Turning Point USA right away. That’s because, in the fight to save America from the Left, Turning Point USA is the real deal – organizing 600,000+ student activists to FIGHT and WIN today’s Culture War. **But to hit the ground running in this exciting new partnership, I must raise $100,000 as soon as possible.** [**Will you stand alongside me, my friend Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA, and TPUSA's BLEXIT programs by making your gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zabe8fqhjtq92fgikj5l4e5hcf49je89c1bb2vuo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdim4o30c5h2bs)
---
[**Stand with Candace and Turning Point USA**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmajhpj7ok5dnea4omhe36p5dosrajdah0qkrme8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdim4o30c5h2bs)
---
In 2018, I founded BLEXIT to inspire Black Americans to turn away from the victimhood mentality and to reject the Left’s new “plantation” of the mind. Now, in 2023, I’m proud to have BLEXIT work alongside Turning Point USA to expose _even more_ of the Left’s toxic and racist lies and reach _even more_ Americans with TPUSA’s inspiring, pro-America message – that teaches every American to love our country again, work hard, and pursue their American Dream! [**Today I’m counting on your help to hit the ground running. Will you please make your most generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more today to help me reach our critical $100,000 goal?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2jbihta3v8b79gru2p5jsp7ljgn9fu0ee5pb8c0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdim4o30c5h2bs)
---
[**Stand with Candace and Turning Point USA**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgq6dhksj725dn42hpb1bmdmdqbimbsagcpa78u8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdim4o30c5h2bs)
---
Working together with Turning Point USA, BLEXIT will inspire MILLIONS more young people from all backgrounds to escape the Left’s “Woke” dystopia and to love America once more. [**If you're with me, please make your gift right now.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsivgd6ro1q8lkohj9vd8na2239dk4qmsg9t2k4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdim4o30c5h2bs) Time is running out -- I hope to hear from you today!
---
| | Candace Owens Chair of BLEXIT Turning Point USA
---
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbbj07khl5nrliggbrk9h2cd2ldso2bei6r3e7f8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdim4o30c5h2bs)
---
[Support Turning Point USA](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zg0a7in492k0qipgj8rvd88e0bjucaa4r8e76u6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdim4o30c5h2bs)

name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: My hero son is facing life in prison
body:
Will you help my son?

I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02059%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=M7WHK7OZ%2bxfXtvBiye6oPg&sysid=1)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02050%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VdyH26%2foHBfJMcyeTB54Ew&sysid=1) [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02050%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VdyH26%2foHBfJMcyeTB54Ew&sysid=1)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It’s been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn’t expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it’s all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor’s office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael’s back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael’s_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02051%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5%2fUIv%2fBxQiAhpKgPTRcAUw&sysid=1)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02052%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=C7fs%2fgYqM4Hrcc%2bLh8uW5A&sysid=1)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" - and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02053%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sCfAKChinaDj%2bGIQA7Ob1A&sysid=1)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02054%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pNWlpXtxwar6fWGyenpaKg&sysid=1)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02065%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sPkbcHEKNMMy5iiCu4q8fw&sysid=1)
_That's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02066%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uJnn9emQUPUYFFBbhLPdrQ&sysid=1)
_That's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02067%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ocUfLAknqRsYxlePbBNT4w&sysid=1)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we’re defending, please visit**www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Your America News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

_[**unsubscribe**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02068%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4PVjWO0B58fR8Mx2Z9dwQg&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02069%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=q0rNkB9S0B%2bqlJSd3MpSRw&sysid=1)_
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7242%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=MYDV1sByRBI62XZOSXtsFg&sysid=1)

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo04gvtbg0s15sf3273s3sa1000qb4i1e35204g0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdim4o31chh2bs)
---
Friend,
I believe things happen for a reason.

While I was extremely disappointed about the outcome of the 2022 Senate race, and what that means for Alaska and our great nation, it opened my eyes to an emerging threat facing our democracy.

When Alaska first used RCV in 2022 (including my U.S. Senate race), it had the lowest voter turnout since it first became a state, 63 years ago. In contrast, the rest of the U.S. had one of the highest voter turnout rates. If Alaska had seen normal voter turnout, we likely would have had different election results.

RCV [confused voters](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z46grde3s62al1tovjvfm32567mfvmjfpsuerifo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdim4o31chh2bs "span style=font-size:11pt;font-family:Merriweather,serif;color:#000000;background-color:#fdfdfd;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:underline;-webkit-text-decoration-skip:none;text-decoration-skip-ink:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;confuses voters/span"),[ escalated negativity](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf2pk3qr5ic9jedomkn2i9u0hr1kqf8ikkiqh8p8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdim4o31chh2bs "span style=font-size:11pt;font-family:Merriweather,serif;color:#000000;background-color:#fdfdfd;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap; /spanspan style=font-size:11pt;font-family:Merriweather,serif;color:#000000;background-color:#fdfdfd;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:underline;-webkit-text-decoration-skip:none;text-decoration-skip-ink:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;escalates negativity/span"),[ increased costs](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl9gorch94geuiqnc21v3janiidqufahks6cfdbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdim4o31chh2bs "span style=font-size:11pt;font-family:Merriweather,serif;color:#000000;background-color:#fdfdfd;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap; /spanspan style=font-size:11pt;font-family:Merriweather,serif;color:#000000;background-color:#fdfdfd;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:underline;-webkit-text-decoration-skip:none;text-decoration-skip-ink:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;increases costs/span"), and resulted in[ voter suppression](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9buph65l4dmhek093sifpgo1dmgb760b5mlslf0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdim4o31chh2bs "span style=font-size:11pt;font-family:Merriweather,serif;color:#000000;background-color:#fdfdfd;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap; /spanspan style=font-size:11pt;font-family:Merriweather,serif;color:#000000;background-color:#fdfdfd;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:underline;-webkit-text-decoration-skip:none;text-decoration-skip-ink:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;voter suppression/span").

To address this threat, I want my supporters to be the first to know that we've started Preserve Democracy, a non-partisan group dedicated to increasing voter turnout and fighting the spread of RCV.

HELP US LAUNCH PRESERVE DEMOCRACY AND BE PART OF OUR FOUNDERS’ CIRCLE!

[_**Make a contribution in the NEXT 23 HOURS and have your name added to the**_ _**FOUNDERS’ CIRCLE**_ _**list of Preserve Democracy Donors.**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu64su4m247o5q47v2mittun410j54rfjfnfa3ig_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdim4o31chh2bs)

---

---

---

---
| [CONTRIBUTE $223](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0viuqbh49feftuna17qg5jb963s00uh66u1pd6g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdim4o31chh2bs)

We have a short window in time to mobilize voter turnout. The 2024 elections are right around the corner!

I’m still fighting for those who feel they have no voice, and I know I CAN COUNT ON THE DONORS IN OUR FOUNDERS’ CIRCLE to fight alongside me.

Thank you,

name: Candace Owens, Chair of BLEXIT at TPUSA
subject: Why BLEXIT is joining Turning Point USA
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWh_01HDNr

BLEXIT -- the nonprofit I founded to free minorities from the
Left's victimhood mentality, or "plantation of the mind" -- is
joining Turning Point USA

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWh_01HDNr

Fellow
American,

Candace
Owens here - and I've got exciting news.

BLEXIT --
the nonprofit I founded to free minorities from the Left's
victimhood mentality, or "plantation of the mind" -- is joining
Turning Point USA!

Alongside
my friend Charlie Kirk, the Turning Point USA team, and
grassroots patriots like you, I am ready to:

Defeat
toxic and racist Leftist ideologies like Critical Race Theory -
getting them out of our kids' classrooms forever,

Free
black Americans and all minorities from the tyranny of the Left's
victimhood mentality and inspire them to pursue their American
Dreams, and

Win
against the radical Left as Turning Point USA goes toe-to-toe
with fake news media, toxic pop culture, biased "educators," Big
Tech, and more!

To
accomplish these massive - and important goals - I must raise
$100,000 as soon as possible. Can I count on your support of $25,
$50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now?

Stand
with Candace and Turning Point USA

When the
BLEXIT team and I decided that it was time for us to offer even
more life-changing programs … expose even more of the
Left's toxic and racist lies … and reach even more
minorities with our inspiring message about the American Dream, I
thought of my friend Charlie Kirk and Turning Point USA right
away.

That's
because, in the fight to save America from the Left, Turning
Point USA is the real deal - organizing 600,000+ student
activists to FIGHT and WIN today's Culture War.

But to
hit the ground running in this exciting new partnership, I must
raise $100,000 as soon as possible.

Will you
stand alongside me, my friend Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA,
and TPUSA's BLEXIT programs by making your gift of $25, $50, $75,
$100, $250, $500, or more right now?

Stand
with Candace and Turning Point USA

In 2018,
I founded BLEXIT to inspire Black Americans to turn away from the
victimhood mentality and to reject the Left's new "plantation" of
the mind.

Now, in
2023, I'm proud to have BLEXIT work alongside Turning Point USA
to expose even more of the Left's toxic and racist lies and reach
even more Americans with TPUSA's inspiring, pro-America message -
that teaches every American to love our country again, work hard,
and pursue their American Dream!

Today I'm
counting on your help to hit the ground running. Will you please
make your most generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500,
or more today to help me reach our critical $100,000 goal?

Stand
with Candace and Turning Point USA

Working
together with Turning Point USA, BLEXIT will inspire MILLIONS
more young people from all backgrounds to escape the Left's
"Woke" dystopia and to love America once more.

If you're
with me, please make your gift right now.

Time is
running out -- I hope to hear from you today!

Candace
Owens
Chair of
BLEXIT
Turning
Point USA

Support
Turning Point USA

4940 East
Beverly Road
Phoenix,
Arizona 85044

body:

| |

| | | ** TRUMP ARREST UPDATE **
STOP AND READ THIS:

President Donald J. Trump is expecting his imminent arrest. We now know this entire investigation is about one thing and one thing only:

**It’s an attempt to intimidate Conservatives who stand up to the Radical Left. They want to SCARE you into silence.**

Don’t let them silence you! If Conservatives don’t speak out now, they’ll keep coming for us.

speak up and condemn this unprecedented investigation. ")**_

_Not tomorrow ... not later today... RIGHT HERE AND RIGHT NOW! _

body:

| |

This is NOT a threat to be taken lightly. DC is a FAR LEFT stronghold. Should it become a state, it would PERMANENTLY give Democrats two more far left Senators that they could use to transform America BEYOND RECOGNITION.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Asleep at the wheel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
EVERY GOP Candidate Should Make These EASY Commitments. Do you agree?

| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z78o6t0fde5m7rf6gv36tfdb1ottue4k524v9hbo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdimaor2c1h2bs)
Fellow American -

I'm running on a vision to answer the question of what it means to be an American in the year 2023. Merit. Truth. Free speech. Accountability. I believe deep in my bones these ideals still exist.

I am running for President to **revive** the conservative ideals that put this country into motion 250 years ago, and to create an alternative to the failed, woke leftist policies - not just complain about them.

How do we get this done? _**I challenge every GOP candidate to join me in some easy commitments:**_
1. End affirmative action
2. Abandon the climate cult
3. Total decoupling from China
4. 8-year limits for all federal bureaucrats
5. Say NO to central bank digital currencies
6. Release the "state action" files

Fellow American, Republicans can't be asleep at the wheel any longer, I need you on my team. **[Chip in $1 or more if you agree that our next president should commit to these 6 things!](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhk51f9cim1rq62h7ekbjh8mblgp50hgbb6sgll0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdimaor2c1h2bs)**

Let's stop just complaining about the Left and DO something about it.

Stand with me today,

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z72n1es9vsk6mal1up7qqvs7kttvhrd9h3da19t8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdimaor2c1h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** WATCH NOW -> **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zt3hfbi8qgtj4rg2k1hlmh1r90hejlahlaofpks8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdimaor2c1h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zacavuial159cotdagacd9trm1uuvis8hato58q0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdimaor2c1h2bs)

---

| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1fbo5384p2r229pvsrk41otikgph0r658qn52to_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdimaor2c1h2bs)| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3shg4jrbmqg8hokrsq9scvjsv0agatg0s47onog_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdimaor2c1h2bs)| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7peu5pm72a8i4g4fvdb4u0ai1i7dfcr9b9rc8po_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdimaor2c1h2bs)
---|---|---

name: Dudley Brown
subject: Biden demands gun registration
body:
I have urgent news.

---
| | | | | | |
---
|

Dear Fellow Patriot,

I have urgent news.

_President Biden is using executive action to do what he has failed to do for decades ... Force Universal Gun Registration on Americans_.

We don't have a lot of time to act.

**[So before you read on, would you please make a generous donation to help the National Association for Gun Rights fight back against Biden's gun grab](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc5bburk5i5a352q12s391tnolvdg2fvhj8rn5vo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdimaor2chh2bs)?**

Here's the scoop, Fellow Patriot.

Biden is using last year's gun control package as grounds to demand Universal Gun Registration for every gun sale in America.

That's right, President Biden is exploiting the great Republican surrender of 2022 to force a ban on all private firearms sales and register every gun with the NICS database.

It's H.R. 8 and Toomey-Manchin, all wrapped up in one executive order.

And Biden is doing it without any act of Congress.

Of course, this new policy would only affect law-abiding gun owners, but that bit of logic has never stopped the gun grabbers before.

Fellow Patriot, you can rest assured that NAGR will not stand for this assault on YOUR Second Amendment rights.

We have defeated Biden's gun control agenda before, and we will do it again.

_In 2013, when the Obama-Biden administration tried to force Universal Gun Registration through Congress, NAGR was there to rally the pro-gun grassroots in opposition_.

Which is precisely why Biden is resorting to executive action this time around.

He thinks he can sidestep the pro-gun grassroots if he bypasses Congress all together.

Well, Fellow Patriot, Biden is terribly mistaken.

The gloves are off.

But it is only through the generous support of everyday gun owners that we are able to mobilize against the gun grabbers.

**[So please consider making your most generous donation to the National Association for Gun Rights today](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zou6i7h9libp8im2k3asmip4atcb1o7urvo62rkg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdimaor2chh2bs)**.

Let me be clear, Fellow Patriot, any politician who sits idly by while the President tries to rip up our Constitution needs to be held accountable.

That's why it's vital pro-gun supporters like you send the politicians that message.

When we flood the D.C. swamp with hundreds of thousands of petitions, phone calls, and emails from angry voters, the political class will have no choice but to hear our voice.

Of course, taking on the President of the United States isn't cheap.

And while NAGR is prepared to dip into our emergency war chest, we are still going to need a massive influx of funds to make sure no stone goes unturned against Biden's executive orders.

**[So, Fellow Patriot, please consider rushing us your most generous contribution today](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7udupldebltcs4bvevjf80tpm1lkafi948cn2t0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdimaor2chh2bs)**.

Whether it's a contribution of **[$150, $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6rnd13utd0m3age7h3gs75gerec0fn5cmdbi688_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdimaor2chh2bs)** , or **[$75](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zft6ecbl4js5uns2flveap1nndbgbuevo4o4uuc0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdimaor2chh2bs)** , you can rest assured that your donation will be used to combat the assault on the Constitution.

Even chipping in **[$15](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj2rjqe1f8b2r6676uqud037mp6ornhosii535b8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdimaor2chh2bs)** or **[$30](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zghq5c97p68mr445ji7d24va0rtp6dddjqkegn00_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdimaor2chh2bs)** will help us prepare for what Biden is throwing at us.

Thanks in advance for your support, and I'll keep you updated as things progress.

**For Freedom,

Dudley Brown
President
National Association for Gun Rights**

P.S. Joe Biden is attempting to force his gun control agenda on law-abiding Americans using executive action.

Biden is using provisions from within last year's Republican-blessed gun control package as justification to force Universal Gun Registration on law-abiding gun owners.

Your National Association for Gun Rights is already launching our counterattack.

But we need you in the fight, Fellow Patriot.

**[So please make your most generous donation of $150, $100, or $75 to help us prepare for incoming political fight](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z24r20lg93bthnc70a68f4jbfl1pmhq7bd73vr20_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdimaor2chh2bs)**.

---

---

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8dib74938ls20jpin0035rfelv5flvhd5mes41o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdimaor2chh2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi8bi2c6d2e9snqq4l39apgoldeotfgdrk1vqp4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdimaor2chh2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqp85ji2082qnmhvim0855146heedg1p4qq2ge5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdimaor2chh2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr6gkh4s44v66f9vnmpvomvo0i0cl2k085kpjbto_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdimaor2chh2bs) _The National Association for Gun Rights, Inc. is a non-profit tax exempt advocacy organization under Section 501(c)4 of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to NAGR are not tax-deductible for IRS purposes. The National Association for Gun Rights ' mailing address is P.O. Box 1776, Loveland, Colorado 80539. They can be contacted toll-free at 1-877-405-4570. Its web address is [www.NationalGunRights.org](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7kjqp0lger8k6n89hv68061jc6m24udftug8lb0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdimaor2chh2bs)_ Not produced or emailed at taxpayer expense.

name: Dudley Brown
subject: Biden demands gun registration
body:
I have urgent news.

---
| | | | | | |
---
|

Dear Fellow Patriot,

I have urgent news.

_President Biden is using executive action to do what he has failed to do for decades ... Force Universal Gun Registration on Americans_.

We don't have a lot of time to act.

**[So before you read on, would you please make a generous donation to help the National Association for Gun Rights fight back against Biden's gun grab](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zorrfd19a9gq5ldmhovsnva7ets3tv2dbfcgfdk0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdimaor4cph2bs)?**

Here's the scoop, Fellow Patriot.

Biden is using last year's gun control package as grounds to demand Universal Gun Registration for every gun sale in America.

That's right, President Biden is exploiting the great Republican surrender of 2022 to force a ban on all private firearms sales and register every gun with the NICS database.

It's H.R. 8 and Toomey-Manchin, all wrapped up in one executive order.

And Biden is doing it without any act of Congress.

Of course, this new policy would only affect law-abiding gun owners, but that bit of logic has never stopped the gun grabbers before.

Fellow Patriot, you can rest assured that NAGR will not stand for this assault on YOUR Second Amendment rights.

We have defeated Biden's gun control agenda before, and we will do it again.

_In 2013, when the Obama-Biden administration tried to force Universal Gun Registration through Congress, NAGR was there to rally the pro-gun grassroots in opposition_.

Which is precisely why Biden is resorting to executive action this time around.

He thinks he can sidestep the pro-gun grassroots if he bypasses Congress all together.

Well, Fellow Patriot, Biden is terribly mistaken.

The gloves are off.

But it is only through the generous support of everyday gun owners that we are able to mobilize against the gun grabbers.

**[So please consider making your most generous donation to the National Association for Gun Rights today](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za38l5sqims4ovpgvj5gngjrmjrralqtba7oni7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdimaor4cph2bs)**.

Let me be clear, Fellow Patriot, any politician who sits idly by while the President tries to rip up our Constitution needs to be held accountable.

That's why it's vital pro-gun supporters like you send the politicians that message.

When we flood the D.C. swamp with hundreds of thousands of petitions, phone calls, and emails from angry voters, the political class will have no choice but to hear our voice.

Of course, taking on the President of the United States isn't cheap.

And while NAGR is prepared to dip into our emergency war chest, we are still going to need a massive influx of funds to make sure no stone goes unturned against Biden's executive orders.

**[So, Fellow Patriot, please consider rushing us your most generous contribution today](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znllldgr1mp3ff68ed4a84voqu4jmnubcdjmanh0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdimaor4cph2bs)**.

Whether it's a contribution of **[$150, $100](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjekr99207mdba03rg7b73sn9kuq0rab3jkmqd6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdimaor4cph2bs)** , or **[$75](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zihnfj7un1sclbj2bu6vaio07oufn7o0n4uctiuo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdimaor4cph2bs)** , you can rest assured that your donation will be used to combat the assault on the Constitution.

Even chipping in **[$15](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztruknja072kq2fdj8eh0cql9drp2pduihdh3sio_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdimaor4cph2bs)** or **[$30](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvkfa065dju8bkdn9f0apefuo4ch2rkgq2pc8da8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdimaor4cph2bs)** will help us prepare for what Biden is throwing at us.

Thanks in advance for your support, and I'll keep you updated as things progress.

**For Freedom,

Dudley Brown
President
National Association for Gun Rights**

P.S. Joe Biden is attempting to force his gun control agenda on law-abiding Americans using executive action.

Biden is using provisions from within last year's Republican-blessed gun control package as justification to force Universal Gun Registration on law-abiding gun owners.

Your National Association for Gun Rights is already launching our counterattack.

But we need you in the fight, Fellow Patriot.

**[So please make your most generous donation of $150, $100, or $75 to help us prepare for incoming political fight](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztf3cmu0t2i4lkr3cnr06r0khm0gkq97n3ps32tg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdimaor4cph2bs)**.

name: Ronny Jackson
subject: I’m sure you’ve gotten a ton of messages about the arrest of President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
| | **I 'm sure you've gotten a ton of messages about the arrest of President Trump, but this one doesn't require your money, your number, or your email.**
---
This isn't one of those emails.
This is Congressman Ronny Jackson.
I was President Trump's White House physician, and now, I'm proudly his strongest ally in the House.
Listen, I'm sure your email has been blowing up with unsolicited messages about Trump's potential arrest.
I'm sure you've gotten messages from random organizations you've never heard of before.
**And I 'm positive you've gotten emails from Swamp Creature "Republicans" who claim to be on Trump's side, but behind closed doors secretly want him to rot away in a prison cell.**
I get these emails too, but this one is different.
As Trump's top ally in the House, I speak with him often - very, very often.
[**So I asked my team to make a page where President Trump 's top supporters can send him their own personal message as he faces the biggest political Witch Hunt in American history.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62475196:6ZdJLZGwN:m:1:3391001263:A3A8321999B9BBE25D3CDB3422186C50:r)
And again, this doesn't require your money, your number, or your email.
| [ **SEND A MESSAGE TO TRUMP** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62475196:6ZdJLZGwN:m:1:3391001263:A3A8321999B9BBE25D3CDB3422186C50:r)
---
But just a fair warning, **responses will be cut off at midnight tonight.**
My team needs time to organize them before President Trump lands in my home state of Texas for his FIRST rally since announcing his candidacy.
So I'm humbly asking:[ **Please send your message to President Trump today.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62475196:6ZdJLZGwN:m:1:3391001263:A3A8321999B9BBE25D3CDB3422186C50:r)
I know how much he loves his supporters
Thank you & God Bless,
Ronny Jackson

name: Aurora Regino
subject: They tried to "transition" my daughter behind my back
body:
| |
---
| | Peter, I never thought it would be me. I'd seen the news headlines and the crazy videos of activist teachers talking about how they indoctrinated students with ideas about sexuality and gender, against parents' wishes and behind their backs... But I never thought in a million years it would happen to my family. _And then it did._ My 11-year-old daughter went to the guidance counselor, after a death in our family, for help processing that loss. In a meeting that was supposed to help my daughter manage her grief, her guidance counselor convinced her to begin identifying as a boy at school. She went into that office as my daughter and left with a boy's name asking to be called a "he." It took just minutes. All of this was done without my knowledge - and even worse, the school told her to hide all of this from me. [**So, I 'm suing Chico Unified School District with the help of the Center for American Liberty - not for damages, or for emotional distress, but to put an end to its "Parental Secrecy Policy" that directs teachers and staff to hide a child's "social transition" from parents.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62475156:6KytrZGkN:m:1:3331421248:A58A7CD063B40BAEFC6C73C6A6072E58:r) Because when we win this lawsuit, we'll set a precedent nationwide. My daughter might have wanted to tell me about her "new identity" right away - because I'm her mother, she trusts me, and she knows I love her unconditionally. **_But her guidance counselor discouraged her from talking to me about it._** She encouraged her to "come out" to her teachers, her peers - everyone but me. It was two months after the initial meeting by the time I found out what was going on, and it wasn't because the school notified me or because my daughter told me. It was because my daughter told my mother who then told me. And thankfully we were able to put an end to this. My daughter is doing well. She goes by the name I gave her, and knows she is a girl. But I know we were the lucky ones. I know that if the school had its way, my daughter might be on medications and thinking about dangerous surgeries, changing her body forever, putting her own health at risk. And in my state, they could've done all of it behind my back. But I'm not moving; I'm fighting back! Because the truth is, what starts in California never stays here. But I don't stand a chance without you. [**Will you make a generous, tax-deductible donation to my lawsuit today, and take a stand for American children and parental rights?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62475156:6KytrZGkN:m:1:3331421248:A58A7CD063B40BAEFC6C73C6A6072E58:r) We're up against an evil unlike anything I've seen in my life - and it grows more powerful by the day. But the truth is on our side. When patriotic Americans come together, it doesn't matter who stands against us.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
| | Aurora Regino
---
| | [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62475156:6KytrZGkN:m:1:3331421248:A58A7CD063B40BAEFC6C73C6A6072E58:r)

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Asleep at the wheel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
EVERY GOP Candidate Should Make These EASY Commitments. Do you agree?

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbk7jobjf6miai04m5kii5a02a2kq4mb51gip9h0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdim9oj1chh2bs)
Fellow American -

I'm running on a vision to answer the question of what it means to be an American in the year 2023. Merit. Truth. Free speech. Accountability. I believe deep in my bones these ideals still exist.

I am running for President to **revive** the conservative ideals that put this country into motion 250 years ago, and to create an alternative to the failed, woke leftist policies - not just complain about them.

How do we get this done? _**I challenge every GOP candidate to join me in some easy commitments:**_
1. End affirmative action
2. Abandon the climate cult
3. Total decoupling from China
4. 8-year limits for all federal bureaucrats
5. Say NO to central bank digital currencies
6. Release the "state action" files

Fellow American, Republicans can't be asleep at the wheel any longer, I need you on my team. **[Chip in $1 or more if you agree that our next president should commit to these 6 things!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmolalqhqt3gn0hvm48p8fn32n18fuicnu8mhjco_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdim9oj1chh2bs)**

Let's stop just complaining about the Left and DO something about it.

Stand with me today,

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7jqhqvalumd7co2jdee2qikpc6t8j3m4v5ngk7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdim9oj1chh2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** WATCH NOW -> **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvmba0opk4eqa92fi5dc0kkp7e3oco7vunqicng0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdim9oj1chh2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoej9vgailb2e9ucs13p4mis5d3ueq716qf7fb9o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdim9oj1chh2bs)

---

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3papjej86d1dk2qh57nb6ccg48phr87vj8onpr8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdim9oj1chh2bs)| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4ct5a9oeccde1s6dm49cnmtv0r1vd9r526gomqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdim9oj1chh2bs)| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ziuvda6prc7gvd696adn7va1n68u50gn047b5tqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdim9oj1chh2bs)
---|---|---

name: Larry Kudlow
subject: The New York Sun is saving journalism
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDgzLTQ2NzE0MWQwNGVmNjRlZWRiZDI2ZGI0N2U0YjZmZWNmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZ25zb2Z5Y2NxaD9zcmM9U1BPMzcxNzMifQ/ToWoI-jcEGpgPojag_Zy2A)
---
[](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDgzLTQ2NzE0MWQwNGVmNjRlZWRiZDI2ZGI0N2U0YjZmZWNmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZ25zb2Z5Y2NxaD9zcmM9U1BPMzcxNzMifQ/6M3rlYwbYDVkLPgTmG5rTg)
---
Dear Friend, **I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.**

**I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.**

But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.
**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. **Joining the Sun costs as little as $0.01 per day.** I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.

clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | Dear Friend, I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns. I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism. But there's also far more to what the Sun is building. As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be. I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust. The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored. The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way. The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun. A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number. My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly. I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths. They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as $0.01 per day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts. Please join me in the fight to restore America's journalism. This is one mission that our country desperately needs. name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Stop Spending - Reduce Government
body:
|
---
| | |
---
| [**Email the Governor, Speaker and Lt. Governor tell them to Stop Spending - Reduce Government**](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/-cTn9aDZvkaie9buBgASvA) Your Mississippi legislature is quickly approaching the end of the 2023 session. Over the past three months, we've witnessed just how dysfunctional government can be. We have seen politicians break promises and we witnessed firsthand the lack of principle and character that plagues our state government. But the Mississippi Freedom Caucus has also witnessed the resilience and power of the hard-working conservative people of our state. You have raised your voice several times and demanded your representatives stick to the principles and values you elected them to uphold, and they have listened. Next week I plan to outline for you the wins and losses of the 2023 session, but today we must focus on how the state budget is set for the next fiscal year. Appropriation bills lay out how your money is spent by your government. These are the bills that determine the budget for the Department of Education, Department of Transportation, or any of the government agencies that live off your money. Until this week, most appropriation bills were passed with “dummy” numbers. These are numbers that are simply placeholders, because the system that has been developed is a system designed to circumvent the constitutional deadlines that are meant to protect you from the politicians' desire to hide how they are spending your money. These “dummy” bills were passed by the House and the Senate and are now “in conference.” This means that the only elected officials who have any direct input into how much money each agency gets are Senate and House leadership. These “leaders” must derive a final budget number. Most of this work is completed by real people, not politicians, who are hired to project how much money or revenue the state will have for the next year. Once they come up with that number, they look at last year's budget and then equally distribute any increase or decrease among the various state agencies. Now it’s time for the politicians to get involved. At this point in the process, the leadership must make decisions. Will they stay with the numbers provided by the Legislative Budget Office, LBO, or will they increase or decrease those numbers? For the next fiscal year 2024, LBO has recommended that agencies receive an increase of approximately 3% based on their projections of how much money the state can take from you. [**Email the Governor, Speaker and Lt. Governor - Stop Spending - Reduce Government**](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/-cTn9aDZvkaie9buBgASvA) The House position, led by Speaker Philip Gunn, is that we should follow LBO's recommendations and only increase spending by approximately 3%. This will produce a final budget of approximately $7.2 billion. While I would prefer we reduce the size of government and actually cut many of these agencies, this position is significantly better than that of the Senate. The Senate's position, led by Lt. Gov. Delbert Hosemann, is that we should increase spending by almost half a billion dollars over the increases suggested by the Legislative Budget Office. This means Mississippi will be spending your money like a drunken sailor on shore leave and will put the nail in the coffin for any future elimination of the state income tax on working Mississippians. Hosemann is doing nothing more than using your money in an attempt to buy votes for his next election. It is time for you to speak up one more time. We need to let Philip Gunn know that we support his position to limit the growth of the government and tell Lt. Gov. Hosemann that we do not appreciate his careless and reckless liberal spending. [Email the Governor, Speaker and Lt. Governor tell them to Stop Spending - Reduce Government](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/-cTn9aDZvkaie9buBgASvA)
---
| |
---
The Mississippi Freedom Caucus is the only group of legislators who fight every day for your rights and freedom. Please join us in this fight by making a donation.
Your support is vital to our success.
| | [Donate Today! We need your support. ](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/Sf57tEA-tSd1gKEY3mK83w)
---
| You are receiving this email because you signed up for alerts from Mississippi Freedom Caucus.
Click [here](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/ydfH-cav5qTzKV8YYCwfXg) to unsubscribe from this mailing list.

---
| | [ ](https://www.votervoice.net)
---

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Plastics are killing baby sea turtles
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1687060?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | After making the long trek from the shoreline to the ocean for the very first time, a baby sea turtle spots a small, shiny object flickering about in the water. Assuming it is a fish, the baby turtle attempts to eat the floating item. **But WAIT, that’s not a fish!** It’s actually a piece of plastic that could _**CHOKE and KILL**_ the baby sea turtle. And if the turtle manages to ingest the plastic, it will be at major risk of _**malnutrition, chemical contamination, or damaged internal organs.**_ Sadly, this could be the fate for many more baby sea turtles and other marine life who mistake plastics for food, become entangled in it, or ingest its toxic chemicals. **OVER A MILLION SPECIES DIE** every year from plastic pollution, and at this rate, scientists predict there will be **MORE PLASTIC THAN FISH** in the sea by 2050 -- making it even harder for animals to discern what is edible food and what is deadly plastic.[ **Friend, please take action now to help STOP plastic pollution from overrunning our oceans and killing baby sea turtles >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1687061?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION NOW](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1687062?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_**Every piece of plastic that has ever been created still exists in some form on this planet today -- because plastic never disappears.**_ Instead, it just keeps breaking down into tinier and tinier microplastics that end up in our water, our food, and our air.
Not only do plastics continue to accumulate in our environment every day, but the process of producing plastic also has devastating impacts. Plastic manufacturing facilities burn through huge amounts of fossil fuels and release massive amounts of pollution. This exacerbates the climate crisis and puts nearby communities -- primarily communities of color -- at significantly higher risk of cancer and other serious illnesses.
But greedy plastic corporations have been steadily bumping production up at a staggering rate of **9% every year.** In fact, the plastic manufactured in just the first 10 years of this century is more than the total produced in the ENTIRE last century! [**We must take URGENT action to combat the plastic pollution crisis before the PLASTIC APOCALYPSE destroys our oceans and our planet. Will you add your name now?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1687063?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION NOW](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1687062?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for defending our planet from plastic pollution.
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Ronny Jackson
subject: I’m sure you’ve gotten a ton of messages about the arrest of President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
| | **I 'm sure you've gotten a ton of messages about the arrest of President Trump, but this one doesn't require your money, your number, or your email.**
---
This isn't one of those emails.
This is Congressman Ronny Jackson.
I was President Trump's White House physician, and now, I'm proudly his strongest ally in the House.
Listen, I'm sure your email has been blowing up with unsolicited messages about Trump's potential arrest.
I'm sure you've gotten messages from random organizations you've never heard of before.
**And I 'm positive you've gotten emails from Swamp Creature "Republicans" who claim to be on Trump's side, but behind closed doors secretly want him to rot away in a prison cell.**
I get these emails too, but this one is different.
As Trump's top ally in the House, I speak with him often - very, very often.
[**So I asked my team to make a page where President Trump 's top supporters can send him their own personal message as he faces the biggest political Witch Hunt in American history.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62475190:6tRlCZGNb:m:1:3365131770:1705783EDAF89BFA8E400D81CC9A8DA1:r)
And again, this doesn't require your money, your number, or your email.
| [ **SEND A MESSAGE TO TRUMP** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62475190:6tRlCZGNb:m:1:3365131770:1705783EDAF89BFA8E400D81CC9A8DA1:r)
---
But just a fair warning, **responses will be cut off at midnight tonight.**
My team needs time to organize them before President Trump lands in my home state of Texas for his FIRST rally since announcing his candidacy.
So I'm humbly asking:[ **Please send your message to President Trump today.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62475190:6tRlCZGNb:m:1:3365131770:1705783EDAF89BFA8E400D81CC9A8DA1:r)
I know how much he loves his supporters
Thank you & God Bless,
Ronny Jackson

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: Strength from God
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
| |
---
| | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62475907:6GVKCZGNg:m:1:3391001263:1EDF6363E1B40C245C767780D0E33474:r)
---

We must restore the joy of Christ to our churches and our communities.

We know that our strength comes from our obedience to God and our unflinching conviction in our faith.

Sadly, you'd be hard pressed to find such faith-based conviction in our nation's capital these days. Far too many people are motivated by personal gain, instead of serving a higher purpose.

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62475907:6GVKCZGNg:m:1:3391001263:1EDF6363E1B40C245C767780D0E33474:r)
---

The amoral politicking and reckless decision making from our leaders in Washington have left our country in a terrible place.

If we are going to bring back the joy of Christ to the people of our nation, __**[we must restore faith-driven leadership to our nation's politics.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62475907:6GVKCZGNg:m:1:3391001263:1EDF6363E1B40C245C767780D0E33474:r "we must elect Christian conservatives who will lead with moral clarity and act with
selflessness.")**__

---
| | [RESTORE FAITH-DRIVEN LEADERSHIP](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62475907:6GVKCZGNg:m:1:3391001263:1EDF6363E1B40C245C767780D0E33474:r)
---

I believe that with more faith-driven leadership, we can meet the mounting challenges facing our nation and make our nation a more prosperous, joyous place.

God Bless,

subject: I'm still fighting
body: While I was extremely disappointed about the outcome of the 2022 Senate race, and what that means for Alaska and our great nation, it opened my eyes to an emerging threat facing our democracy. %recipient.md5_hash% | | | | You're the First to Know. | --- [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d8ab26e2067242fd8e553855d44c70cd&_e=uVHjDJf2fYkBBUofwtq3GqImzCad09rvcaVue_thGoBcfQ8dhDnkO8qu2MEBvykn2hvJ0lpZ3s2acmergwZB7kAdEetnmWOg6Efp2SN9fKWQKQHK4cbdzDD_hkaXAfiFCE6PW_EL9NNRXh0yHD5qFYu-4_h-V-MqhOco50GUL38IlfclhqY1hotH29yv9ttS-vCotfuO-jjs2Zs3qdEMomLqzuZp7FmF9m8XojHuQfSSTy6d5R-Tw2Zc7eyztkuVKvLy-uj9lUUZ-B8f4VtxCVbnq46yfWXv7gKVzIVuQncRNf_wTnHZ685TZmL01uT4diN07EEAYnacWJZO-0e8R_9ToqauPyhk9PDPmm9qjG7Fr6eODSU_h4Xu8hJF4nFo_ytxNNPkD3TnZ2VWQQhPjXpT-nuanHddBDQTQ_vajLY%3D) --- Friend, I believe things happen for a reason. While I was extremely disappointed about the outcome of the 2022 Senate race, and what that means for Alaska and our great nation, it opened my eyes to an emerging threat facing our democracy. When Alaska first used RCV in 2022 (including my U.S. Senate race), it had the lowest voter turnout since it first became a state, 63 years ago. In contrast, the rest of the U.S. had one of the highest voter turnout rates. If Alaska had seen normal voter turnout, we likely would have had different election results. RCV [confused
