clean_body: While I was extremely disappointed about the outcome of the 2022 Senate race, and what that means for Alaska and our great nation, it opened my eyes to an emerging threat facing our democracy. %recipient.md5hash% | | | | You're the First to Know. | Friend, I believe things happen for a reason. While I was extremely disappointed about the outcome of the 2022 Senate race, and what that means for Alaska and our great nation, it opened my eyes to an emerging threat facing our democracy. When Alaska first used RCV in 2022 (including my U.S. Senate race), it had the lowest voter turnout since it first became a state, 63 years ago. In contrast, the rest of the U.S. had one of the highest voter turnout rates. If Alaska had seen normal voter turnout, we likely would have had different election results. RCV "confuses voters", " escalates negativity", " increases costs", and resulted in " voter suppression". To address this threat, I want my supporters to be the first to know that we've started Preserve Democracy, a non-partisan group dedicated to increasing voter turnout and fighting the spread of RCV. HELP US LAUNCH PRESERVE DEMOCRACY AND BE PART OF OUR FOUNDERS' CIRCLE! | | | | | | | We have a short window in time to mobilize voter turnout. The 2024 elections are right around the corner! I'm still fighting for those who feel they have no voice, and I know I CAN COUNT ON THE DONORS IN OUR FOUNDERS' CIRCLE to fight alongside me. Thank you, | | Kelly Tshibaka Preserve Democracy | Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Al Canata
subject: It’s time for Congress to cut the credit card
body:
Spending is out of hand at all levels of government.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=027fe83e304f4491b92f92b0bc6ec5d5&_e=jdZ2YuKF7u-2KNTTwgX8z2baFy4TCBTgdu0jTjORgkxNyPqeFu0Zh0DdNDd4GXYyH5aOxTqyRW-BmUfVMQzsVI5Pw7Y0hqBPwdyHt0Ku8T8nT1EXGxQxbHlFkCHLqfjiV9bclf_cJXAxx7-PWD6W5ez7VfNuT0L5SPfXJoRSKlHF3wRI_chAAASlISxw1pUqxJDyMek_pQGIdc24oJ6Gax3x6tL-VgnBWi9nyfk3FTFfe4_AVHp43qP9HtAfFJoqhcRb1my5K5w7k7uNcQrdhNZEeE_t0Pgu3RhEs6zdBOY%3D)

Friend,

President Biden's budget binge reminds me of all those stories about the reckless teenager left alone for a weekend with his parent's credit card.

Spending is out of hand at all levels of government. And Congress keeps raising the debt ceiling and helping him spend more.

**It 's clear that Congress does not have your interest in mind, Friend. They only care about themselves. **

But luckily for you, you have a voice to fight back.

My name is Al Canata, the Vice President of Strategic Partnerships at the National Taxpayers Union (NTU). NTU is the voice for taxpayers in D.C. We advocate for policy changes that will benefit you, the taxpayer.

[_**Will you help our team work with -- **__**and pressure, if needed**_ _** -- Congress to cut the proverbial credit card? Click here to rush your support with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=027fe83e304f4491b92f92b0bc6ec5d5&_e=jdZ2YuKF7u-2KNTTwgX8z2baFy4TCBTgdu0jTjORgkxNyPqeFu0Zh0DdNDd4GXYyH5aOxTqyRW-BmUfVMQzsVI5Pw7Y0hqBPwdyHt0Ku8T8nT1EXGxQxbHlFkCHLqfjiV9bclf_cJXAxx7-PWD6W5dn8oM2C2OoUXst5jAfy8BQHkSSGAazc5OySwmF1C9tNbzJK9hvqbs9I6HgoXTLqU44IINEE9MNpwGZvDvp_D44JvD0MTFo4p8PnUPVsieY9DBS6uXd6X-XIueP7atZKlpNglXdyeq5IK0l44NJoO6c%3D)

_Congress could be responsible and cut spending ... _

Instead, Congress likes to blame their fiscal crisis on tax cut programs like NTU's Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, their favorite deficit scapegoat, and empower the IRS to reach deeper into the pockets of taxpayers.

Congress recently gave the IRS $80 BILLION to pursue an aggressive strategy centered on heavier-handed enforcement to shake taxpayers down for every penny.

They will do anything besides cutting spending and sticking to a budget.

But don't worry, Friend, NTU is looking out for you.

[_**Your donation will help us keep the government 's hand from reaching even further into the taxpayers' pockets and work towards making America more economically free. Will you rush your urgent support today? Click here to send your gift >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=027fe83e304f4491b92f92b0bc6ec5d5&_e=jdZ2YuKF7u-2KNTTwgX8z2baFy4TCBTgdu0jTjORgkxNyPqeFu0Zh0DdNDd4GXYyH5aOxTqyRW-BmUfVMQzsVI5Pw7Y0hqBPwdyHt0Ku8T8nT1EXGxQxbHlFkCHLqfjiV9bclf_cJXAxx7-PWD6W5eNFDVcv_qav2Ul8s72i4lj3_ou-rawA9iu9nsDezS1zCrTqDBoeAuCLtRHo_5rm61b3g9Js3LahOEHXJZKJ8D-vvV8pBGE2U7ihe18KFrTz6mrPTy218_JkAwYEjdTgxvcbYc_xih38AMXjcHf0OpU%3D)

In addition to the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, NTU has been part of every significant taxpayer victory of the last five decades.

We were there when the federal tax code was overhauled under President Reagan in 1986. We championed the cause for a **" Taxpayer Bill of Rights"** in the late 80s and 90s, with follow-on legislation, the **2019 Taxpayer First Act**. And in 2020, our public education arm launched the **Taxpayer Defense Center** to fight for taxpayers in court. TDC has already helped to hand the IRS major defeats in the Supreme Court and at the state level.

It's no wonder Congress likes to blame NTU for their problems -- NTU's victories benefit the taxpayer, not politicians or special interests.

clean_body: Spending is out of hand at all levels of government. Friend, President Biden's budget binge reminds me of all those stories about the reckless teenager left alone for a weekend with his parent's credit card. Spending is out of hand at all levels of government. And Congress keeps raising the debt ceiling and helping him spend more. It 's clear that Congress does not have your interest in mind, Friend. They only care about themselves. But luckily for you, you have a voice to fight back. My name is Al Canata, the Vice President of Strategic Partnerships at the National Taxpayers Union (NTU). NTU is the voice for taxpayers in D.C. We advocate for policy changes that will benefit you, the taxpayer. Congress could be responsible and cut spending ... Instead, Congress likes to blame their fiscal crisis on tax cut programs like NTU's Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, their favorite deficit scapegoat, and empower the IRS to reach deeper into the pockets of taxpayers. Congress recently gave the IRS $80 BILLION to pursue an aggressive strategy centered on heavier-handed enforcement to shake taxpayers down for every penny. They will do anything besides cutting spending and sticking to a budget. But don't worry, Friend, NTU is looking out for you. In addition to the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, NTU has been part of every significant taxpayer victory of the last five decades. We were there when the federal tax code was overhauled under President Reagan in 1986. We championed the cause for a " Taxpayer Bill of Rights" in the late 80s and 90s, with follow-on legislation, the 2019 Taxpayer First Act. And in 2020, our public education arm launched the Taxpayer Defense Center to fight for taxpayers in court. TDC has already helped to hand the IRS major defeats in the Supreme Court and at the state level. It's no wonder Congress likes to blame NTU for their problems -- NTU's victories benefit the taxpayer, not politicians or special interests. Will you help us win another taxpayer victory by sending in your support now before another "silly season" with the budget gets even sillier? Click any link below. Thank you, Al Canata Vice President of Strategic Partnerships National Taxpayers Union NTU is a 501(c)(4) nonprofit, nonpartisan citizen group whose members work every day for lower taxes and smaller government at all levels. Conservatives Gives 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Karen Greenhalgh
subject: Greenhalgh- Supporting Law Enforcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Greenhalgh for Delegate**
body:
| | |
---
| | Friends, As a strong supporter of law enforcement, I was proud to serve on the Public Safety Committee in the House of Delegates this past legislative session. Our legislation this year included efforts to keep some of the dangerous felons they intended to release behind bars, give our local law enforcement agencies more tools to get dangerous criminals off the street, and keep those who commit multiple crimes of violence with firearms behind bars longer. While these bills all passed the House, they failed in the Democrat controlled Senate, which has remained more concerned about the safety and comfort of criminals than the safety and security of everyday Virginians. I will always _back the blue_ and have made it a priority to get raises for law enforcement, expand training opportunities, and hold violent criminals accountable. Law enforcement plays a vital role in protecting our communities. I will continue to support funding our law enforcement officers, to ensure that they have the resources and training they need to keep our families and neighborhoods safe. Unfortunately, radical liberals are working every day to attack the brave men and women in law enforcement. They were passing legislation to release violent criminals and even voted to stop reporting sexual battery to police before Republicans stepped in. Now they are attempting to make it tougher for police officers to do their jobs. This shouldn’t be so difficult; keeping our families safe and standing with law enforcement should be a priority for EVERY legislator in the General Assembly. Stand with me in supporting our police officers! Your contribution of [$500, $250, $100 or $50](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/69e7b797ec93f6ff/4d4147137954055bc3d6b838967d376c/37923) can help get my message out that our law enforcement deserve to be supported and we MUST stand firm together against violent crime! Thank you, Karen Greenhalgh

---
Peter, first, let me apologize for sharing anything from _the_ _New York Times,_ but **you needed to see this.** Democrats are _already_ gearing up to spend **$45 MILLION** to take away _just_ four hard-earned Republican seats in New York. **That’s how desperate Democrats are –** they need record amounts of money to convince people to support their terrible candidates. Peter, we obviously can’t let them win and reverse the gains we’ve made in New York, and that’s why I’m launching a new initiative. **Make a $5 grassroots donation, help us fight back, and waste $45 million of the Democrats' money.** _That’s what I call a win-win. _ [**Peter, can we count on your support?**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=080a8eec5b2a434cbce684994411c736&_e=LcFOBEk6hZ5iv4tudnG-TFjc44gcytu85kH_d57j8O6MZOogWxEK-jZw_JWbVAk5qaFHPw9_eMfq02b292_3I8JcZwRz_zZBdu43Zpq0-vw5LlA5_2P28tFdFGbWgwHT-MXqXDXC-zB4640OnyjpO8augNPyVEItyzJoLP9vibfTFpxlOryvd6U_nmzd2-HFLtqPZEhZKLMh9_o1EvCKuZlhGrZXwrkynHHutcxGt92aWfrNgtz2vyTmtxZL6jnHIQKsC1dcRAL19hlZolIMm3s9IX3mUaml8pqqNitGgkQ%3D)
---
| | [**YES >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=080a8eec5b2a434cbce684994411c736&_e=LcFOBEk6hZ5iv4tudnG-TFjc44gcytu85kH_d57j8O6MZOogWxEK-jZw_JWbVAk5qaFHPw9_eMfq02b292_3I8JcZwRz_zZBdu43Zpq0-vw5LlA5_2P28tFdFGbWgwHT-MXqXDXC-zB4640OnyjpO-70QXoeUYw1EKykdkbfkE2Z0FXbufkIGnbAkYqsVzvTXVEQ5Cllp7x4z8Lj9hxPMIoxqfjUZbg7ueIsa55_rXWYJh78V3DnTEtpWD1hJH2UEsd76iz1HzJL19wXCX9NpT019JrKBUWnnmI58lJMU9I%3D)
---
[**NO >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=080a8eec5b2a434cbce684994411c736&_e=LcFOBEk6hZ5iv4tudnG-TIVQqoYkqeXhGjXy9_D8mFioIJ8oj_KYGIdpq1GywJ_WJwK3ndRvNr3vEK49Y_F6f-03zKsLAHyqcXOArWulbScM1GPqd1IBQtWAvkGUy3JQxysAGY2RZPGvOyyKCBuQnkwBzDCQWiGMcEMl6r3hqoBkZK-hqqi1oOTFRCBBHWzwwGlkcm5n8gpiECRXkCCat5mwLDBQQI8nMYQHOlNNSokC9lQxcofBzTl5as3ZKYJNdNh9XoT8MsfW2Rn8UoRwWA%3D%3D)

# Getting Started
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r5BqhevvZqhcDiD4FjXS_Rs1km68ftFIra5igkPajHrqLbVe0NLAQcLu4HApzP3rgrjqgQVmfyvnR2jX_Amq1bizJfVWtVw9L3oXyP27JTnAC3mRdGLcEcg6WkWAD6xeeW6QdcexrqyVOJsTqeRNPw==&c=z-WMuVS6PlpUDD_TB7P3lm1Yr4gmW7VFodu-H7ItL14g_bV5Ca-SwA==&ch=JFl6PlMCbnlruDNZg05s5RlXE0rFWsu7qSBPI3acboSXEgbL_rjWRQ==)
---
| 'Karen and Jay share thoughts on the virtue of approaching life's challenges - taking 'one step at a time.'
---
| A journey begins with the first step. And getting started, taking that first step is often the hardest part of the whole experience. How many times have you had a true deep-down desire to do something - to accomplish something really important - but you just couldn't seem to muster up the conviction to take the first step? Whether you feel you don't have the energy - or maybe it's the courage that you just don't seem to have - whatever it is that you are missing, you just don't take that first step. And success truly is all about just taking 'one step at a time.' The idea of breaking things down into manageable chunks - and moving forward.
When I was growing up, my mother had a saying that I remember her telling me on so very many occasions. If she sensed that I was experiencing a certain reticence to get moving on something that I really needed or wanted to get done, she would say 'Dear, just start putting one foot in front of the other.'
And she's not the only voice I still hear from time to time. I often come back to an insight that Steve Jobs shared - when thinking about how things actually get done - and in essence, the process of success. He said 'you can always connect the dots going backwards - in retrospect' - in other words, you can explain the sequence of events, the progression of how you got from where you once were to where you've ended up. But you can't do it the other way around. 'You can never connect the dots going forward.' There's just no way to know exactly how the whole progression of steps will unfold. The implication, of course, is that you just have to get started, take the first step and have the courage and agility to figure things out along the way. Course-correct as you go - taking one step at a time - and in that way, move ahead to make good things happen.
Approaching life's challenges one step at a time is a powerful mindset that can help us overcome obstacles and achieve our goals. When we take things one step at a time, we break down complex challenges into manageable tasks, reducing stress and all those things that tend to overwhelm us. It helps us focus our attention and energy on what we can do in the present moment, rather than worrying about the future or dwelling on the past.
One of the key virtues of approaching challenges one step at a time is that it helps us to build momentum. Taking small steps consistently can add up to big progress over time. For example, if someone wants to lose weight, they may feel overwhelmed by the idea of losing 50 pounds. But if they focus on losing just one pound at a time, they can build momentum and develop the habits and mindset necessary for sustained progress. This approach can help to create a positive feedback loop, where small successes build confidence and motivation, leading to even greater progress.
Another virtue of this approach is that it encourages us to cultivate patience and perseverance. And how many of us can 'lack patience' from time to time! When we approach challenges with a long-term perspective, we are less likely to get discouraged by setbacks or failures. Instead, we can view these setbacks as opportunities to learn and grow, and to adjust our approach accordingly. This mindset can help us to develop resilience and grit, which are essential qualities for achieving success in any area of life. And, in some ways, also puts us in the mindset of 'not beating ourselves up' when something goes awry, or when we feel like we've had a bit of a misstep.
One real-life example of the power of approaching challenges one step at a time is the story of J.K. Rowling, the author of the Harry Potter series. Rowling faced a number of setbacks and rejections before finally achieving success with her writing. However, she never lost sight of her goal and continued to take small steps towards her dream, such as writing for even just a few minutes a day. This persistence and dedication eventually paid off, and Rowling went on to become one of the most successful authors of all time.
Another example is the story of Diana Nyad, the swimmer who famously swam from Cuba to Florida at the age of 64. Nyad had attempted the swim four times before finally succeeding, and she approached the challenge one step at a time, breaking the journey down into manageable chunks. Rather than focusing on the distance she had left to cover, she focused on swimming one stroke at a time, and took breaks every hour to refuel and rest. This approach allowed her to build momentum and overcome the physical and mental challenges of the grueling journey.
Approaching life's challenges one step at a time is a powerful mindset that can help us to build momentum, cultivate patience and perseverance, and achieve success in any area of life. By breaking down complex challenges into manageable tasks and focusing on the present moment, we can overcome obstacles and achieve our goals, one step at a time. And as my mother used to say, 'Just take the first step - and then put one foot in front of the other.' When you take this approach, marvelous things are likely to happen!

---
| Positive Profile of the Week: Travis Mills - 'One Step at a Time' - with a Very Special Meaning
---
| | |
---|---
|
This week, we are delighted to highlight a leader who truly embodies the spirit of 'one step at a time' through his faith and his remarkable life story - Travis Mills of Maine.

Like so many, Karen and I are very thankful for the service and sacrifice of our many veterans. The story of Travis Mills is very special - and immensely inspiring.

Travis was a staff SGT in the 82nd Airborne division. During his third tour in Afghanistan, he was the victim of an IED resulting in critical injuries that cost him portions of both legs and both arms. He received and continues to get care to assist him and is in fact one of only five quadruple amputees to survive such injuries who fought in the wars in Iraq and Afghanistan. You would think that 'would be it' for Travis, but it wasn't.

Members of the military are trained to overcome, to rise to the occasion, and to assist their fellow soldiers in arms. That's what Travis did and continues to do to this day.

He tells his story of overcoming what seems like overwhelming odds in a New York Times Best Selling book titled 'Tough as They Come.' Today, he serves as a motivational speaker bringing a spirit of positivity and overcoming challenges. But Travis's biggest commitment was the opening of the Travis Mills Foundation Home in Rome, Maine.

Travis and his volunteer team raised nearly $3 million to purchase and rehab the Elizabeth Arden estate in Rome, Maine, turning it into a totally free retreat for military families and special needs veterans. The retreat is fully handicapped accessible and features not only events like water sports but prepares veterans who have had some setbacks with the training they need to adapt to everyday life. Some of this training includes how to use traditional gym equipment, things to be ready for when returning home, and ways you can take what you learn and apply it to help others.

This amazing program at the Travis Mills Foundation is called The Warrior Path. The seven-day on site initiation begins at the foundation's retreat in Maine then continues for 3 months with additional off-site training. I encourage you all to visit [travismillsfoundation.org](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r5BqhevvZqhcDiD4FjXS_Rs1km68ftFIra5igkPajHrqLbVe0NLAQcLu4HApzP3rvfD78NOWixD0NtQBQZIfdkSMV7DilT43YF_eTKi1Z2x8_3kbE5cMD6X6opxxarPvufpyDQGVPPgSJg0l7p58acWDBWvuQW8t&c=z-WMuVS6PlpUDD_TB7P3lm1Yr4gmW7VFodu-H7ItL14g_bV5Ca-SwA==&ch=JFl6PlMCbnlruDNZg05s5RlXE0rFWsu7qSBPI3acboSXEgbL_rjWRQ==) and see
first-hand the impact Travis and the foundation are making day in and day out. I am not surprised that Travis has and will always be 'Army Strong' as he serves as an army of one to help those in need to better themselves - the ones we love, those who have served, and our country! Thank you, Travis, for your amazing inspiration and leadership!

|

| Quote of the Week
---
| "You don't have to see the whole staircase, just take the first step." \- Martin Luther King Jr.

name: Team Chase
subject: Reminder: She's One of Us
disclaimer_text: paid for by taxpayer dollars

| She was Born to Serve
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Senator Chase has represented Chesterfield, Colonial Heights and Amelia Counties in the Senate since first elected in 2015, almost 8 years. Amanda and her husband Mike have been married over 30 years and have 4 grown children. Amanda and Mike both grew up in Bon Air and have lived most of their lives in Chesterfield County, since 1979.
Amanda has been rated as one of the most conservative Senators in Virginia by the American Conservative Union and has a lifetime score of 100% with the Family Foundation, VCDL and A with the NRA.
She is also a champion in the General Assembly for pushing back against vaccine and mask mandates, calling for a full investigation into the 2020 Presidential Election, parental rights in education, medical freedom, protecting innocent life, protecting gun rights and help for our veterans.
---
| MESSAGE FROM SENATOR CHASE
---
| | |
---
| Dear Greetings!
Who knew that when I left a career in management at the Federal Reserve Bank in Richmond to come home and raise our 4 kids that I would end up homeschooling for 8 years and coaching our neighborhood swim team? It was during that time that I rose to the occasion and joined my neighbors to save our sleepy little neighborhood. Who knew that that would end up jump starting my political involvement and a run for the Virginia State Senate years later?
It was during that season that I was asked to help start the Bayhill Pointe Torpedoes neighborhood swim team and coach about 150 kids, many of whom couldn't swim. I welcomed the challenge.
It was while I was coaching that a developer lobbied the Chesterfield Board of Supervisors to repurpose the main thoroughfare through our sleepy little neighborhood and turn it into a main cut through that was not conducive to kids safely riding their bikes to the pool for morning swim team practice.
I joined our neighbors of all political persuasions for one purpose; to fight to protect the safety and quality of life of the kids in our community. The case went on for years but ultimately, we won.
My desire to protect and defend my neighborhood launched my political activism to make sure we elected the right people who would protect the interests of real people and to protect their quality of life. Little did I know that this would turn into volunteering and working for many Republican candidates and eventually a run for the State Senate in 2015. In a competitive challenging 3 way Republican Primary that included a 27 year incumbent, I was not expected to win. But I did.
Now you know the rest of the story. It's been such an honor to serve you in the Virginia Senate for the past 8 years representing Chesterfield, Colonial Heights and Amelia. I'm so thankful and humbled that you've entrusted me with the huge responsibility of representing you and being your voice. I've committed myself to representing real people, protecting their quality of life and ensuring that the district I represented would be a great place to live, work and raise a family. I look forward to continuing to be that voice as I seek re-election in Senate District 12, representing most of Chesterfield and Colonial Heights.
As many of you know, I am no wall flower or shrinking violet. I made sure your voice was heard through the stealing of an election, through tyrannical Covid mandates and complete shutdowns of businesses, schools and life as we knew it.
I was a leader during the Covid crisis advocating that we protect Constitutional rights even during a health crisis. When Governor Northam inconsistently applied the shutdowns, closing down churches and schools yet kept the ABC stores open, I led the effort to push back with Reopen Virginia Rallies at the Capitol. You could actually hear our honking horns during Governor Northam's weekly press conferences.
I refused to wear a mask and they built a plexiglass wall around my desk on the floor of the Senate. The following year, I would cosponsor legislation with Senators Dunnavant and Petersen to reopen our schools and pass legislation that respects parental rights, allowing parents not school officials to determine whether their child would wear a mask to school. Children belong to parents and families, not the government.
I'm running for re-election in Senate District 12 to represent most of Chesterfield and all of Colonial Heights. Today, I humbly ask for your support and your vote in the Republican Primary on Tuesday, June 20.
Thanks to redistricting, some of you will have the opportunity to vote for me for the first time and I look forward to earning your vote.
I'm super excited that I will now have the opportunity to represent Bon Air, where my husband and I grew up. I will also represent the Robious corridor, and much of North Chesterfield which is currently represented by Senator Hashmi, who defeated former state senator Glen Sturtevant in 2019. I look forward to earning your vote.
While many of you may have heard about me from the Fake Media over the past 8 years, please allow me the opportunity to tell you why I'm running and what makes me the best candidate to specifically represent Senate District 12.
For starters, I've spent almost my entire life living in Senate District 12. You're not just voters, you're my 8th grade government teacher, my neighbor growing up in Bon Air or my friends and neighbors. I care about you. To me, serving is a labor of love and serving others. So here's my story.
---
| About Senator Amanda Chase
---
|
---
| Senator Amanda Chase is not a politician. She's a mom who fights for everyone and has proven she can get things done for the people of Virginia! We can trust Amanda.
She's been married to Mike Chase her high school sweetheart for almost 31 years. She's a mother of her 4 now grown children and has served in the Virginia Senate for almost 8 years.
She will best represent the people of the new Senate District 12 because she has lived most of her life in the district and knows the people and history of the community.
Amanda and her husband Mike both grew up in Bon Air and were active members at Bon Air United Methodist Church. They grew up just blocks from each other in Bon Air, Virginia. They both attended Bon Air Elementary, Robious Middle School and graduated from Monacan High School. They met as teens working at the Chick Fil A at Cloverleaf Mall and spent summers at the Bon Air Community Association.
Six years later and after Amanda graduated from Virginia Tech, she married her high school sweetheart at Bon Air United Methodist Church, where both Mike's parents and his grandparents were married. They will celebrate 31 years of marriage this July 11.
Amanda graduated from Virginia Tech with a degree in Business, double majoring in Finance and Management in the top of her class. Her dream job was to work in management at the Federal Reserve Bank in Richmond, a dream she fulfilled in her early twenties. Amanda held various management positions in the banking and financial industry to include the Federal Reserve Bank, Signet Bankcard, First North American National Bank and the Virginia Student Assistance Authorities where she received an award in management for turning around a failing department. Amanda and her husband Mike have owned many successful businesses and currently have lawn and landscape business run by two of their grown sons Tim and Joe.
When their 4 children were young, Senator Chase homeschooled under religious exemption for 8 years. Later they transitioned to a private Christian school, and then public school for high school because the boys wanted to play varsity football for Manchester High School.
All are grown, successful independent children living on their own. Melanie is a Physicians Assistant at Wake Forest Medical Center, Joe and Tim run a thriving lawn care business and Daniel is finishing up at Liberty University with a degree in Financial Planning. School choice has been a priority for Senator Chase. She understands the importance of a good education free of politics and indoctrination of woke theologies.
Since being elected to the Virginia Senate in 2015, she has been a strong voice and a consistent reliable vote for our conservative values. Her voting record is impeccable receiving lifetime 100% ratings from the Family Foundation, the Virginia Citizens Defense League and A rating from the NRA.
We can trust Amanda. We know she's a proven conservative and has a solid 8 year voting record to back it up. During election season many politicians will say they are a conservative but there's only one running in Senate District 12 that's proven, and that's Senator Amanda Chase. Voting records matter.
---
|
---
|
---
| Senator Chase knows how to get things done. In the Senate, she was the chief patron and champion of legislation that was signed into law and is in effect today, like:

* the Red Tape Regulatory Reform legislation which reduces burdensome red tape for small businesses,
* the Healthcare Transparency Bill, which reduces the cost of healthcare by introducing competition created by allowing the consumer to know the estimated cost of services prior to services being performed,
* the historic coal ash clean up bill, which reduces known carcinogens in our streams and rivers and legislation that would allow our elected school boards, not big business, to determine when our students should return back to school.
* passed a bill that would allow our retired teachers to return to the classroom without losing benefits.
* Hoax Crime legislation to ensure pranksters can be held accountable for harassing victims and wasting precious limited resources paid for by taxpayer dollars.
* She authored and passed one of the largest tax cuts for veterans in Virginia's history, up to $40k.

Senator Chase also co-founded the Transparency Caucus
* which successfully secured online streaming and recording of committee meetings. Previously only floor votes were recorded.
* for 3 1/2 years she hosted a weekly live call-in townhall radio show called "Cut to the Chase with Senator Chase" on WNTW.

And that's just for starters.
---
| Senator Chase has also won many awards:

* 2016 Legislator of the Year Award, Treasurer's Association of VA
* 2016 Patriot's Award, Virginia Assembly of Independent Baptists
* 2017 James River Association River Hero Award
* 2017 Virginia Chamber of Commerce Distinguished Advocate for Business
* 100% Rating with the Family Foundation
* 100% Rating with the Virginia Citizens Defense League
* Highest score in the VA Senate by the Virginia Tea Party
* Conservative Achievement Award by the American Conservative Union, top 3 all 8 years
* Virginia Chamber of Commerce Ratings
* 2016 88 B+ 2020 85 B
* 2017 94 A 2021 90 A-
* 2018 88 B+ 2022 A
* 100% Rating with the National Federal of Independent Businesses

With this analysis, citizens can make informed decisions at the polls and be well prepared to lobby and work with elected officials. Covering a wide range of issues, this publication helps citizens hold representatives accountable--illustrating their worldview as it pertains to values issues.

clean_body: | | | | | | == | She was Born to Serve | | | | | Senator Chase has represented Chesterfield, Colonial Heights and Amelia Counties in the Senate since first elected in 2015, almost 8 years. Amanda and her husband Mike have been married over 30 years and have 4 grown children. Amanda and Mike both grew up in Bon Air and have lived most of their lives in Chesterfield County, since 1979. Amanda has been rated as one of the most conservative Senators in Virginia by the American Conservative Union and has a lifetime score of 100% with the Family Foundation, VCDL and A with the NRA. She is also a champion in the General Assembly for pushing back against vaccine and mask mandates, calling for a full investigation into the 2020 Presidential Election, parental rights in education, medical freedom, protecting innocent life, protecting gun rights and help for our veterans. | MESSAGE FROM SENATOR CHASE | | | | Dear Greetings! Who knew that when I left a career in management at the Federal Reserve Bank in Richmond to come home and raise our 4 kids that I would end up homeschooling for 8 years and coaching our neighborhood swim team? It was during that time that I rose to the occasion and joined my neighbors to save our sleepy little neighborhood. Who knew that that would end up jump starting my political involvement and a run for the Virginia State Senate years later? It was during that season that I was asked to help start the Bayhill Pointe Torpedoes neighborhood swim team and coach about 150 kids, many of whom couldn't swim. I welcomed the challenge. It was while I was coaching that a developer lobbied the Chesterfield Board of Supervisors to repurpose the main thoroughfare through our sleepy little neighborhood and turn it into a main cut through that was not conducive to kids safely riding their bikes to the pool for morning swim team practice. I joined our neighbors of all political persuasions for one purpose; to fight to protect the safety and quality of life of the kids in our community. The case went on for years but ultimately, we won. My desire to protect and defend my neighborhood launched my political activism to make sure we elected the right people who would protect the interests of real people and to protect their quality of life. Little did I know that this would turn into volunteering and working for many Republican candidates and eventually a run for the State Senate in 2015. In a competitive challenging 3 way Republican Primary that included a 27 year incumbent, I was not expected to win. But I did. Now you know the rest of the story. It's been such an honor to serve you in the Virginia Senate for the past 8 years representing Chesterfield, Colonial Heights and Amelia. I'm so thankful and humbled that you've entrusted me with the huge responsibility of representing you and being your voice. I've committed myself to representing real people, protecting their quality of life and ensuring that the district I represented would be a great place to live, work and raise a family. I look forward to continuing to be that voice as I seek re-election in Senate District 12, representing most of Chesterfield and Colonial Heights. As many of you know, I am no wall flower or shrinking violet. I made sure your voice was heard through the stealing of an election, through tyrannical Covid mandates and complete shutdowns of businesses, schools and life as we knew it. I was a leader during the Covid crisis advocating that we protect Constitutional rights even during a health crisis. When Governor Northam inconsistently applied the shutdowns, closing down churches and schools yet kept the ABC stores open, I led the effort to push back with Reopen Virginia Rallies at the Capitol. You could actually hear our honking horns during Governor Northam's weekly press conferences. I refused to wear a mask and they built a plexiglass wall around my desk on the floor of the Senate. The following year, I would cosponsor legislation with Senators Dunnavant and Petersen to reopen our schools and pass legislation that respects parental rights, allowing parents not school officials to determine whether their child would wear a mask to school. Children belong to parents and families, not the government. I'm running for re-election in Senate District 12 to represent most of Chesterfield and all of Colonial Heights. Today, I humbly ask for your support and your vote in the Republican Primary on Tuesday, June 20. Thanks to redistricting, some of you will have the opportunity to vote for me for the first time and I look forward to earning your vote. I'm super excited that I will now have the opportunity to represent Bon Air, where my husband and I grew up. I will also represent the Robious corridor, and much of North Chesterfield which is currently represented by Senator Hashmi, who defeated former state senator Glen Sturtevant in 2019. I look forward to earning your vote. While many of you may have heard about me from the Fake Media over the past 8 years, please allow me the opportunity to tell you why I'm running and what makes me the best candidate to specifically represent Senate District 12. For starters, I've spent almost my entire life living in Senate District 12. You're not just voters, you're my 8th grade government teacher, my neighbor growing up in Bon Air or my friends and neighbors. I care about you. To me, serving is a labor of love and serving others. So here's my story. | About Senator Amanda Chase | | Senator Amanda Chase is not a politician. She's a mom who fights for everyone and has proven she can get things done for the people of Virginia! We can trust Amanda. She's been married to Mike Chase her high school sweetheart for almost 31 years. She's a mother of her 4 now grown children and has served in the Virginia Senate for almost 8 years. She will best represent the people of the new Senate District 12 because she has lived most of her life in the district and knows the people and history of the community. Amanda and her husband Mike both grew up in Bon Air and were active members at Bon Air United Methodist Church. They grew up just blocks from each other in Bon Air, Virginia. They both attended Bon Air Elementary, Robious Middle School and graduated from Monacan High School. They met as teens working at the Chick Fil A at Cloverleaf Mall and spent summers at the Bon Air Community Association. Six years later and after Amanda graduated from Virginia Tech, she married her high school sweetheart at Bon Air United Methodist Church, where both Mike's parents and his grandparents were married. They will celebrate 31 years of marriage this July 11. Amanda graduated from Virginia Tech with a degree in Business, double majoring in Finance and Management in the top of her class. Her dream job was to work in management at the Federal Reserve Bank in Richmond, a dream she fulfilled in her early twenties. Amanda held various management positions in the banking and financial industry to include the Federal Reserve Bank, Signet Bankcard, First North American National Bank and the Virginia Student Assistance Authorities where she received an award in management for turning around a failing department. Amanda and her husband Mike have owned many successful businesses and currently have lawn and landscape business run by two of their grown sons Tim and Joe. When their 4 children were young, Senator Chase homeschooled under religious exemption for 8 years. Later they transitioned to a private Christian school, and then public school for high school because the boys wanted to play varsity football for Manchester High School. All are grown, successful independent children living on their own. Melanie is a Physicians Assistant at Wake Forest Medical Center, Joe and Tim run a thriving lawn care business and Daniel is finishing up at Liberty University with a degree in Financial Planning. School choice has been a priority for Senator Chase. She understands the importance of a good education free of politics and indoctrination of woke theologies. Since being elected to the Virginia Senate in 2015, she has been a strong voice and a consistent reliable vote for our conservative values. Her voting record is impeccable receiving lifetime 100% ratings from the Family Foundation, the Virginia Citizens Defense League and A rating from the NRA. We can trust Amanda. We know she's a proven conservative and has a solid 8 year voting record to back it up. During election season many politicians will say they are a conservative but there's only one running in Senate District 12 that's proven, and that's Senator Amanda Chase. Voting records matter. | | | Senator Chase knows how to get things done. In the Senate, she was the chief patron and champion of legislation that was signed into law and is in effect today, like: the Red Tape Regulatory Reform legislation which reduces burdensome red tape for small businesses, the Healthcare Transparency Bill, which reduces the cost of healthcare by introducing competition created by allowing the consumer to know the estimated cost of services prior to services being performed, the historic coal ash clean up bill, which reduces known carcinogens in our streams and rivers and legislation that would allow our elected school boards, not big business, to determine when our students should return back to school. passed a bill that would allow our retired teachers to return to the classroom without losing benefits. Hoax Crime legislation to ensure pranksters can be held accountable for harassing victims and wasting precious limited resources paid for by taxpayer dollars. She authored and passed one of the largest tax cuts for veterans in Virginia's history, up to $40k. Senator Chase also co-founded the Transparency Caucus which successfully secured online streaming and recording of committee meetings. Previously only floor votes were recorded. for 3 1/2 years she hosted a weekly live call-in townhall radio show called "Cut to the Chase with Senator Chase" on WNTW. And that's just for starters. | Senator Chase has also won many awards: 2016 Legislator of the Year Award, Treasurer's Association of VA 2016 Patriot's Award, Virginia Assembly of Independent Baptists 2017 James River Association River Hero Award 2017 Virginia Chamber of Commerce Distinguished Advocate for Business 100% Rating with the Family Foundation 100% Rating with the Virginia Citizens Defense League Highest score in the VA Senate by the Virginia Tea Party Conservative Achievement Award by the American Conservative Union, top 3 all 8 years Virginia Chamber of Commerce Ratings 2016 88 B+ 2020 85 B 2017 94 A 2021 90 A- 2018 88 B+ 2022 A * 100% Rating with the National Federal of Independent Businesses | American Conservative Union Chairman, Matt Schlapp, presents Senator Amanda Chase a Conservative Achievement Award in 2019 | | == | Congratulations to Senator Amanda Chase! 7th Year in a Row Conservative Achievement Award! CPAC's American Conservative Union Scorecards for 2022 are in! | My 8 Year Conservative Voting Record ON PRO-FAMILY ISSUES 100% pro-life | MY LEGISLATIVE VOTING RECORD | THE FAMILY FOUNDATION SCORECARD | The Family Foundation Action General Assembly Report Card is designed to disclose important legislator votes and present an opportunity for citizens to compare their state legislators' voting records. With this analysis, citizens can make informed decisions at the polls and be well prepared to lobby and work with elected officials. Covering a wide range of issues, this publication helps citizens hold representatives accountable--illustrating their worldview as it pertains to values issues. | CHASE 100% STURTEVANT 76% | 2018-2019 100% CHASE 76% STURTEVANT no record RAMIREZ | | | | == | CHASE 100% STURTEVANT N/A | 2020-2021 100% CHASE voted out STURTEVANT no record RAMIREZ | | | | == | | ENDORSEMENTS | Congressman Bob Good | | | "Amanda is an unapologetic conservative who isn't afraid to take on the tough issues that are most important to the people. She's a solid vote that conservatives can count on and a trusted ally of the people she represents. She's a champion and a leader on so many issues here in Virginia and nationally." -Rep. body:
the threat that everyone is talking about

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60645399/397788319/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDk1NmE0Mi0zN2NhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zMZmyKk605G4ciIoEM6XfYLzcyZxr_wyiUL-OryuhiE=&emci=fa78685f-03c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=ad956a42-37ca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, The threat that everyone is talking about today is TikTok – how it could enable unwanted surveillance by the Chinese Communist Party, how its data collection practices pose a national security threat, and how it has an uncanny ability to reach and manipulate Americans, and teenagers in particular. For years, we’ve lacked a comprehensive approach to identifying and addressing foreign tech threats. It’s not just TikTok I’m worried about. Before that, it was Chinese telecom companies like Huawei and ZTE that had the potential to embed foreign surveillance technology into our mobile phone networks. Now we’ve got a wildly popular social media app with big privacy problems that has a direct line to our kids. We need a proactive plan to deal with potentially dangerous technology before it becomes widespread in America. **That’s why last week I led a group of 12 bipartisan Senators to introduce the Restricting the Emergence of Security Threats that Risk Information and Communications Technology – the RESTRICT Act.** **[_If you agree that we need protection from our foreign adversaries tapping into our technology, sign my petition right now to show your support for the RESTRICT Act._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60645400/397788320/-1961609637?refcode=mw_em_230324_1&ms=mw_em_230324_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDk1NmE0Mi0zN2NhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zMZmyKk605G4ciIoEM6XfYLzcyZxr_wyiUL-OryuhiE=&emci=fa78685f-03c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=ad956a42-37ca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4568237)** I know this can all be quite complex, so let me explain: **What exactly is the RESTRICT Act?** The RESTRICT Act will create a process to identify and reduce foreign threats to information and communication technology products and services, allowing the government to ban those products if necessary. **How is the RESTRICT Act going to protect us?** The RESTRICT Act would:
* Make sure the federal government is evaluating the security risks posed by technology products that we use in everyday critical infrastructure.
* Require the government to investigate concerning activity identified by other government entities.
* Educate the public and business community about the threat of TikTok and other technology risks.

This bill has broad bipartisan buy-in and the support of the White House. If you support a systemic approach to safeguarding our national security against foreign tech threats, **[_add your name to pass the RESTRICT Act right now >> _](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60645401/397788321/-1961609637?refcode=mw_em_230324_1&ms=mw_em_230324_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDk1NmE0Mi0zN2NhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zMZmyKk605G4ciIoEM6XfYLzcyZxr_wyiUL-OryuhiE=&emci=fa78685f-03c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=ad956a42-37ca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4568237)** Thanks, Mark Warner **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60645402/397788322/-1961609637?refcode=mw_em_230324_1&ms=mw_em_230324_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDk1NmE0Mi0zN2NhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zMZmyKk605G4ciIoEM6XfYLzcyZxr_wyiUL-OryuhiE=&emci=fa78685f-03c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=ad956a42-37ca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4568237)**

clean_body: the threat that everyone is talking about | | | Derek, The threat that everyone is talking about today is TikTok – how it could enable unwanted surveillance by the Chinese Communist Party, how its data collection practices pose a national security threat, and how it has an uncanny ability to reach and manipulate Americans, and teenagers in particular. For years, we’ve lacked a comprehensive approach to identifying and addressing foreign tech threats. It’s not just TikTok I’m worried about. Before that, it was Chinese telecom companies like Huawei and ZTE that had the potential to embed foreign surveillance technology into our mobile phone networks. Now we’ve got a wildly popular social media app with big privacy problems that has a direct line to our kids. We need a proactive plan to deal with potentially dangerous technology before it becomes widespread in America. That’s why last week I led a group of 12 bipartisan Senators to introduce the Restricting the Emergence of Security Threats that Risk Information and Communications Technology – the RESTRICT Act. I know this can all be quite complex, so let me explain: What exactly is the RESTRICT Act? The RESTRICT Act will create a process to identify and reduce foreign threats to information and communication technology products and services, allowing the government to ban those products if necessary. How is the RESTRICT Act going to protect us? The RESTRICT Act would: Make sure the federal government is evaluating the security risks posed by technology products that we use in everyday critical infrastructure. Require the government to investigate concerning activity identified by other government entities. Educate the public and business community about the threat of TikTok and other technology risks. This bill has broad bipartisan buy-in and the support of the White House. If you support a systemic approach to safeguarding our national security against foreign tech threats, Thanks, Mark Warner | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Wisconsin has an election in less than two weeks for Supreme Court. This one race will determine if there's a progressive Democratic majority or insane MAGA Republican majority on The Court, which could decide abortion rights for millions, or maybe even the fate of the next presidential election. Your support is so important right now.
body:
10 days to the election
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T45adbaad-91d3-4470-857a-8806f433e7df/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **__UPDATE: _We've already written to you about the most important race this year--which may determine whether we remain a democracy. But a NEW EXPOSE on right wing nut, Dan Kelly, makes the danger all too clear._** _As a reminder, Wisconsin has an election in less than two weeks for Supreme Court,_ and this one race will determine if there's a progressive Democratic majority or insane MAGA Republican majority on The Court.__ _Progressive Janet Protasiewicz would join 3 liberal colleagues for a 4-3 Democratic majority. They'll overturn the cruel abortion ban that made millions of women state property and block Trump or DeSantis henchmen from stealing Wisconsin's electoral votes in 2024, as Trump attempted to do in 2020._ [**_Will you join Blue Amp in making the maximum effort to ensure we never know how dangerous Dan Kelly could be, by electing progressive champion Janet Protasiewicz April 4th by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td7d47c82-8697-4836-b46e-c1f077aeedf1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| **_It's hard to put into words the menace posed by abortion-hating, Trump-endorsed lunatic, Dan Kelly, if he wins. Yet, we don't have to, as it's made crystal clear in this explosive expose (see image below) by the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel on Kelly's moral sickness:_** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1b4e57bc-4bea-435e-a729-ce1a075974d1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **This degenerate, Kelly, is unfit to be local dog catcher, much less a man who decides whether Donald or DeSantis can steal an election. ** [**_Will you join Blue Amp in making the maximum effort to ensure we never know, by electing progressive champion Janet Protasiewicz April 4th by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T29fac8df-e239-499e-93fc-831b8504d67a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for stopping this evil in its tracks and saving our democracy._ Cliff

| | |

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8d86ba43-98cf-4a69-9898-55a6d16b8b37/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Team Rosen
subject: less than 30 seconds (signature missing)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
---
Friend, we're looking for another 19 people from your area to add their names in support of universal background checks on gun sales before midnight – **but yours is still missing.**
Sen. Rosen is fighting hard to close the dangerous loopholes that allow guns to fall into dangerous hands – and she needs grassroots supporters like you to join her.
**[So please, will you add your name now to stand with us in the fight to expand background checks and save lives from gun violence?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60662506/397849378/465636819?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk2424-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmFkZTRkZC01YWNhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uU-g9dWLexcNq-JZNuz4b_k96KmPkXBQIVTi4ftKEG8=&emci=e4618916-8bc9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9fade4dd-5aca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=3800590)**
Thanks for speaking out,

Team Rosen
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Sen. Jacky Rosen**
Date: Thu, Mar 23, 2023
Subject: Please, friend: Add your name to stand up for background checks >>
| | |
---
Friend – the surge in mass shootings we've seen nationwide has made one thing painfully clear: We must take immediate action toward ending our gun violence epidemic.
**That’s why I am fighting in the Senate to close loopholes and require background checks on unlicensed firearm sales, including those made online or at gun shows, keeping guns out of dangerous hands and saving lives. This is just common sense.**
Although more than 90% of Americans support comprehensive background checks, current federal law _does not_ require unlicensed sellers to conduct them before transferring a firearm. But I know we can change that.
Expanding background checks would be a critical step forward in combating the senseless gun violence that has devastated families and communities across Nevada and the country. This campaign is about fighting for what matters to Nevadans, and I want your input. **I believe we need meaningful progress on gun safety reform, but I want to know that you're with me, friend.**

**I'm looking for 10,000 supporters to stand up for universal background checks by midnight tonight – but time is running out, and I'm still missing your signature. This campaign is about listening to what you have to say. Your input is critical to our strategy. So please:**
**[Will you add your name right now to confirm your support for expanding background checks and saving lives from gun violence?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60662507/397849379/465636819?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk2424-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmFkZTRkZC01YWNhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uU-g9dWLexcNq-JZNuz4b_k96KmPkXBQIVTi4ftKEG8=&emci=e4618916-8bc9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9fade4dd-5aca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=3800590)**
| | [Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60662508/397849380/465636819?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk2424-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmFkZTRkZC01YWNhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uU-g9dWLexcNq-JZNuz4b_k96KmPkXBQIVTi4ftKEG8=&emci=e4618916-8bc9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9fade4dd-5aca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=3800590)

Cartels terrorize our communities and murder American Citizens - to include our Border Agents - with impunity. This is nothing short of an act of war on America waged by the thugs of the cartels committed to profiting off the deaths of our Citizens.

This is a national security threat, plain and simple. Department of Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas' refusal to treat it that way is a dereliction of duty.

He _**must**_ be impeached.

Please sign this petition to convince my fellow colleagues that the American People are FED UP with this lawlessness.
---
| [IMPEACH MAYORKAS](http://trk.readactnews. "IMPEACH MAYORKAS")
---
|
One of the first acts of this Republican Congress was to rein in the border. I proudly signed on as an original cosponsor for Articles of Impeachment to remove Secretary Mayorkas. I will not relinquish this fight, and I need your help.

[****](http://trk.readactnews._Ow)

Let's be clear here, Fellow Conservative. Mayorkas has been a**Joe Biden / George Soros lackey** for too long, targeting our Border Patrol Agents and encouraging waves of illegal migrants to surge the border.

He's insulted our men and women at the front lines of the border crisis, facilitated the largest drop in border agent recruitment, and has allowed "catch and release" to unleash cartel agents into our communities _without recourse._

Please stand with me to impeach Secretary Mayorkas. Help convince my colleagues in the House that the American People want our Country back, and that they want border security despite what the liberal media is selling.
---
| [IMPEACH MAYORKAS](http://trk.readactnews. "IMPEACH MAYORKAS")
---
|
Thanks,
Scott Perry

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Can I explain something, ?
Hey folks — James Carville here. Jon Tester just launched his reelection campaign and I can already tell this race is going to be NUTS!!
We already know the Senate majority will come down to Montana – and if we don’t keep Jon Tester in the Senate, Democrats can kiss their majority goodbye!
I have a reputation for calling it like it is. In my expert opinion, this is the most important election in the country. We don’t yet know who Jon’s opponent will be, but we have a few clues, and none of the options look good.
That’s why we need to do EVERYTHING we can to support Jon in this race right as this campaign is rolling!
When I called Jon to ask how I could help, he said they had a critical fundraising coming up in 7 days and he thought I might be able to convince you folks how important this is.
So listen up, folks: This election is going to be close. Right now, Jon’s team is $210,876 short of their goal! This early in the game, in a race as important as this one, this is not the time to be falling behind.
With just days left in this critical end-of-quarter deadline, I’m asking you to step up to the plate and chip in a split donation between Seth Moulton and Jon’s campaign. Our Senate majority depends on your support: [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Thanks, y’all. Let’s do this thing!
— James Carville

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: President Trump will see your name
body:
| |
---
| | | What these Liberals are doing to President Donald Trump makes me mad as a hornet.

And according to the latest reports, he could be INDICTED AT ANY MOMENT.

_It 's a national disgrace!_

_**[Now we have a choice to make: we can either get mad and stew... or we can do something about it. I'm searching high and low for more patriotic conservatives to help defend President Trump.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62477655:JgXzEZGNd:m:1:3391001263:3C67E463FB6D7E9B55E97C8DF55D2E60:r "Now we have a choice to make: we can either get mad and stew... or we can do something
about it. I’m searching high and low for more patriotic conservatives to help defend President Trump.")**_
---
| | [HELP DEFEND PRESIDENT TRUMP](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62477655:JgXzEZGNd:m:1:3391001263:3C67E463FB6D7E9B55E97C8DF55D2E60:r "HELP DEFEND
PRESIDENT TRUMP")
---
**These Liberals want President Trump arrested, handcuffed, and perp-walked for maximum public humiliation. I 'm not about to let this happen - and I'm giving you the opportunity to fight back too.**

This is what I'm willing to offer you:

If you agree to help BEFORE President Trump is arrested, I'll make sure your name is sent directly to him. The President will be able to see your name as one of the patriotic conservatives who supported him when he needed it the most.

_How does that sound? _

These Liberals think they can pull a political STUNT like this without any consequences. They're dead wrong. Now, we need your help before it's too late.

Please remember this... You have the chance to do the right thing during one of the most perilous times in our history. President Trump needs us to speak out - for his sake, and for the sake of our country.

_**[If you take this chance, I'll see to it that the President has DIRECT ACCESS to see your name.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62477655:JgXzEZGNd:m:1:3391001263:3C67E463FB6D7E9B55E97C8DF55D2E60:r "If you take this chance, I’ll see to it that the President has DIRECT ACCESS to see your
name.")**_

Thank you,

Marsha Blackburn

DEFEND PRESIDENT TRUMP")

_A Note For You, from Marsha Blackburn: _

Protecting our Conservative values from the Left is not an easy task. With a radical agenda focused on rising inflation, opening our borders, and censoring free speech, it has never been more important to defeat the radical Left.

That's why your continued support is so appreciated. Your help has never been needed more, so **[please, click here to support my efforts if you can.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62477656:JgXzEZGNd:m:1:3391001263:3C67E463FB6D7E9B55E97C8DF55D2E60:r "please, click

Thank you for being a dedicated supporter,

Marsha Blackburn

name: Dudley Brown
subject: Biden demands gun registration
body:
I have urgent news.

---
| | | | | | |
---
|

Dear Fellow Patriot,

I have urgent news.

_President Biden is using executive action to do what he has failed to do for decades ... Force Universal Gun Registration on Americans_.

We don't have a lot of time to act.

**[So before you read on, would you please make a generous donation to help the National Association for Gun Rights fight back against Biden's gun grab](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbqt5qc7o4kkidkrbfafi53s702ra6koa8cg86oo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdjmaob2c1h2bs)?**

Here's the scoop, Fellow Patriot.

Biden is using last year's gun control package as grounds to demand Universal Gun Registration for every gun sale in America.

That's right, President Biden is exploiting the great Republican surrender of 2022 to force a ban on all private firearms sales and register every gun with the NICS database.

It's H.R. 8 and Toomey-Manchin, all wrapped up in one executive order.

And Biden is doing it without any act of Congress.

Of course, this new policy would only affect law-abiding gun owners, but that bit of logic has never stopped the gun grabbers before.

Fellow Patriot, you can rest assured that NAGR will not stand for this assault on YOUR Second Amendment rights.

We have defeated Biden's gun control agenda before, and we will do it again.

_In 2013, when the Obama-Biden administration tried to force Universal Gun Registration through Congress, NAGR was there to rally the pro-gun grassroots in opposition_.

Which is precisely why Biden is resorting to executive action this time around.

He thinks he can sidestep the pro-gun grassroots if he bypasses Congress all together.

Well, Fellow Patriot, Biden is terribly mistaken.

The gloves are off.

But it is only through the generous support of everyday gun owners that we are able to mobilize against the gun grabbers.

**[So please consider making your most generous donation to the National Association for Gun Rights today](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6rft7dneh90faf35iv7aau9nt1hra1jsmf2a9o8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdjmaob2c1h2bs)**.

Let me be clear, Fellow Patriot, any politician who sits idly by while the President tries to rip up our Constitution needs to be held accountable.

That's why it's vital pro-gun supporters like you send the politicians that message.

When we flood the D.C. swamp with hundreds of thousands of petitions, phone calls, and emails from angry voters, the political class will have no choice but to hear our voice.

Of course, taking on the President of the United States isn't cheap.

And while NAGR is prepared to dip into our emergency war chest, we are still going to need a massive influx of funds to make sure no stone goes unturned against Biden's executive orders.

**[So, Fellow Patriot, please consider rushing us your most generous contribution today](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpumhe5msjul74o608utjk355q7gnll356n1p9p8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdjmaob2c1h2bs)**.

Whether it's a contribution of **[$150, $100](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zq0t26m0d5pm9lr07jpjro0vh1irvqr7e0kap7n0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdjmaob2c1h2bs)** , or **[$75](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zt81mh349vo58dtqvc9aneoko7ma3nlhe0uvb4u0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdjmaob2c1h2bs)** , you can rest assured that your donation will be used to combat the assault on the Constitution.

Even chipping in **[$15](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2etpnhcr68f750742ls7i9b8i54kodnd3ksfn60_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdjmaob2c1h2bs)** or **[$30](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7icn4mvognolo4hr3m40dn4hcekin4or45f2o6g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdjmaob2c1h2bs)** will help us prepare for what Biden is throwing at us.

Thanks in advance for your support, and I'll keep you updated as things progress.

**For Freedom,

Dudley Brown

National Association for Gun Rights**

Please tell us now: Are you worried about another potential Trump presidency? | | | | | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

| | Peter,

Did you see this?

[****](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)

That's a breathtaking headline.

It's just another day, however, on Joe Biden's illegal open border.

The American People have suffered long enough. The #1 cause of youth death in America is drug overdoses linked to - you guessed it - the poison flowing daily across our border.

Cartels terrorize our communities and murder American Citizens - to include our Border Agents - with impunity. This is nothing short of an act of war on America waged by the thugs of the cartels committed to profiting off the deaths of our Citizens.

This is a national security threat, plain and simple. Department of Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas' refusal to treat it that way is a dereliction of duty.

He _**must**_ be impeached.

Please sign this petition to convince my fellow colleagues that the American People are FED UP with this lawlessness.
---
| [IMPEACH MAYORKAS](http://trk.freedomfirstproject. "IMPEACH MAYORKAS")
---
|
One of the first acts of this Republican Congress was to rein in the border. I proudly signed on as an original cosponsor for Articles of Impeachment to remove Secretary Mayorkas. I will not relinquish this fight, and I need your help.

[****](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)

Let's be clear here, Peter. Mayorkas has been a**Joe Biden / George Soros lackey** for too long, targeting our Border Patrol Agents and encouraging waves of illegal migrants to surge the border.

He's insulted our men and women at the front lines of the border crisis, facilitated the largest drop in border agent recruitment, and has allowed "catch and release" to unleash cartel agents into our communities _without recourse._

Please stand with me to impeach Secretary Mayorkas. Help convince my colleagues in the House that the American People want our Country back, and that they want border security despite what the liberal media is selling.

Scott Perry

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Our very first FEC deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18916?t=1001&akid=3087%2E346206%2E258Lie ][IMG]

Peter —

I launched my campaign to replace Josh Hawley on January 6th because we
can’t afford to send another fraud or coward to represent Missouri in the
U.S. Senate.

As a 13-year Marine veteran, I know what it means to serve my country. And
as a Missourian who watched my own community be stripped for parts by
massive corporations and corrupt elites like Hawley, I’m ready to fight
back.

Our campaign is on a mission to give power back to everyday, working
people — and we’re building it the right way, with no money from corporate
PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Oil + Big Pharma executives. That’s why I
need your help today:

Our very first FEC deadline is just around the corner and it’s absolutely
critical that we stay on track.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18916?t=1002&akid=3087%2E346206%2E258Lie ]So Peter, will you split a donation of $20 or whatever you
think is best between my campaign and Charles Booker right now? If we keep
up our momentum early on in this race, we really can defeat Josh Hawley
and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat next year.

Missourians have spent the last three election cycles taking back their
power at the ballot box by rejecting anti-union “Right-to-Work” laws,
raising the minimum wage, expanding healthcare, and legalizing weed.

Next year, we’re going to make it four by defeating Josh Hawley and
electing a real warrior for working people to Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.

Thanks for being part of it,

— Lucas Kunce

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee Massachusetts Democratic Party
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60647723/397795622/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDMwYmFkMi00M2NhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w_Cc3trBsbaiBdavSqkDMO7NDdSCPYt8emPIYkGhOU8=&emci=759394c7-e1c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=2430bad2-43ca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=17281370)
---
| | Peter, Get excited, because in less than two weeks the highly anticipated Chinatown Banquet will be a night to remember! In 2018, we made history for the Massachusetts Democratic Party by giving fresh energy to a proud tradition. For nearly two decades in the 1970s and '80s, Boston's Chinatown was an essential stop on the statewide and national political circuit, bringing people together to build friendship and fellowship over a banquet meal in Chinatown. Over the past few years, we’ve rebooted this tradition with the help of attendees from across the state to raise funds, to bring new people into the political process, and to support our coordinated campaign efforts up and down the ballot. I am excited to be co-charing this event again with my dear friend Chairman Aaron Michlewitz and to announce our special guests for the evening **Gov. Maura Healey and Lt. Gov. Kim Driscoll**! Join us on **Tuesday, April 4, 2023, at the Empire Garden Restaurant (690 Washington Street, Boston, MA) at 6 PM**. Get ready to indulge in some of the best cuisine the city has to offer with signature drinks, while enjoying a celebration unlike any other.
I would be honored if you’d join us in supporting this incredible effort. In the past, this event has been a sold-out affair – [**click here**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60647730/397795630/640743309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDMwYmFkMi00M2NhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w_Cc3trBsbaiBdavSqkDMO7NDdSCPYt8emPIYkGhOU8=)**** to get your tickets, sponsorships, or table before they sell out!

name: Mike Peppel
subject: President Biden and his incompetent Administration could not care less about...
body:
| | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62477012:6-cGoZGMN:m:1:3331421248:74F7C26F631C5942DE3D15CC20EB494D:r)
---
|
---
Peter, the news crews have left, and now it seems like the country has forgotten about the disaster my neighbors and I in Northeast Ohio lived through just over a month ago. Well, we're still living through it.
Just recently, a containment dam set up to mitigate the impact on the local water supply overflowed and once again spread toxic chemicals. We just can't catch a break.
| [ **SEND HELP** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62477012:6-cGoZGMN:m:1:3331421248:74F7C26F631C5942DE3D15CC20EB494D:r)
---
I'm Mike Peppel, a Columbiana County resident (right near East Palestine), who is taking action to help my friends and neighbors in need. I founded the Ohio Clean Water Project to provide direct aid to the impacted communities.
Right now I'm focused on providing as much clean drinking water as I can to families in need, which is why I'm emailing you today. If you can help out, please click the button below and send a case of water to a family in need.
| [ **SEND A CASE OF WATER** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62477012:6-cGoZGMN:m:1:3331421248:74F7C26F631C5942DE3D15CC20EB494D:r)
---
President Biden and his incompetent Administration could not care less about the people in rural Ohio, and that's why their response has been so lackluster.
That's why I'm asking for your help, because when our government fails us, Americans have a history of helping each other, and we are in need of your help.
[**If you're able, please send a donation and I'll do the rest in getting clean drinking water to the folks in East Palestine.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62477012:6-cGoZGMN:m:1:3331421248:74F7C26F631C5942DE3D15CC20EB494D:r)
Thank you,
Mike Peppel Founder, Ohio Clean Water Fund
