name: Team Freedom Virginia
subject: So happy to have you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc
body:
Take your first action as a part of our team and join our fight for lowering medicine costs by signing our petition.

| Welcome Peter!

We’re so excited that you’ve joined our fight for a Commonwealth where all Virginians have the freedom and opportunity to thrive. Freedom Virginia is committed to making sure that you have access to good-paying jobs, affordable healthcare, and an excellent education.

Take your first action as a part of our team and [_**join our fight for lowering medicine costs by signing our petition.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60650014/397802975/1328713157?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS84NTU2NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODVlNzg5Yi00NWNhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fzQnU0qkqsqd-UR4NAplwYSRfmhqO8JqP-KfXAvJFpA=&emci=7ff8e524-e4c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=b85e789b-45ca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=6782597) 1 in 4 Virginians who depend on prescription medicine are not able to afford it due to its skyrocketing costs. **We’re in this fight for them.**
---
| [SIGN THE PETITON ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60650015/397802976/1328713157?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS84NTU2NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODVlNzg5Yi00NWNhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fzQnU0qkqsqd-UR4NAplwYSRfmhqO8JqP-KfXAvJFpA=&emci=7ff8e524-e4c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=b85e789b-45ca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=6782597)
---
Freedom Virginia also advocates for:

**😷****Paid Sick Days** —More than 1.2 million Virginians do not have earned paid sick days. We believe every Virginian deserves to take sick days without risking their paycheck.

**🏥 ****Affordable Healthcare** —Insurance premiums across Virginia have increased 130% in just six years. Our team is fighting to lower the cost of healthcare and prescription drugs.

**💵 ****Economic Security** —Everyday Virginians are struggling to make ends meet due to inflation, high utility costs, high grocery costs, and high cost of living. Our team is advocating to make Virginia affordable.

In 2023, our team is committed to fighting for a more equitable economy across Virginia. With you in this fight, I know that we can accomplish that goal.

Onwards,
Team Freedom Virginia

name: Vernon Robinson
subject: GOP cannot afford all white campaigns
body:
|
Peter \-- While the country's demographics have steadily reduced the percenage of white voters, GOP candidates continue to run campaigns as if it was 1984 and the electorate is 71% white. Last week, I sent you an email that pointed out that with the noted exception of President Trump the GOP has failed to ask black voters for their votes for 60 years. Only Amazon can sell things without asking for the order. Everyone else has to ask for the business to make a sale. Our hard hitting ads on urban contemporary radio have won close races time and again becuase Democrats are dependent on a heavy black turnout and 90+ percent of the black vote to win. Our ads place Democrats in a pickle. If they ignore conservative ads on urban contemporary radio, they risk a lower black turnout and falling below 90%. If they debate issues like their support for killing 20 million black babies by abortion or supporting the teachers union over parents, they lose black support as well. Conservative issue or candidate ads limit the ability of Democrats to run the terrorist ads they want to run and can do so if no conservative ads are up. Ads like, Vote Democratic or another black church will be _**bombed.**_ The problem with me running issue ads is that my PAC and any other PAC has to pay issue ad rates which are twice to five times higher than the lowest unit rate that candidates get. If we could get the candidates to advertise on urban contemporary radio, the campaign can buy many more ads for the same money as a PAC spends. But on the rare occasion that a conservative group does ask minority voters for their votes, sometimes they make unforced errors that weaken the campaign. For example, one campaign was going to use zero ethnic scale voice talent for the ad voice over. These are not TV ads. You have to be able to recognize that these are black people by listening to them. In another case, a PAC ran a campaign to reach Korean voters on Korean language media. However, they chose the wrong issue. They chose school choice. School choice is very popular with some minorities, but it is not particularly effective with Asian American voters. Their overriding issue is stopping the woke admissions staff at almost every college in this country from systematically discriminating against their kids in terms of undergraduate and graduate adimissions. So this year I need your help to beat GOP candidates into submission as far as using urban contemporary radio goes to reach black voters 35 years old and older ie. black voters who actually vote. When candidates for Congress or statewide, the party or allied groups like Life and Guns ask for your donation, I want you to ask them the following questions: 1\. What is your budget to reach Black, Hispanic and Asian voters? 2\. What is their budget for urban contemporary radio? How many urban contemporary radio stations are in their district or statewide? What ethnic scale do you use for the voice over on your urban radio ads? 3\. What is your budget to go door to door to reach minority voters? 4\. What is your budget for digital ads to reach minority voters? 5\. What is your budget for Univsion and Telemundo to reach Hispanic voters? 6\. How do you plan to reach Asian voters? 7\. What issues are you bringing to minority voters through these media channels? 8\. If they are not doing these things, ask them if they plan to run a 1984 campaign as if the electorate was still white in 2024 and 2028 Here is your cheat sheet. Ethnic scale is how recognizable is the radio voice talent as black. For instance, I am an ethnic scale of zero and would not be the right choice for a radio ad. Lots of campaign and party people say they have an effort to engage minority voters but when you press them money budget for radio and digital and their volunteer hour budget for minority contact door-to-door, they don't have a budget. That is not engagement. If the percentage of white voters had not dropped in most of the country, it would be funny. Urban contemporary radio is most effective at reaching black voters. Telemundo and Univision TV ads are the most effective with Hispanic voters. It costs this PAC 2x to 5x more than the lowest unit rate candidates get to buy radio ads. If the candidates would do it, you would get more bang for your bucks. Regrettably, the candidates won't do it unless you force them to do so. If the candidates have questions, have them call me at 336 577-2711. Target your efforts toward Statewide and congressional candidates. They have to money to buy this radio time We could not do any of this without your past support. And we can't move forward without your support. | [](https://www.blackamericansmaga.org/donate?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ask_candidate&n=1 "Please donate Today") [Please donate Today](https://www.blackamericansmaga.org/donate?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ask_candidate&n=1)
---
`Remember you can give an unlimited amount as either an American citizen or corporation.`
Thank you for stepping up before and thank you in advance for helping do the hard work of freedom with your donation today.
Vernon Robinson, Co-Founder Black Americans Making America First (formally known as Black Americans to re-elect the President)
[](https://www.blackamericansmaga.org/donate?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ask_candidate&n=2 "Please donate Now") [Please donate Now](https://www.blackamericansmaga.org/donate?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ask_candidate&n=2)
---

[](http://www.blackamericansmaga.org/?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ask_candidate&n=3)[](http://www.blackamericansmaga.org/?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ask_candidate&n=4)[](http://www.blackamericansmaga.org/?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ask_candidate&n=5)[](http://www.blackamericansmaga.org/?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ask_candidate&n=6)[](http://www.blackamericansmaga.org/?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ask_candidate&n=7)[](http://www.blackamericansmaga.org/?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ask_candidate&n=8)[](http://www.blackamericansmaga.org/?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ask_candidate&n=9)[](http://www.blackamericansmaga.org/?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ask_candidate&n=10)[](http://www.blackamericansmaga.org/?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ask_candidate&n=11)[](http://www.blackamericansmaga.org/?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ask_candidate&n=12)[](http://www.blackamericansmaga.org/?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ask_candidate&n=13)[](http://www.blackamericansmaga.org/?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ask_candidate&n=14)[](http://www.blackamericansmaga.org/?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ask_candidate&n=15)[](http://www.blackamericansmaga.org/?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ask_candidate&n=16)[](http://www.blackamericansmaga.org/?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ask_candidate&n=17)[](http://www.blackamericansmaga.org/?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ask_candidate&n=18)[](http://www.blackamericansmaga.org/?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ask_candidate&n=19)[](http://www.blackamericansmaga.org/?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ask_candidate&n=20)[](http://www.blackamericansmaga.org/?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ask_candidate&n=21)[http://www.blackamericansmaga.org/](http://www.blackamericansmaga.org/?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ask_candidate&n=22)

You can also keep up with Info on [Twitter](https://www.blackamericansmaga.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNDpPQRhqGoZSeHX-iakFGkQ&e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ask_candidate&n=24) or [Facebook](https://www.blackamericansmaga.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6kEGnkq42GV-WhR7AOlkvj59YzS2j4d7aoid2-MEtq0n&e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ask_candidate&n=25). -=-=-

subject: Asking for your thoughts, Derek

body:
Derek, Governor Josh Shapiro just released his budget plan for Pennsylvania, and it’s full of bold proposals that’ll open up the doors of opportunity for millions of people in our Commonwealth!

Derek, Governor Josh Shapiro just released his budget plan for Pennsylvania, and it’s full of bold proposals that’ll open up the doors of opportunity for millions of people in our Commonwealth!

Universal breakfast in public schools. Raising the minimum wage. Protections for workers. All of this and more can be a reality, if we work together.

**That’s why we want to hear from you. Will you take our quick survey and let us know what’s most important to you as we work to keep Pennsylvania moving forward?** | | [Take the survey →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60667727/397870115/534864204?refcode=email_032423_budget-survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGEwOTQwMy02OGNhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ppVW7QkMcDFvJ4E6ONY-2NqKpr8GtChQmCJ9nICVD4U=&emci=1db99fc2-5aca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=c0a09403-68ca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=21962291)

When Josh Shapiro was sworn in as Governor, his goal was clear: put partisan differences aside to do what’s right for Pennsylvania.

That’s exactly what his budget is all about. No matter if you live in one of our big cities or a rural community, you should be able to get a good education, make a living wage and pursue your dreams.

**And as we get to work on putting our plans into action, we want to hear from you. Take our quick survey on Josh Shapiro’s new budget plan and let us know what is most important to you:

[https://action.joshshapiro.org/a/2023-budget-survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60667728/397870120/534864204?refcode=email_032423_budget-survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGEwOTQwMy02OGNhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ppVW7QkMcDFvJ4E6ONY-2NqKpr8GtChQmCJ9nICVD4U=&emci=1db99fc2-5aca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=c0a09403-68ca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=21962291)**

name: Fair Courts America
subject: Hillary Clinton is trying to fix her greatest mistake…
body:
| | | Peter, _She's baaaaaaaaaack!_ **Hillary Clinton is back on the scene, and it may surprise you what her top priority is:**_[**the Wisconsin State Supreme Court race**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62477666:JYF_oZGN7:m:1:3391001263:7FF801347D36FF8B7C7C5FBE6FBEE4A2:r)_**.** She's raising money for radical progressive judicial candidate Janet Protasiewicz. And it makes sense -- just like Hillary, she's a far-left, pro-abortion progressive.
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62477666:JYF_oZGN7:m:1:3391001263:7FF801347D36FF8B7C7C5FBE6FBEE4A2:r)
---
But plenty of state-level races have progressive candidates...why is Hillary so invested in this one? **Because there's one thing Hillary knows after her bitter loss to President Donald Trump in 2016:****Wisconsin is KEY to any national Democrat victory****.** She learned the hard way that Wisconsin NEEDS to be a part of "the blue wall" for any Democrat candidate. When the Left loses Wisconsin, they lose the White House.
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62477666:JYF_oZGN7:m:1:3391001263:7FF801347D36FF8B7C7C5FBE6FBEE4A2:r)
---
It's why the Left is so passionate about capturing Wisconsin's state supreme court--to make sure a loss in this purple state never happens again. _Because if the Left controls the highest court..._
* A progressive majority can rule against any laws combatting voter fraud
* A progressive majority can change the rules about how the state conducts elections
* And a progressive majority can rule on any legal challenges to the vote totals.

Hillary's preferred judicial candidate, Janet Protasiewicz, is already on record blasting "rigged" congressional maps and promising to "take a fresh look" at them if elected. **Translation: She won't believe Wisconsin elections are fair until they are rigged in favor of Democrats.**
---
[**DON 'T LET THE LEFT STEAL WISCONSIN**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62477666:JYF_oZGN7:m:1:3391001263:7FF801347D36FF8B7C7C5FBE6FBEE4A2:r)
---
Let's be clear: If Democrats control their state supreme court, Wisconsin will go from swing state to solidly blue..._even if they have to bus in voters from Chicago._ **_[We have to stop Hillary's revenge and make sure that Wisconsin's elections don't fall into the clutches of progressive judicial activists.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62477666:JYF_oZGN7:m:1:3391001263:7FF801347D36FF8B7C7C5FBE6FBEE4A2:r)_** Our organization is fighting tooth and nail to elect solid conservative Justice Daniel Kelly back to the Wisconsin Supreme Court. But we only have a few weeks left to go...and now that Hillary's directed her MASSIVE political operation to aid radical Janet Protasiewicz, we need every conservative to pitch in so we fight back. **_Can we count on you?_**
---
[DONATE NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62477666:JYF_oZGN7:m:1:3391001263:7FF801347D36FF8B7C7C5FBE6FBEE4A2:r)
---
In Justice, Fair Courts America
---

It’s Michael Haley, Nikki’s husband. I want to take a brief moment to share our family with you! If anyone can attest to Nikki’s character and determination – it’s me. We met early on in college and I’ve been with Nikki through it all – from our college days, to starting a family, our business careers, to her time as a state legislator, governor, and UN ambassador. She has a unique combination of grit and grace! Throughout her legislative, governor, and ambassadorship she has taken every challenge on with fervor and compassion, all the while keeping the end goal in mind. This has served her very well in each of her roles and what separates her from all others. Her determination to stand for freedom and her heart for others never ceases to amaze me. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=0d250a6a4c6fe3e26b054f19cba6b2b01ad370fa7c6a7c523bb1dc0b6788e63171a05d886298aca32b8f154effe3c6fda81c5db393c9ff1ac42895f29628189a Family is very important to us. Nikki is an amazing wife, mother, daughter, and friend. We have two fantastic kids. Our son, Nalin, is studying…what else, political science at college. He has been with his mom on the campaign trail since the age of 3! And our daughter, Rena, is a pediatric registered nurse and is getting married in the spring to her college sweetheart. He is a 5th grade elementary ed teacher and football coach. While they don’t have any kids yet themselves, they sure do have a ton of kids around them! Of course, as you can tell from the picture Bentley and Rio keep us entertained as well! I’m looking forward to sharing more tidbits about the Haley family and more about myself. But today I wanted to be able to share with you how dedicated Nikki is to fighting for America! I know she is going to make an incredible president, and I am so proud to be standing with her! body:

### Dear Peter,

As a candidate for the Suffolk County Legislature, I vow to make protecting our community from the deadly scourge of fentanyl-laced drugs a top priority. The fight against drugs and addiction is a multifaceted battle.

We must not only work to prosecute drug dealers and intercept the influx of drugs into our communities, but also provide meaningful support and treatment options for those struggling with addiction. As a society, we cannot turn a blind eye to this crisis and leave our most vulnerable citizens to suffer in silence.

Join me in this fight and read my latest op-ed in The Messenger Papers. Together, we can make a difference and save lives.

[Link to My Latest Op-ed](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eYS6_9zP-vVh8JKhzq2TN3MKhysbb8VVye_cI9ijPzVXnmIleCkZBlRC7vwRtz4VjZEaO0wa9IReWrHMl5PfXeRMKPlh9llI33-FgfFLU07xyZpGkWsaJ5XiAAMSFEhLBTwg-4Av8NPXSlHzn4rhHL_yyHphJ8Bx46NKVUt-nKsMBqj4RkBF0DtDSWvWCRNRkrZ9CCeH-mZrwZfN2JYnyQ==&c=01MX37zoxEyCqvbuQ8DzQ8F0KdnPgnBxJd84IT4_zPA6xE_03NgG1A==&ch=OPu9eeMy-omZTwNKc-B2ZPODuZ6A2raXTbLN_LcribHpbYD_w4lH9Q==)

name: Allen West
subject: Shall NOT be infringed
body:
Are you a Citizen? Or a Subject?

| |
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653030%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CQxeIDx626ccEVAmWS%2bPmw&sysid=1)
---
| | Are you a Citizen? Or a Subject? It's time to decide. Because there is a well-funded, well-organized and growing movement to take away the single most important Constitutional Freedom that keeps us free ... The Constitutional Right keeps the wolves at your door and the tyrants in our government at bay ... It's your Right to KEEP AND BEAR ARMS -- and it's the one you're in imminent danger of losing if we, the people, don't stand up to protect it. [**Will you take a stand for your Second Amendment Rights today?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653031%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lUvCb03JCv%2bo6C2SbaWTww&sysid=1) My friend, there's reason I was issued a rifle when I joined the Army ... It's because when all else fails, a firearm is ultimately what determines who's in charge. I know it... You know it ... **That's why Joe Biden and his friends on the Radical Left want you dis-armed.** They'd much rather RULE over SUBJECTS than ANSWER to CITIZENS! There are a lot of groups out there “pledging” to protect your Second Amendment Rights. You've probably got a drawer full of their folding knives ... A few of their duffle bags ... Maybe even a vest or a membership card in your wallet. BUT HERE'S THE THING ... After 50 years of sending out membership renewal notices, pocketknives, and plastic cards, why are your 2nd Amendment Rights in more danger of being taken away from you than they have ever been? But that's where you'll find the Second Amendment Institute. The Second Amendment Institute is a brand-new kind of Amendment advocacy group. A group more concerned with action than image ... [**Will you join the growing membership of the Second Amendment Institute through a donation of $35 today?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653032%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gB9VWTaaud%2fY4FT2YBQLrg&sysid=1) Your much-needed support will help us run into the fight with a multi-pronged attack -- just like our enemies have launched against us:
---
* Legal Battles to protect your 2nd Amendment Rights ... * Our one-of-a-kind Outreach to young people on college campuses * Our Partnership with pro-2nd Amendment Legislators * Our National Conferences and Online Community
---
You don't have to come to one of our conferences, testify in a courtroom or march in the street to get involved with what we're doing here at SAI. That's why our membership and online community has now surpassed the 4.2 MILLION mark!! But one name is missing from that list of over 4.2 million -YOURS!! [**Can you spare $35 to join the Second Amendment Institute and save your Second Amendment Right to bear arms today?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653033%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AHzW%2bLFRz%2fwPug%2fKz%2bQ2aQ&sysid=1) If you can't, maybe you contribute $20. Maybe you can make up for someone who can't afford a $35 or even $20 gift today by blessing them and us with a major gift of $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more. If this seems like a strange way to ask for your support today, you're right -- I told you that SAI is different! But different is good -- it's going to get the job done -- it's going to save your Right to Keep and Bear Arms. Now let's get to work together. God bless you and God Bless America,
---
---
Lieutenant Colonel Allen B. West (US Army, Ret) Member, 112th US Congress
---
P.S. Here's something else that's different about The Second Amendment Institute -- you get to choose your membership cost. That's right -- you read that correctly. Tyler Yzaguirre, the President of SAI, has shared with me that if [**everyone I write to today could spare a gift of $35, that should just about cover what they have planned in the months ahead, and even allow them to grow their outreach efforts**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653034%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=R8mmRU37oMP5k5M2Gu64yg&sysid=1)
---
[**DONATE NOW**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653045%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nyu8mBuiSsIC4FeHdS74qA&sysid=1)
---
| |

---
|
---

American Update

Here’s why I’m asking for your support today: | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60652615/397812452/-820256091?refcode=EM_FR_230324FR_N_MK_90DA_5_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmYyNjNhOC00OGNhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K6rp9HA_ewbJ8b-6ZPXjehffFoaVZjXSwFm1r5Xpyv4=)

As I’m talking to supporters like you, I hear it all the time: “Why have you started fundraising so early for the 2024 election?”

Well here’s what I’ll tell you about this race:
1. Kevin McCarthy and his allies are ALREADY targeting this district because they know it’s considered a “toss-up” race. They’re going to throw everything they have at us – including a portion of their $2 million ad buy that is already on the airwaves.
2. Winning in races like OH-09 requires significant resources and investments. We can’t fall short on any of our goals – even the ones this early – because we can’t afford to be set back at any point of this must-win campaign.

We were able to outperform all expectations in 2022 because of early support from people like you. We were able to be prepared for any attack that came our way and run a strong campaign from day one.

**[So, I’m asking before my FEC end-of-quarter deadline next week, can I count on you to pitch in whatever you can to help us build a competitive campaign in 2024? name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Please give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Here is the truth: one week from today we close the books on our first, full FEC fundraising deadline of the campaign.
#

Peter -
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make today the day you contribute your first online donation to our campaign. I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.
Here is the truth: one week from today we close the books on our first, full FEC fundraising deadline of the campaign.
Shortly after, we’re legally required to report publicly how much money we’ve raised and how many contributions our campaign has received.
And right now, we’re a bit short of where we need to be to hit our goals. That’s important, because reports indicate Senator Sinema is ramping up her fundraising.
Now, we raise our money differently than Senator Sinema. I don’t go around begging hedge fund managers for money.
Instead, almost all of our donations come from people chipping in what they can afford, mostly in response to emails like this one. I’m very proud of that fact.
But it also means from time to time, we have to ask and with our deadline just a week away today is one of those days.
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to our campaign ahead of our critical FEC fundraising deadline? Help us close the gap so we don’t come up short.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-mar23.PJzORo&refcode=em230324-1-30&t=1&akid=485%2E734936%2EBTz42_)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

---

| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-mar23.qy39g3&refcode=em230324-1-30&t=22&akid=485%2E734936%2EBTz42_)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-mar23.-bJScx&refcode=em230324-1-30&t=23&akid=485%2E734936%2EBTz42_)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1041?c0=ruben-em-mar23.DBJHWA&refcode=em230324-1-30&t=24&akid=485%2E734936%2EBTz42_)**

The strength of our campaign is the people who power our movement. Everyone is going to be looking to see what numbers we report, so your contribution means a lot to our efforts.
Thank you in advance for chipping in today.
Ruben

Team, **One week from today is the last day of March and our end-of-quarter FEC fundraising deadline.** That means everything we’ve raised from January through March 31 will be disclosed to the FEC and become public for everyone, including the far-right, to see. _We know that Gabe is at the top of the GOP’s most-wanted list:_ he was named an NRCC top-target this month, as well as a DCCC Frontline Member that we MUST protect if we’re going to flip the House in 2024. The fact is, this race for New Mexico’s 2nd congressional district was the closest Democratic victory in the entire country last year, with Gabe winning by just 1,350 votes — a slim 0.68% margin. If we’re going to keep him fighting for the people of NM-02 in Congress for the long haul, we have to gear up for the re-election fight NOW. Because we know our far-right opponents sure aren’t wasting any time building their war chests with dark money. **[Fundraising has been notably slow this quarter, but with your help right now, we can still reach our end-of-quarter goal before next Friday’s midnight deadline. **Headlines like these are unsettling, team. But we’re not powerless. Our whole team is working overtime to react to the NC Supreme Court’s rehearing of _Harper v. Hall_ , the case that struck down the legislature’s gerrymandered state Senate map just last year.** Extreme conservatives are ready to rip up North Carolina's protections against map manipulation and believe they have an ally in the new majority on the state Supreme Court. This is a decision that we’ll be feeling for years. We must be prepared to protect fair maps, no matter how the North Carolina Supreme Court rules.

name: Ronny Jackson
subject: Send a message to President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
| | **I 'm sure you've gotten a ton of messages about the arrest of President Trump, but this one doesn't require your money, your number, or your email.**
---
This isn't one of those emails.
This is Congressman Ronny Jackson.
I was President Trump's White House physician, and now, I'm proudly his strongest ally in the House.
Listen, I'm sure your email has been blowing up with unsolicited messages about Trump's potential arrest.
I'm sure you've gotten messages from random organizations you've never heard of before.
**And I 'm positive you've gotten emails from Swamp Creature "Republicans" who claim to be on Trump's side, but behind closed doors secretly want him to rot away in a prison cell.**
I get these emails too, but this one is different.
As Trump's top ally in the House, I speak with him often - very, very often.
[**So I asked my team to make a page where President Trump 's top supporters can send him their own personal message as he faces the biggest political Witch Hunt in American history.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62475810:JOrfVZG2N:m:1:3331421248:98F0427998D4EE7183C519EFFE84F48F:r)
And again, this doesn't require your money, your number, or your email.
| [ **SEND A MESSAGE TO TRUMP** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62475810:JOrfVZG2N:m:1:3331421248:98F0427998D4EE7183C519EFFE84F48F:r)
---
But just a fair warning, **responses will be cut off at midnight tonight.**
My team needs time to organize them before President Trump lands in my home state of Texas for his FIRST rally since announcing his candidacy.
So I'm humbly asking:[ **Please send your message to President Trump today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62475810:JOrfVZG2N:m:1:3331421248:98F0427998D4EE7183C519EFFE84F48F:r)
I know how much he loves his supporters
Thank you & God Bless,
Ronny Jackson

Friends — $5, that’s all we are asking for today. The same $5 you would spend toward your daily cup of coffee, tea, or boba. Here’s why:
☕Instead of your cup of coffee today, your $5 could help us raise the resources we need to get out the vote for Judge Janet in Wisconsin’s Supreme Court Race.
🫖Instead of your morning cup of tea, your $5 today could help us support Judge Janet fight back against MAGA mega-donor attack ads.
🧋Instead of your boba, your $5 could help us bring lasting change to the Wisconsin Supreme Court and help protect voting rights and abortion access in Wisconsin.
Sowhat do you say?
[**Can you please skip your cup of coffee, tea, or boba today to support The Long Run and our fight for pro-democracy candidates across the country? name: American Defense News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z05o694n0de5ti3vpge6kfp3c1dg70rspdcqsbn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdge0o71c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgsq1ijsq6vrc01clgjhcmuqpodb7imrfnkb31q0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdge0o71c1h2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z866cn492h8enecfas234pthbkrse45gh332hupg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdge0o71c1h2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

American Defense News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 American Defense News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

The race went to a recount, and ultimately, after all the ballots were counted, we came just 546 votes short of defeating Boebert. Ours was the closest race in the entire country.

We did it all with zero support from national Democrats while also being outspent by Boebert’s campaign and her allies.

How? By driving 24,000 miles in my red pickup truck to every corner of the district, showing up, meeting people where they were, and _listening_ to everyone. We put in the work, and people like you who volunteered, donated, made phone calls, etc... You made it all possible.
This time, things are going to get even nastier. I’m sure of it. Boebert’s Super PACs will try to smear me on every TV across the district.

#
Hey there, Derek.
We’re coming up on the end of March, and we’ve got seven days left to hit our goals ahead of this first FEC deadline of the year.
Here’s the good news: We’re making progress.
Here’s the not so good news: We could be doing better.
We’ve got to make these next seven days count. So, take a look here.

We’ve set a goal of $40,000 to raise from emails like this one before midnight on March 31st. This thermometer is going to show the progress we make towards that goal. Take a look at it, save it, come back to it.

Friend,
The Soros-funded prosecutor in Manhattan knows he has **NO CASE** against me.
But instead of dropping the case and admitting I’m innocent, the Soros D,A. will drag this witch hunt on FOREVER to try and find any way he can to take me down.
**You’re getting a preview of just how far the Left will go to destroy our campaign and eliminate the one candidate – _me_ – who can CRUSH Biden in 2024.**
_They reportedly withhold evidence, they fabricate crimes out of thin air, they summon proven liars and disbarred lawyers as witnesses, and they turn the fate of my freedom and justice into a primetime made-for-TV drama._
That’s why I have no choice but to ask for your support again to defend our movement.

Peter,

Gun violence is a uniquely American crisis.

As daily gun violence devastates communities across the country, cities like Parkland, Uvalde, and Buffalo continue to deal with the aftermath of mass shootings. And yet the far-right MAGA Republicans and the NRA are relentless in their efforts to push their “guns everywhere” policies. One thing is clear. We must take urgent action to pass life-saving gun legislation.

The reality is we will never be safe from gun violence until we enact and enforce reforms that prioritize American lives over fear-mongering and the gun lobby.

As a responsible gun owner and veteran of the gun violence prevention movement, I’ve spent years working with legislators, volunteers, and survivors to find comprehensive solutions to this very complex problem. We’ve made significant legislative gains in the last congress, but the NRA and MAGA Republicans continue to push a “more guns save lives” narrative that is making us all less safe. For that reason, leaders of the gun violence prevention space have partnered to create the **Stop Gun Violence PAC.**

Together, we are joining millions of Americans in demanding action by _**recruiting and investing in gun violence prevention champions for state and federal office.**_

We can end the gun violence epidemic, but we need a groundswell of support to get us started. [_**Will you sign your name to demand life-saving gun legislation?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60656571/397827982/1303628051?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTcyZjQyMTQtNGVjYS1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mZ6fO-bXwuWzUBNkICQXUGFGYfhtPzc9fas2ZR42jF8=&emci=54726588-65c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=172f4214-4eca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=7937656)

**“I think this is the most dangerous time for the state of our democracy other than the Civil War.”**
_– Bill Gates, a Republican election supervisor from Arizona_

[**_Help the NDRC fight back nationwide >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60656791/397828809/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230324_FR_3L_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQwMzA5MzRmLTRlY2EtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Zi9_DSeS-8Mau6Rmn6S4VR4oTdSdPMej4aqABPlBul8=) Last November, our grassroots movement helped defeat election deniers in states like Arizona, Nevada, Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, and more. **But the truth is that while we prevented these dangerous politicians from gaining power, they haven’t gone away.**

People like Kari Lake are _still_ trying to overturn the 2022 election results in Arizona – and she has even gone so far as suggesting violence: | “Kari Lake ... **is still anointing herself ‘the real governor’** and saying that election officials who certified her defeat are ‘crooks’ who ‘need to be locked up.’ ...

“To uproarious applause, **she went on to invoke the Second Amendment** and the bloody American Revolution against a tyrant. ‘I think we’re right there right now, aren’t we?’ she said.”

_– The Atlantic_
---
It’s not just in Arizona. In several states, right-wing activists are spending millions to elect judges who they believe could help overturn the presidential election results in 2024. And in states like Ohio and Texas, Republican lawmakers who promote the Big Lie are working to pass even more onerous restrictions on voting.

**[_Fight back: Help the NDRC defend election fairness nationwide >>>_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60656792/397828810/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230324_FR_3L_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQwMzA5MzRmLTRlY2EtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Zi9_DSeS-8Mau6Rmn6S4VR4oTdSdPMej4aqABPlBul8=)

But here’s the good news, team: The situation is far from hopeless.** Our movement has made significant progress in the fight to defend democracy. **As President Obama said recently, “[The NDRC has] been fighting to give people everywhere a fair shot. Our democracy is stronger today because of their hard work.”**

With vote suppressors, map manipulators, and election deniers continuing their attempts to seize unearned power, we must continue this work. Together, we have the chance to hold MAGA Republicans accountable, help elect leaders who will fight for fairness, combat attacks on our election infrastructure, and so much more.

**It might just save our democracy, team. Can we count on you to support this critical effort?**

Together, we have the chance to hold MAGA Republicans accountable, help elect leaders who will fight for fairness, combat attacks on our election infrastructure, and so much more. It might just save our democracy, team. Can we count on you to support this critical effort? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600 Washington, DC 20005 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: How I Found God
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478174:J2I7GZG5N:m:1:3371812801:FD8550C5160C6B2CEC395C5C8ED5C564:r)
---

Like a lot of people, I grew up going to church and had a relationship with God that wasn't especially strong. But as I grew older that changed.

When I started my time at the United States Military Academy, two young men invited me to a Bible study.

They were very intentional to me in explaining God's Word. After some study and discipleship with them, they helped me begin my walk with Christ.

**Since then, faith has been central to my life.** I keep a Bible open on my desk, and read every morning from the Good Book.

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478174:J2I7GZG5N:m:1:3371812801:FD8550C5160C6B2CEC395C5C8ED5C564:r)
---

Like you, I am also confronted with a highly complex set of problems, and I need the wisdom to try and make the right calls. _**So I need my mind renewed with the truth of the Gospel each day.**_

Unfortunately, faith-driven judgments are few and far between in Washington. Our leaders act without moral clarity and the consequences have been devastating.

If we are to restore honesty, integrity, and morality to our government, __**[we must elect more faith-driven leaders.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478174:J2I7GZG5N:m:1:3371812801:FD8550C5160C6B2CEC395C5C8ED5C564:r "we must elect more faith-driven leaders.")**__

---
| | [ELECT FAITH-DRIVEN LEADERS](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478174:J2I7GZG5N:m:1:3371812801:FD8550C5160C6B2CEC395C5C8ED5C564:r)
---

We are less than a week away from the upcoming midterm elections, so it is critical we have the resources to elect more faith-driven leaders who love America. Time is of the essence!

If you agree, _**[please consider donating today](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478174:J2I7GZG5N:m:1:3371812801:FD8550C5160C6B2CEC395C5C8ED5C564:r "please
consider donating today")**_ to support Christian conservatives who will let God be their guide - _**not self-interest**_.

God Bless,

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478175:J2I7GZG5N:m:1:3371812801:FD8550C5160C6B2CEC395C5C8ED5C564:r)
---

Mike Pompeo

Championing Our American Values")
---

Whether it's sending a spy balloon over our sensitive military installations, stealing our industrial secrets to undermine our economy, or making sure their surveillance and propaganda app is on every American's phone, the Chinese Communist Party is working day and night to make America weaker.

If you share my concerns about China's threat to America, make a donation to help support tough conservatives who will never give an inch to the CCP.

name: Jon Tester
subject: I'm damn proud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | [](https://go.dscc.org/go/12242?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230324-JonTester-TesterTandem3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230324-JonTester-TesterTandem3-Pros-sl1&akid=10234%2E9716520%2EGyNLOr)
Hey folks, Jon Tester here.

I’m not like most of my colleagues in the Senate, and it’s not too hard to see why. All you have to do is look at my $12 flattop haircut and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts.

**I’m the Senate’s only working farmer, and damn proud of it.**

Yes, it can make for early mornings and late nights during planting and harvest seasons — but it keeps me grounded, and gives me a unique perspective on issues. Like how climate change affects my farm, or how rural communities like mine need high-speed internet.

**These are real challenges that deserve real solutions, and that’s what I’m fighting for in Washington. But political experts rank my seat as one of the most likely to flip red, so I need your help to beat the odds and win this critical race:**

**[Can you split a donation between the DSCC and my campaign? We need to raise $50,000 by midnight to reach our crucial fundraising goal. Anything you can give helps.](https://go.dscc.org/go/12242?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230324-JonTester-TesterTandem3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230324-JonTester-TesterTandem3-Pros-sl1&akid=10234%2E9716520%2EGyNLOr)**

| | [DONATE](https://go.dscc.org/go/12242?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230324-JonTester-TesterTandem3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230324-JonTester-TesterTandem3-Pros-sl1&akid=10234%2E9716520%2EGyNLOr)

Thank you,

Jon

Jon Tester
U.S. Senator, Montana

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Asleep at the wheel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
EVERY GOP Candidate Should Make These EASY Commitments. Do you agree?

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1emhvd6vcdiiic314smv2f11178brug1vi6ucfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdge4or2cjh2bs)
Fellow American -

I'm running on a vision to answer the question of what it means to be an American in the year 2023. Merit. Truth. Free speech. Accountability. I believe deep in my bones these ideals still exist.

I am running for President to **revive** the conservative ideals that put this country into motion 250 years ago, and to create an alternative to the failed, woke leftist policies - not just complain about them.

How do we get this done? _**I challenge every GOP candidate to join me in some easy commitments:**_
1. End affirmative action
2. Abandon the climate cult
3. Total decoupling from China
4. 8-year limits for all federal bureaucrats
5. Say NO to central bank digital currencies
6. Release the "state action" files

Fellow American, Republicans can't be asleep at the wheel any longer, I need you on my team. **[Chip in $1 or more if you agree that our next president should commit to these 6 things!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlc5e26vs4bodvhsq05d3qoo5j5rom6314akgi38_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdge4or2cjh2bs)**

Let's stop just complaining about the Left and DO something about it.

Stand with me today,

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp6m55rfbv2kn39ea7334b33ndep8p8edaln54l8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdge4or2cjh2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** WATCH NOW -> **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z41trfs60g935bf5flqhrj96gfkvv8oq6h5vhtso_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdge4or2cjh2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z882gs6f55bthm514d9ag5a5nmjro22d5chmbn0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdge4or2cjh2bs)

---

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpn2aedg7gnkn4s0q6em1lp1kcc7qa0t11tbv568_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdge4or2cjh2bs)| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu93gt0343sebagr9srarhuqlf01eadhnnfpc1d8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdge4or2cjh2bs)| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zspioaoceugbe3577ji4f9klkauu43sgm11pe9j0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdge4or2cjh2bs)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

American Action News
---

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. name: Rand Paul
subject: Taking the fight to corrupt teachers unions
body:
Socialists are teaching your children to hate America.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zb126ujer0m6csbjojtq7ddb9g3prrvajoh760do_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdge4p70c5h2bs)
Friend,

Socialists are teaching your children to hate America.

They have taken over classrooms and indoctrinated hundreds of thousands of students with Critical Race Theory. They would rather focus lessons on pronouns and gender identity than teach trade skills, science, or basic math.

_It's no wonder our kids have developed the highest levels of anxiety and depression in the world._

I'd like to introduce you to an organization that is leading the fight to take back our school boards from the radical Left and protect our children, **Parents Union of America (PUOA).**

I just talked with Jessi Melton, President of PUOA, and told her that I would reach out to my supporters and help raise $15,000 this week to fund their efforts.

[_**Friend, can I count on you to share my support for PUOA? Click here to donate $10, $25, $50, or any amount today >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlv2l3g1qh71cmdpm5bmkiurjog13trj44pp78s0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdge4p70c5h2bs)

I want to share a message from PUOA:

_**" We stand as a counter-offensive **__**against the powerful, agenda-driven Teachers' Union**_ _**, which has systematically sought to destroy wholesome American values and indoctrinate our children."**_

_Parents Union of America is the ANTI teachers-union_.

Their mission is to target the most populous school districts and remove the incompetent school board members put in place by the Anti-American, corrupt Teachers' Union.

**I, for one, am sick and tired of socialists indoctrinating our children. And the corrupt Teacher Unions are to blame.**

We can't allow the same people who turn a blind eye to inappropriate textbook material and socialist indoctrination to remain in charge of American schools.

[_**Will you join the fight to save America 's schools from the corrupt Teacher's Union? Please send your urgent donation NOW >>> **_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9pdd3dvom6jl16h6g22p2jo1o5hh562grllao3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdge4p70c5h2bs)

PUOA does more than fight to remove corrupt school board members. They work to fill school boards with America-First candidates and parents.

They plan to replace corrupt school board members with America-First candidates. They recruit and train conservative candidates and raise money to get them elected. These candidates MUST display the ability and willingness to fight for conservative values by going on the offensive.

**Parents Union of America refuses to stay on the defensive when our children are involved. **

I know this is a lot to ask, but can you help me keep my promise to raise $15,000 this week for Parents Union of America?

** Click below to send your gift.**
[_**Donate $10**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zie7tv0cd634hl8c18o6r3p7vkatf532lqhsjfr8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdge4p70c5h2bs)
[ _**Donate $25**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zuv6ecpeg7h9s9tharanat63fg9uhi9fag15d7mg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdge4p70c5h2bs)
[ _**Donate $50**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpl4gs0d1cm401lckqvpfj1c5sj1qnmduu2ijluo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdge4p70c5h2bs)
[ _**Donate $100**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zt39fuh2pt3j9q44tr4ogm629jsvj2i1fruqkcs8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdge4p70c5h2bs)
[ _**Donate $250**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z50espbrk1rpl2qqr5mphk771jgepkerablolq6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdge4p70c5h2bs)
[ _**Donate $500**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpj90eaqrevefu05gokkn5q57aavj3kfa8lljmho_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdge4p70c5h2bs)
[ _**Donate $1,000**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmdfm7bjofk7ef02lrg4of723teifisqq0lsn23g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdge4p70c5h2bs)
[ _**Donate Any Amount**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z439g4r4m35l2p8jsetf40ql79dkm90lqeohbpro_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sdge4p70c5h2bs)

Thank you,

Senator Rand Paul

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Add your name: defend and strengthen the ACA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-march2023-fr-march?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-march2023-fr-march?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25]
Dear friend,

Everyone should have access to quality, affordable healthcare, regardless of economic background or medical history.

This week, we celebrate the 13 year anniversary of one of the most consequential pieces of legislation in our country's history — the Affordable Care Act.

CELEBRATE THE ACA [https://secure.ngpvan.com/0GlDLH3nJ0-kkTj0QNDTVQ2]

While I was not serving in Congress when President Barack Obama signed the Affordable Care Act into law, I strongly support the goals of extending affordable health care to every American.

But friend, we live in much different times than we did 13 years ago. MAGA Republicans have talked for years about axing the Affordable Care Act — with no real health care plan to replace it.

I will always fight for the expansion of accessible and affordable health care for all — because healthcare is a right, not a privilege. But as I fight extremism from House Republicans, I’m asking for you to show your support on the anniversary of one of America’s greatest pieces of legislation — the passage of the Affordable Care Act. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/0GlDLH3nJ0-kkTj0QNDTVQ2]

SUPPORT HEALTH CARE EXPANSION [https://secure.ngpvan.com/0GlDLH3nJ0-kkTj0QNDTVQ2]

Thank you,

Eric Swalwell

name: COURIER
subject: We’ve hit the jackpot, Peter
body:
This success is just as much yours as it is ours — which is why we want you to have a say in this important decision.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=759%2E120351%2E1d7FGV)
Peter, we’ve got some *really exciting* news for you...
**We’re opening a brand new newsroom in another critical battleground state.**
But before we tell you, can you guess where? Here’s a hint:
[](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/survey/nevada-name-poll/?source=em-20230324&t=2&akid=759%2E120351%2E1d7FGV)
That’s right Peter, COURIER’s heading to the land of gorgeous desert landscapes, neon signs, and slot machines: **Nevada**. 🥳 🎲 🏜️
Now that we’ve decided on a destination, we need YOUR help to make this critical next decision — **choosing the name of our newsroom.**
[**Will you take 30 seconds to answer our Nevada Name Poll?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/survey/nevada-name-poll/?source=em-20230324&t=3&akid=759%2E120351%2E1d7FGV)
[What should we name our Nevada newsroom?](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/survey/nevada-name-poll/?source=em-20230324&t=4&akid=759%2E120351%2E1d7FGV) The Nevadan The Nevada Dealer Silver State News The Neon **[Take the poll »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/survey/nevada-name-poll/?source=em-20230324&t=5&akid=759%2E120351%2E1d7FGV)**
---
There are so many reasons we’re thrilled to be taking our fight against bad information to Nevada, including its role as a **key battleground state** in the 2024 election.
**Democrat Jacky Rosen is considered one of the most vulnerable Senators up for reelection this cycle. You can be sure that this race will be close — _in 2022, Democratic Senator Catherine Cortez Masto won by only 0.9%._**
This race will also be vulnerable to the same kind of election misinformation and voter intimidation that we saw in Nevada in 2022, with claims of election tampering and voter fraud.
Opening our Nevada newsroom couldn’t come at a more critical time. But before we can go any further, we have to choose a name for it.
[**Your support and feedback has had such a positive impact on our work already, Peter. This success is just as much yours as it is ours — which is why we want you to have a say in this important decision. Please take a moment to respond to our Nevada Name Poll:**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/survey/nevada-name-poll/?source=em-20230324&t=6&akid=759%2E120351%2E1d7FGV)
**[Take the poll »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/survey/nevada-name-poll/?source=em-20230324&t=7&akid=759%2E120351%2E1d7FGV)**
Thanks so much,
The COURIER Team

**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=8&refcode2=759_120351_1d7FGV&akid=759%2E120351%2E1d7FGV)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=759%2E120351%2E1d7FGV)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

name: Joe Biden
subject: It would mean the world if you’d make a donation to power our party’s work.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
I hope you’ll join me in putting your faith in our work to elect Democrats nationwide in the years ahead. | |
---
My dad used to say everybody needs a little bit of breathing room -- just enough so that, at the end of the month, you can pay your bills and be certain your family is going to be okay. We all know that too many folks don’t have that peace of mind. That’s why, since I was sworn in as president two years ago, we have been focused intensely on getting more people affordable health care and bringing down costs -- all so that you can have a little bit of breathing room again. **We’ve made significant progress, Derek. But if we’re going to keep our country moving in the right direction, we need to continue to elect more Democrats across the country.** **[If you renew your membership to the Democratic Party today by clean_body: I hope you’ll join me in putting your faith in our work to elect Democrats nationwide in the years ahead. | | My dad used to say everybody needs a little bit of breathing room -- just enough so that, at the end of the month, you can pay your bills and be certain your family is going to be okay. We all know that too many folks don’t have that peace of mind. That’s why, since I was sworn in as president two years ago, we have been focused intensely on getting more people affordable health care and bringing down costs -- all so that you can have a little bit of breathing room again. We’ve made significant progress, Derek. But if we’re going to keep our country moving in the right direction, we need to continue to elect more Democrats across the country. Kamala and I are continuing our work to build a better America -- to rebuild our economy from the bottom up and the middle out, and to make sure all working families can have a little bit more breathing room. If we’re going to keep up our progress, it’s absolutely critical that we continue electing Democrats in every corner of this country. That’s why your contribution to the Democratic Party is so important. Day after day, the DNC is working to ensure that Democrats up and down the ballot have what they need to win. But they can’t do it without your help -- that’s why I’m coming to you today. It’d mean the world to me if you’d make a donation to power our party’s work today. Thank you for everything you do, Joe Joseph R. Biden, Jr. President of the United States Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, . If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, territories, and D.C., . Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. | [](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=b77e8e6428a043a18e30928acc9d9a88&_e=QTn3h8NU194LwYniaSBj9Vh2Q5zKI-15n-HikHHISJxzYr3J-aichOBH-rDdgTylMJ6C-x9FXLEoF-_9gWtZBuIbCgQCrv21yZNPD51HocLbTdshLje_BWbChz2Hq66pTKkXabEP_qdNfyaJYas16ON25JdcuKf3i6UNY2oDRPpC4N6e9of1NQOTPQJs9uLd7sD8i67UpVtaNTDgOy03vFyDQzlOWx5F2OIeiW37THHsXfRvzundw2UJGsjP4gZjmGiy6S76FJ8ldzU7d0vFaDYhAbbUB74xo_gkcdyV8059RI5FoZDWhXtU4kNZ6M5917IFea0Hx56LD9Tvdr44oSaVxQeWIPzwev3zwrij4JQ%3D)
---
Peter,
---
Earlier this month, I took action to put America’s parents back in the driver’s seat when it comes to their children’s education.
---
While the Left wants to exploit our education system to push their extreme agenda on innocent kids, I believe that schools should follow these five common sense principles:
---
**\- Parents should know what their kids are being taught at school

\- Parents have the right to voice their opinions to teachers and be heard

\- Schools should be transparent regarding their budgets and spending

\- Parents have the first say when it comes to protecting their children’s privacy

\- Parents should be able to find out about ANY violent activity in school**
---
Liberal special interests have taken priority over parental guidance in schools all over the country, and our children’s safety is now in _jeopardy_ as a result.
---
But conservative leaders like me are focused on putting **PARENTS _BACK_ IN CONTROL! **
---
_And we’re only going to succeed in our mission with the continued support of great patriots like YOU who know just how important this is._
---
[**So, Peter, can I count on you to stand with America’s parents and make a contribution so I can WIN in 2024 and continue fighting to restore parental rights in our education system?**](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=b77e8e6428a043a18e30928acc9d9a88&_e=QTn3h8NU194LwYniaSBj9Vh2Q5zKI-15n-HikHHISJxzYr3J-aichOBH-rDdgTylMJ6C-x9FXLEoF-_9gWtZBuIbCgQCrv21yZNPD51HocLbTdshLje_BWbChz2Hq66pTKkXabEP_qdNfyaJYas16ON25JdcuKf3i6UNY2oDRPpC4N6e9of1NQOTPQJs9uLd7sD8i67UpVtaNTDgOy03vIsQrJzZCUf5BR97s73kNsNB9sXQRcbb4RCcAdjJvQbdJZTFmVg2YdpJHbGMfXhon0sG9PhDdIUKZQzZ6Cn7yq1PF2uTA8zkTvBxKGKo1hHutNa_a8l2DokIs3oQ6pmvDywy6IyngFVOz46UG8ppvbk%3D)
---

Thank you,
---
[](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=b77e8e6428a043a18e30928acc9d9a88&_e=QTn3h8NU194LwYniaSBj9Vh2Q5zKI-15n-HikHHISJxzYr3J-aichOBH-rDdgTylMJ6C-x9FXLEoF-_9gWtZBuIbCgQCrv21yZNPD51HocLbTdshLje_BWbChz2Hq66pTKkXabEP_qdNfyaJYas16ON25JdcuKf3i6UNY2oDRPpC4N6e9of1NQOTPQJs9uLd7sD8i67UpVtaNTDgOy03vPAuRct47rjlhfgM21xdwSyRF3Y-klxICogA3XTZTnRtJlJWcaiAx_ZmHU0Tk2ztFnpK3VYD6xoqaTwrBOLSTGVsfQQgnJJeDZQIco9eiZiTk5aIxn4E0oRUJwVFZSy2-RACH7J9sdBZvyohH6L7oWM%3D)

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: This will take 90 seconds
body:
Will you take 90 seconds to complete our News Consumption Survey?
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=755%2E120351%2EIsPv0O)
Peter, how and where we get our news is constantly changing.
With the disappearance of local newsrooms, many communities have ended up in **“news deserts”** — and been left particularly vulnerable to right-wing disinformation that’s spread online.
At Courier Newsroom, we know that the best antidote to disinformation is more good information, so **we’re fighting back by building the largest left-leaning network of local newsrooms in America.**
Right now, we have journalists in eight battleground states working to fill in these information gaps by serving **free, high-quality news pieces** that are focused on the issues voters actually care about and are served in the online spaces where people actually get their news.
A critical part of our success is our ability to stay one step ahead of trends in news consumption, so we want to take a moment to hear from you: **How do you get your news?**
[**Our News Consumption Survey only takes 90 seconds to fill out, making it a quick and easy way to support our fight against bad information:**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/survey/news-consumption-survey-welcome/?source=em-20230324&t=2&akid=755%2E120351%2EIsPv0O)
**[Take the survey »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/survey/news-consumption-survey-welcome/?source=em-20230324&t=3&akid=755%2E120351%2EIsPv0O)**
_Your insight will be invaluable to our local newsrooms as they fight disinformation and reach new audiences who don’t have access to quality, local news._
**Courier Newsroom is different** because we deliver our factual, local journalism directly to the newsfeeds, inboxes and other online spaces where people actually get their news — the same spaces dominated by right-wing conspiracy theories and misinformation.
Plus, we don’t hide our news pieces behind paywalls like many mainstream media groups do.
**Our news model isn’t traditional — but that’s why it works.** Just look at this data out of Michigan:
_A case study showed that individuals who were exposed to our factual stories on abortion rights were more likely to be supportive of a ballot initiative that enshrines reproductive freedom in Michigan’s Constitution._
For our approach to continue working in 2023 and beyond, we have to constantly gauge how people are getting their news. That’s what makes your input so important — with your help, we can better serve local communities.
[**Understanding how our supporters get their news allows us to reach the local communities who need our content the most. So we’re asking: will you take our quick, 90-second News Consumption Survey?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/survey/news-consumption-survey-welcome/?source=em-20230324&t=4&akid=755%2E120351%2EIsPv0O)
**[Take the survey »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/survey/news-consumption-survey-welcome/?source=em-20230324&t=5&akid=755%2E120351%2EIsPv0O)**
Thanks so much,
The Courier Newsroom Team

**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=755_120351_IsPv0O&akid=755%2E120351%2EIsPv0O)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=755%2E120351%2EIsPv0O)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

name: Aurora Regino
subject: They tried to "transition" my daughter behind my back
body:
I never thought it would be me.

| |
---
| | My Fellow concerned American, I never thought it would be me. I’d seen the news headlines and the crazy videos of activist teachers talking about how they indoctrinated students with ideas about sexuality and gender, against parents' wishes and behind their backs... But I never thought in a million years it would happen to my family. _And then it did._ My 11-year-old daughter went to the guidance counselor, after a death in our family, for help processing that loss. In a meeting that was supposed to help my daughter manage her grief, her guidance counselor convinced her to begin identifying as a boy at school. She went into that office as my daughter and left with a boy’s name asking to be called a “he.” It took just minutes. All of this was done without my knowledge - and even worse, the school told her to hide all of this from me. [**So, I’m suing Chico Unified School District with the help of the Center for American Liberty - not for damages, or for emotional distress, but to put an end to its “Parental Secrecy Policy” that directs teachers and staff to hide a child’s “social transition” from parents.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02035%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wU8wV%2f%2bmeFUKUVbOOr5%2f1g&sysid=1) Because when we win this lawsuit, we’ll set a precedent nationwide. My daughter might have wanted to tell me about her “new identity” right away - because I’m her mother, she trusts me, and she knows I love her unconditionally. **_But her guidance counselor discouraged her from talking to me about it._** She encouraged her to “come out” to her teachers, her peers - everyone but me. It was two months after the initial meeting by the time I found out what was going on, and it wasn’t because the school notified me or because my daughter told me. It was because my daughter told my mother who then told me. And thankfully we were able to put an end to this. My daughter is doing well. She goes by the name I gave her, and knows she is a girl. But I know we were the lucky ones. I know that if the school had its way, my daughter might be on medications and thinking about dangerous surgeries, changing her body forever, putting her own health at risk. And in my state, they could’ve done all of it behind my back. But I’m not moving; I’m fighting back! Because the truth is, what starts in California never stays here. But I don’t stand a chance without you. [**Will you make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my lawsuit today, and take a stand for American children and parental rights?**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02036%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=i%2fWLBpEq%2bDoimWrAnBMYqg&sysid=1) We’re up against an evil unlike anything I’ve seen in my life - and it grows more powerful by the day. But the truth is on our side. When patriotic Americans come together, it doesn’t matter who stands against us.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
| | Aurora Regino
---
| | [**DONATE**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02037%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=X%2fXFS6uB18ITFf23GPJRJw&sysid=1)
