clean_body: Now I’m a target | Friend, I went on Fox & Friends to give an update. I wanted to make sure that you saw it. Reps. Jim Jordan, James Comer, and I are leading the charge to stop politically motivated attacks by radical left-wing DAs, like the one in Manhattan. NOW: The Left wants me GONE for standing up to their minions. I knew this would happen and still, I’m not backing down. But after last year’s gerrymandering, the district that I represent in Congress is one of America’s most competitive toss-ups and I’m worried we won’t reach our End-of-Quarter goal and have the means to fight back against the barrage of attacks from the Left. Time is short so I’m asking you to please hurry and stand with me as I lead the fight against progressive district attorneys. We need to be ready for anything the Left throws at me as they try to flip this toss-up district Blue. Thank you, Rep. clean_body: We have so much work to do in 2023, but we need the funds to get it done. = | We need your help, fellow activist. Unfortunately, 2023 has been a tough fundraising year. We emailed you before to let you know that we’ve raised less than one-sixth of what we had raised by this point last year, and heading into the end of the quarter, that figure is only getting worse. As a nonprofit, the impact we’re able to make is directly dependent on the money we receive in donations. We have a chance to carry our momentum from 2022 forward into 2023 and 2024, but we need your help to raise the resources to do it. = = In solidarity, Katy Personette Director of Development and Policy The New Pennsylvania Project \---------- Forwarded message --------- Fellow activist, we hate to send emails like this, but the New Pennsylvania Project is facing a critical fundraising shortfall. So far this year, we’ve raised less than one-sixth as much as we did by this point last year. The New Pennsylvania Project is one of the ONLY organizations conducting year-round, consistent voter registration and civic education. Our organizers have been registering voters in the communities we center across PA since January, including in the snow and rain - but we simply cannot keep doing this important work with less than a sixth of the budget. = = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to =: May 1, 2023 Last day to =: May 9, 2023 Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to =: October 23, 2023 Last day to =: October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. name: Lucas Kunce
subject: These people aren’t like you and me.

body:
In 2019, Josh Hawley voted to make one of his own donors a judge. And now, that judge is overseeing a suit led by Hawley’s wife to ban abortion medications nationwide.
#
Peter — Josh Hawley started his career as a corporate activist lawyer.
Then, in 2019, he voted in the U.S. Senate to make one of his own donors — another corporate activist lawyer — a federal judge.
**And now, that judge is overseeing a lawsuit led by Hawley’s wife to ban abortion medications nationwide.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29820?refcode=em20230324-2875&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2875%2E614464%2EOftl_3)
These people are not like you and me — and this is a perfect example of the insider corruption our movement is fighting to end.
**We can’t afford to send a corrupt elite like Josh Hawley to represent Missouri in the U.S. Senate for another six years.[So if you’re ready to give this seat back to everyday Missourians and protect access to abortion nationwide, please rush a donation of $10 or anything at all to our grassroots campaign right now.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29820?refcode=em20230324-2875&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2875%2E614464%2EOftl_3)**

One week may feel far off, but it’s not a lot of time at all. When this deadline ends, our fundraising figures will be made public. **The woke left will seize on it if we don’t post a strong figure. ** They’ll say it means Kansans and Americans don’t support our priorities... like securing the border, making China pay for the virus it unleashed, and stopping runaway spending. [**I’m going to do everything I can to stop that from happening, but I can’t do it alone.********My campaign depends on small dollar donors, and I hope we can depend on you right********now.**** **](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/72a27f86a8ae4412/9f1dd8a3309298d5c3d6b838967d376c/37973) Thank you for your continued support.

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Here's Why You Should Be Concerned About TikTok
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-e01ROLafPk_aJCnUKanoxZ8DzivEbYWH7h2sOaqxmtBxpOdvTH7MPqzNwr1yBc4Ekh9LhYJqlYGZ__-ytb_1mlQ-e3X6mLVovozKrCTNdy-E1OXHCg4DcB6pjUPHWhZsLELFGtFgNI4hYoe1crzge5j-uxSAO-l_Eh-a8xbWfYuuAmCDzqXN722HeeXuIiTvSHu3G8ZkebfkviYW6wy3D9bZQY6z_mBrVOv4KBo8-JfuhsJzdz2ZGJLkTkbXaCS9opE7foycel840KPOKGk25RUMyJ1APguSK04MDsagKhK2jioPKPyS22OwrwwyZxEMA2AT72Ib901ckNLHh4coA==&c=V5v9zDxHnL6e1NM5vOMcnruLJ6il7wZ5wMX016mZRmQz5Y2RyZeT2g==&ch=pb5lKIZC1KaUn-tXLR8lxPP2tRtU6Xzl6-WJXlmFzYASrio6tRu7eg==)
---
|
Peter-
This week I pressed TikTok's CEO for answers about the influence of the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) on the app that is used by 150 million Americans and I laid out the national security risk TikTok poses to our country. I also continued to call for stronger action against the Mexican drug cartels, and debunked false narratives about my authorization for military force against the cartels.
As always, thank you for your support. Now let's get started.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| TIKTOK CEO TESTIFIES
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-e01ROLafPk_aJCnUKanoxZ8DzivEbYWH7h2sOaqxmtBxpOdvTH7MPqzNwr1yBc4_xJ3WTUb_yThUiy9eaiRnBeukiATKd02blpiyC23bp-S1ugyuAPBU9x0wrT6mEFSy4VQaBkxMCwP2notY3COmDayg6ViDAkkdy3coimPCjMI78D3NHiZpw==&c=V5v9zDxHnL6e1NM5vOMcnruLJ6il7wZ5wMX016mZRmQz5Y2RyZeT2g==&ch=pb5lKIZC1KaUn-tXLR8lxPP2tRtU6Xzl6-WJXlmFzYASrio6tRu7eg==)
---
| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO WATCH MY QUESTIONING OF TIKTOK'S CEO](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-e01ROLafPk_aJCnUKanoxZ8DzivEbYWH7h2sOaqxmtBxpOdvTH7MPqzNwr1yBc4_xJ3WTUb_yThUiy9eaiRnBeukiATKd02blpiyC23bp-S1ugyuAPBU9x0wrT6mEFSy4VQaBkxMCwP2notY3COmDayg6ViDAkkdy3coimPCjMI78D3NHiZpw==&c=V5v9zDxHnL6e1NM5vOMcnruLJ6il7wZ5wMX016mZRmQz5Y2RyZeT2g==&ch=pb5lKIZC1KaUn-tXLR8lxPP2tRtU6Xzl6-WJXlmFzYASrio6tRu7eg==)
---
| |
---
|
TikTok's CEO came to Capitol Hill this week for the first Congressional hearing into the app. The hearing was held at the Energy and Commerce Committee, where I serve. As you can see from my questioning, this hearing did not go well for TikTok.
Here's what you need to know about why TikTok presents serious security risks to the United States and everyone who uses the app: TikTok is owned by ByteDance, a Chinese company that is headquartered in China. Under a 2017 National Intelligence Law implemented by the CCP, every single organization inside of China must comply with and assist in Chinese intelligence operations and maintain the secrecy of those operations. In other words, ByteDance must cooperate with the CCP whenever they are called upon, and if they are called upon they are bound by law to keep such cooperation a secret.
What's worse is that leaders at ByteDance are card-carrying members of the CCP. That includes ByteDance's editor-in-chief, Zhang Fuping, who is a CCP Secretary. And in TikTok's own "privacy policy," it states that TikTok shares user data with other members of "our corporate group," which TikTok's CEO confirmed to me today includes their CCP-ridden parent company ByteDance. Translation: every single piece of data that is shared with TikTok is shared with ByteDance, which is under the control of the Chinese government just like every other business in China.
We know that TikTok employs hundreds of people who have worked for China's state-run media (propaganda) outlets. We know that TikTok has illegally surveilled American journalists on the app. And we know from leaked memos of internal TikTok meetings that there is a "Master Admin" stationed in Beijing who "has access to everything." Of course, TikTok's CEO tried to downplay or deny all of these accusations. But no one believed him as his entire testimony was blatantly misleading.
If you personally love or use TikTok, or have kids who use it, and think we are blowing this out of proportion let me assure you that we are not. With data, there's power. The CCP can choose what you see and how you see it. They can make you believe things that aren't true, and encourage you to do things you shouldn't. This is China's goal--the demise of America, starting with our youth. That's why lawmakers on both sides of the aisle have joined together on this. Our national security and safety depend on it.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| WE HAVE TO TAKE ACTION NOW TO STOP THE CARTELS
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-e01ROLafPk_aJCnUKanoxZ8DzivEbYWH7h2sOaqxmtBxpOdvTH7MPqzNwr1yBc4drRXPk-rLUnK7OGYuPuu4JzF8bBgpaHayB6s-NzPyKAUD5hYUUPV8olUy1CWQnkVIffdTRs49ngqGlDThKJH-Y0igDnoK2W6Uwp8BnB1eSjxjnLLfFmxh_NeOEd2M3EBkdS-PyxqRsKStHbiygs3wA==&c=V5v9zDxHnL6e1NM5vOMcnruLJ6il7wZ5wMX016mZRmQz5Y2RyZeT2g==&ch=pb5lKIZC1KaUn-tXLR8lxPP2tRtU6Xzl6-WJXlmFzYASrio6tRu7eg==)
---
| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO READ THE STORY](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-e01ROLafPk_aJCnUKanoxZ8DzivEbYWH7h2sOaqxmtBxpOdvTH7MPqzNwr1yBc4drRXPk-rLUnK7OGYuPuu4JzF8bBgpaHayB6s-NzPyKAUD5hYUUPV8olUy1CWQnkVIffdTRs49ngqGlDThKJH-Y0igDnoK2W6Uwp8BnB1eSjxjnLLfFmxh_NeOEd2M3EBkdS-PyxqRsKStHbiygs3wA==&c=V5v9zDxHnL6e1NM5vOMcnruLJ6il7wZ5wMX016mZRmQz5Y2RyZeT2g==&ch=pb5lKIZC1KaUn-tXLR8lxPP2tRtU6Xzl6-WJXlmFzYASrio6tRu7eg==)
---
| |
---
| Since I began my efforts to expose the threat of the Mexican drug cartels and introduce legislation to stop them, this issue has garnered national and international attention. And for good reason.
At the national level, we've seen the cartel's main product (fentanyl) rip our communities apart. Tens of thousands of Americans (a lot of young people) are deliberately poisoned every year when they take street drugs without knowing they've been laced with fentanyl. We've seen cartels capitalize on the chaos of our southern border and turn it into a human smuggling cash-cow that earns them billions of dollars.
At the international level, we've finally gotten the attention of President AMLO of Mexico. President AMLO has done next to nothing to confront this threat. To make matters worse, AMLO denies that fentanyl is coming from his country, denies cartels are trafficking the drug into our country, and threatens to interfere in American elections against lawmakers like myself who introduce legislation to confront the cartels he protects. We've also put China on notice, as we've made clear that the precursors cartels use to make fentanyl are coming from one place: China, with the tacit permission of the Chinese Communist Party.
I've introduced serious bills to confront the threat from the Mexican drug cartels, which you can read about in the story above. I will continue pushing for serious action against these narco-terrorists until the threat is neutralized.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| DEBUNKING THE MYTHS ABOUT MY CARTEL AUMF
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-e01ROLafPk_aJCnUKanoxZ8DzivEbYWH7h2sOaqxmtBxpOdvTH7MPqzNwr1yBc40gTFonM84YK-7D45j5Te3aJM717FmEifsl0dO0oup09plm4JiRjBaxKSrorkOLyU1-MmCjc2XQb79F6iYz0xWiYGx-jCnjTi_DjQlpaez4nMlT39ZsEe0KCYjNluUjt7O9FmKGty3IfRTZo5HqEuj4YRzPQLA69DqDTVi24jYec=&c=V5v9zDxHnL6e1NM5vOMcnruLJ6il7wZ5wMX016mZRmQz5Y2RyZeT2g==&ch=pb5lKIZC1KaUn-tXLR8lxPP2tRtU6Xzl6-WJXlmFzYASrio6tRu7eg==)
---
| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO READ MY WALL STREET JOURNAL LETTER TO THE EDITOR](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-e01ROLafPk_aJCnUKanoxZ8DzivEbYWH7h2sOaqxmtBxpOdvTH7MPqzNwr1yBc40gTFonM84YK-7D45j5Te3aJM717FmEifsl0dO0oup09plm4JiRjBaxKSrorkOLyU1-MmCjc2XQb79F6iYz0xWiYGx-jCnjTi_DjQlpaez4nMlT39ZsEe0KCYjNluUjt7O9FmKGty3IfRTZo5HqEuj4YRzPQLA69DqDTVi24jYec=&c=V5v9zDxHnL6e1NM5vOMcnruLJ6il7wZ5wMX016mZRmQz5Y2RyZeT2g==&ch=pb5lKIZC1KaUn-tXLR8lxPP2tRtU6Xzl6-WJXlmFzYASrio6tRu7eg==)
---
| Critics -- on the left and right, in the United States and Mexico -- have made straw man arguments against the authorization for the use of military force I introduced targeting the cartels, feigning hysteria about "bombing" or "invading" Mexico. No one is arguing we do that.
Here's what the cartel AUMF means in practice:
First off, an AUMF doesn't mean a unilateral air strike in Mexico tomorrow. It gives the U.S. President the bare minimum legal authority to act with the force of the military against deadly drug cartels in Mexico.
It can take many forms, including non-kinetic action like intelligence collection and sharing. An AUMF is also the minimum authority needed to operate with the Mexican military (as we've done with other allies battling internal insurgencies).
No one is talking about an invasion or war with Mexico. We're focused squarely on one mission: taking down the cartels. We'd expect our President to use the AUMF to work alongside Mexico's military. The bottom line is that narcoterrorists are killing tens of thousands of Americans. U.S. military capabilities must be brought to bear to stop this threat.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter- This week I pressed TikTok's CEO for answers about the influence of the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) on the app that is used by 150 million Americans and I laid out the national security risk TikTok poses to our country. I also continued to call for stronger action against the Mexican drug cartels, and debunked false narratives about my authorization for military force against the cartels. As always, thank you for your support. Now let's get started. | | | | | | | | TIKTOK CEO TESTIFIES | | | == | == | | | TikTok's CEO came to Capitol Hill this week for the first Congressional hearing into the app. The hearing was held at the Energy and Commerce Committee, where I serve. As you can see from my questioning, this hearing did not go well for TikTok. Here's what you need to know about why TikTok presents serious security risks to the United States and everyone who uses the app: TikTok is owned by ByteDance, a Chinese company that is headquartered in China. Under a 2017 National Intelligence Law implemented by the CCP, every single organization inside of China must comply with and assist in Chinese intelligence operations and maintain the secrecy of those operations. In other words, ByteDance must cooperate with the CCP whenever they are called upon, and if they are called upon they are bound by law to keep such cooperation a secret. What's worse is that leaders at ByteDance are card-carrying members of the CCP. That includes ByteDance's editor-in-chief, Zhang Fuping, who is a CCP Secretary. And in TikTok's own "privacy policy," it states that TikTok shares user data with other members of "our corporate group," which TikTok's CEO confirmed to me today includes their CCP-ridden parent company ByteDance. Translation: every single piece of data that is shared with TikTok is shared with ByteDance, which is under the control of the Chinese government just like every other business in China. We know that TikTok employs hundreds of people who have worked for China's state-run media (propaganda) outlets. We know that TikTok has illegally surveilled American journalists on the app. And we know from leaked memos of internal TikTok meetings that there is a "Master Admin" stationed in Beijing who "has access to everything." Of course, TikTok's CEO tried to downplay or deny all of these accusations. But no one believed him as his entire testimony was blatantly misleading. If you personally love or use TikTok, or have kids who use it, and think we are blowing this out of proportion let me assure you that we are not. With data, there's power. The CCP can choose what you see and how you see it. They can make you believe things that aren't true, and encourage you to do things you shouldn't. This is China's goal--the demise of America, starting with our youth. That's why lawmakers on both sides of the aisle have joined together on this. Our national security and safety depend on it. | | | | | | | | WE HAVE TO TAKE ACTION NOW TO STOP THE CARTELS | | | == | == | | | Since I began my efforts to expose the threat of the Mexican drug cartels and introduce legislation to stop them, this issue has garnered national and international attention. And for good reason. At the national level, we've seen the cartel's main product (fentanyl) rip our communities apart. Tens of thousands of Americans (a lot of young people) are deliberately poisoned every year when they take street drugs without knowing they've been laced with fentanyl. We've seen cartels capitalize on the chaos of our southern border and turn it into a human smuggling cash-cow that earns them billions of dollars. At the international level, we've finally gotten the attention of President AMLO of Mexico. President AMLO has done next to nothing to confront this threat. To make matters worse, AMLO denies that fentanyl is coming from his country, denies cartels are trafficking the drug into our country, and threatens to interfere in American elections against lawmakers like myself who introduce legislation to confront the cartels he protects. We've also put China on notice, as we've made clear that the precursors cartels use to make fentanyl are coming from one place: China, with the tacit permission of the Chinese Communist Party. I've introduced serious bills to confront the threat from the Mexican drug cartels, which you can read about in the story above. I will continue pushing for serious action against these narco-terrorists until the threat is neutralized. | | | | | | | | DEBUNKING THE MYTHS ABOUT MY CARTEL AUMF | == | == | Critics -- on the left and right, in the United States and Mexico -- have made straw man arguments against the authorization for the use of military force I introduced targeting the cartels, feigning hysteria about "bombing" or "invading" Mexico. No one is arguing we do that. Here's what the cartel AUMF means in practice: First off, an AUMF doesn't mean a unilateral air strike in Mexico tomorrow. It gives the U.S. President the bare minimum legal authority to act with the force of the military against deadly drug cartels in Mexico. It can take many forms, including non-kinetic action like intelligence collection and sharing. An AUMF is also the minimum authority needed to operate with the Mexican military (as we've done with other allies battling internal insurgencies). No one is talking about an invasion or war with Mexico. We're focused squarely on one mission: taking down the cartels. We'd expect our President to use the AUMF to work alongside Mexico's military. The bottom line is that narcoterrorists are killing tens of thousands of Americans. U.S. military capabilities must be brought to bear to stop this threat. | | | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | == | == | | | | | | NEWS | WASHINGTON FREE BEACON: == NATIONAL REVIEW: == FOX NEWS: == | That's it for this week's campaign brief. Our first big End of Quarter FEC deadline for 2023 is coming up. == | In Service, | | Dan Crenshaw | | | | | == | If you'd like to donate by check, please make your check payable and mail to: Dan Crenshaw for Congress, 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007. Any questions, comments, or concerns? Simply reply to this email or give Team Crenshaw a call at 281-888-4016. | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS | | Dan Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007 | | Sent by mailto:dan.crenshaw@crenshawforcongress.com

name: The Giffords Team
subject: A few facts for you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
If more guns in more places made us safer, the United States would be the safest country in the world
#

The United States has weaker gun laws and higher rates of gun violence than any other developed country in the world.
That’s a fact.
Many right wing politicians will tell you that the answer to this problem is more guns. They’ll tell you that a “good guy with a gun” can defeat a “bad guy with a gun.”
But that’s just not the case. If more guns in more places made us safer, the United States would be the safest country in the world.
In 2021, the CDC reported a record number of gun deaths.
Gun violence is the leading cause of death for our nation’s children. Not car crashes, not cancer—our children are getting shot.
This isn’t normal. We can be a better country than this. But we need you with us.
[**If you can, please make a contribution to Giffords PAC today. Even $5 or $10 can go a long way in our work to save lives.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar23.q3bw9s&refcode=em230324-1-15&t=1&akid=4782%2E3935704%2EtXK4b1)

| | | Astronaut Scott Kelly is the identical twin of Senator Mark Kelly of Arizona (himself a former astronaut). Scott Kelly, who lives in Houston, has been [dropping hints](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1cf0e77d-e8b3-4a96-95c0-706b24e848ce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) that he might run against Ted Cruz in 2024. **Urge him to do it!** Kelly would be a formidable candidate, and could beat Cruz. He has set records in space (once spending 340 straight days aboard the International Space Station), and that's an especially big deal in Texas (Houston is the home of NASA's Johnson Space Center). Cruz has won narrowly in the past, and he is beatable. He is also a terrible senator and a terrible person, and the Senate would be a much better place without him. Let's make it happen. Show Kelly that if he takes the plunge, he will have strong support. [**Add your name: Urge Astronaut Scott Kelly to Run against Ted Cruz >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta29231f9-d143-42c1-bd06-10614d22e03c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | Astronaut Scott Kelly is the identical twin of Senator Mark Kelly of Arizona (himself a former astronaut). Scott Kelly, who lives in Houston, has been that he might run against Ted Cruz in 2024. Urge him to do it! Kelly would be a formidable candidate, and could beat Cruz. He has set records in space (once spending 340 straight days aboard the International Space Station), and that's an especially big deal in Texas (Houston is the home of NASA's Johnson Space Center). Cruz has won narrowly in the past, and he is beatable. He is also a terrible senator and a terrible person, and the Senate would be a much better place without him. Let's make it happen. Show Kelly that if he takes the plunge, he will have strong support. | | | | | | | Thank you, Left Action [P.S. - if you no longer with to receive updates, use the unsubscribe link below] | | | | | | Other things you can do: Follow us on and * Follow Us | | | ---|---|--- | LeftAction Washington, District of Columbia info@leftaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | or

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: A metaphor about plane tickets
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=19884%2E3422442%2E7U4Dgq)
Derek, you're going to hear a lot from us this coming week about our "end of quarter deadline" and how reporting a strong number shows the strength of our movement.
**But this isn't _just_ about reporting an impressive haul. We're going to need a warchest to compete in this competitve and expensive race** because running in California simply costs more than running in other states. **Our state features two of the country's six most expensive TV media markets.**
But by donating now while we're still eleven months out from Election Day, you can make our dollars go further. Like with airplane tickets, reserving TV ad time in advance gets you the best rates and best time slots. **Having to book your TV ads at the last minute is basically like paying top dollar for a middle seat.**
Simple geography plays a role in the cost of our race, too. Traveling the state and organizing in diverse and different communities from north to south will take a lot of advance planning and a big budget. As a single mom of three, Katie knows the value of planning ahead and prudent budgeting.
[**Can you make a contribution today to help Katie win this competitive and expensive race? Now is one of the most useful times you can do so.**](https://act.katieporter.com/go/16582?t=2&akid=19884%2E3422442%2E7U4Dgq)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230324-1?refcode=EMAF24_1_EOQ_20230324_V1_F&refcode2=19884_3422442_7U4Dgq&akid=19884%2E3422442%2E7U4Dgq)**
Thanks so much for being a part of Team Porter!

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF24_1_EOQ_20230324_V1_F&t=3&refcode2=19884_3422442_7U4Dgq&akid=19884%2E3422442%2E7U4Dgq)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=4&akid=19884%2E3422442%2E7U4Dgq)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=19884%2E3422442%2E7U4Dgq)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

name: Courier Newsroom Team
subject: Help us build the largest left-leaning local news network in the nation
body:
Here’s how we cut through the noise.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=756%2E120351%2EsVaADS)
Peter,
From right-wing online disinformation to mainstream media who care more about profits than serving the public good, it’s no wonder that _185 million Americans don’t trust the news_. At Courier Newsroom, we’re doing something to fix that.
As the nation's largest left-leaning local news network, we run newsrooms in eight key battleground states (and counting) where disinformation is spreading the fastest. Every day, our talented journalists deliver factual news to readers who live in areas where honest, local news is hard to find. We take the responsibility of delivering good information seriously and will never compromise the truth or our values in our work.
**We fight disinformation by providing trustworthy local news to those who need it most.** You can power our work by investing in Courier Newsroom with a donation today. [**Will you become a founding donor to Courier so we can expand our network of left-leaning local newsrooms?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/428?refcode=em-20230324&t=2&akid=756%2E120351%2EsVaADS)
**[DONATE »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/428?refcode=em-20230324&t=3&akid=756%2E120351%2EsVaADS)**
**Your contribution will help us spread the word about Courier and fund our eight local newsrooms already operating in critical battleground states.** From hiring journalists to targeting content on social media to expanding our operations in new communities — founding donors like you can help provide quality news to places where it currently doesn’t exist.
**Your support couldn’t come at a more critical time.** Local newsrooms are disappearing, and right-wing misinformation and disinformation have taken their place. This pattern has become so pervasive that millions of Americans now believe in dangerous conspiracies about our democracy. **We’re fighting back with an innovative local news model that attacks right-wing propaganda and misinformation at its source. At Courier newsroom:**
* We focus on audiences without access to quality reporting who are often targeted by bad actors spreading false or misleading information.
* We don’t chase profits, and we don’t use jargon or paywalls. We create meaningful, factual content that matters to the lives and communities of our readers.
* We target our news to the spaces where real people spend their time — on social media newsfeeds, across inboxes, and in search engines where people look for information online.

In other words, we’re doing something radically different to fight the spread of bad information. And the best part? Our research shows we’ve already started to increase civic participation among our audiences. We know our model works.
**Right now, we’re mobilizing a community of founding donors who want to help fight disinformation in their local communities, and we’re hoping you’ll join us.** Together, we can beat the right-wing propaganda machines, reclaim our voices in our local communities, and strengthen our democracy for good.
[**Please, chip in any amount meaningful to you and become a founding donor today. With your help, we can grow our network of left-leaning local newsrooms and fight back against dangerous lies and disinformation.**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/428?refcode=em-20230324&t=4&akid=756%2E120351%2EsVaADS)
Together,
Courier Newsroom Team

**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=756_120351_sVaADS&akid=756%2E120351%2EsVaADS)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=756%2E120351%2EsVaADS)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

name: Salud Carbajal
subject: Are you committed to taking back the House?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress
body:
What a difference a year makes. Last year, under Democratic leadership, we passed legislation to address some of the many challenges facing our nation, like access to affordable healthcare, finding commonsense solutions to the gun violence epidemic, and combating climate change.

This year, House Republicans have demonstrated they’re more interested in protecting billionaire tax cheats and defending conspiracy theorists than in passing legislation to better the lives of everyday Americans.

I am committed to doing all I can to take back the House in 2024. That means registering new voters and organizing earlier than ever before. Will you visit https://secure.ngpvan.com/50cEwJ7_TE-rOzbdtMEoPA2 to help us raise the resources we need to take back the House next year?

California’s primary election is less than a year away, and believe me, there is a whole new crew of right-wing extremists who are already looking at seats to flip. Our campaign to take back the House won’t be successful unless we act now, and I hope I can count on you to join me.

Please visit https://secure.ngpvan.com/50cEwJ7_TE-rOzbdtMEoPA2 to chip in and join our campaign to take back the House in 2024.

Thank you for your support.

Sincerely,
Salud Carbajal

Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress
PO Box 1290, Santa Barbara, CA 93102
info@saludcarbajal.com; www.saludcarbajal.com

For instance:

* Restricting (even further) the ability to access abortion care.

---

As Speaker of the House, it is my duty to defend our majority, expand our ranks, and deliver for YOU.

Truly, this isn't about me - it's about protecting my incumbents and boosting GOP momentum so we can best serve YOU.

People think that they need to write huge checks to make a difference, but that's simply not the case. House Republicans are powered by the donations of grassroots patriots like YOU.

Asking for money is my least favorite part of campaigning, but Pelosi just took Hakeem Jeffries on a national fundraising tour that could devastate our ranks if we don't respond in kind.

Any contribution can make ALL the difference in setting the tone for this GOP Majority and what we can accomplish, but if everyone sits out, we're DONE.

clean_body: Help us send a powerful message | | Peter, Every three months, our campaign has to submit a quarterly report to the Federal Election Commission. After the upcoming deadline on March 31st, everyone will be looking through these reports with a fine-tooth comb — reporters, election analysts, and future opponents looking for any sign of weakness. So, how do we put up a strong Q1 FEC report? By sending a resounding message that Becca is STILL running one of the largest small-dollar campaigns Vermont has ever seen. We are officially ONE WEEK OUT from our first FEC deadline of 2023.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = When Becca ran to represent Vermont in Congress, she faced one of the most competitive primary elections in decades. Candidates raised and spent hundreds of thousands of dollars in order to execute statewide campaigns and cover operational costs – and it’s likely that we’ll need to be prepared to do it again. This grassroots movement has the strength and scrappiness needed to hit goals, meet deadlines, and send powerful messages. Now, this is our first opportunity of the year to prove it. = | = ---|--- Thank you for helping us finish the quarter strong, Becca Balint Finance Team = If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, **If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can . If you prefer to contribute by check, you are welcome to send a contribution to the campaign at the address below. To comply with Federal law, we must use our best efforts to obtain, maintain and submit the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. Thank you in advance for including that information along with your check. | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont Becca for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05302 United States

**We must** show that this movement is powerful enough to carry state Democrats to victory in 2023, 2024, and beyond. **But first, we need to hit our $250,000 end-of-quarter fundraising goal.**

clean_body: We need to show that this movement is powerful enough to carry state Democrats to victory in 2023, 2024, and beyond. | | | | | Hi, it’s DLCC President Jessica Post. In a few moments, – but first, I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain why your support right now, is so important: We’re coming off a historic midterm year – state Democrats defied the odds last November, defending each of our existing majorities, flipping key chambers, and securing four new democratic trifectas. But I need to level with you: Republicans were anticipating HUGE victories in the midterms – and after suffering some major losses, they won’t miss a single opportunity to gain ground in the states. Now, the GOP is pouring money into battleground states like Wisconsin and Virginia, and right now, we don’t have the funds we need to compete with their right-wing mega-donors. That’s why a coalition of generous donors is stepping up ahead of our critical end-of-quarter deadline to match each donation to our movement five times – so your $7 donation will have a $35 impact to build our progressive power in the states. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | This is our first major deadline of 2023 – and it’s critical that we show our victories in the midterms weren’t just a fluke, but the result of strategic investment, organizing, and this powerful grassroots movement we’ve built. We must make it crystal clear that grassroots Democrats are standing united against Republicans’ extreme, unpopular agenda of attacks on abortion access, voting rights, and the LGBTQ+ community. We must show that this movement is powerful enough to carry state Democrats to victory in 2023, 2024, and beyond. But first, we need to hit our $250,000 end-of-quarter fundraising goal. Thank you for fueling this people-powered movement – together, we can continue building Democratic power and fighting for progress in statehouses across the country. Let's go, Jessica Post President, Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Gregg Johnson
subject: My constituents need this railroad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
I need your help to get it done, Peter. | | | Hi Peter – Let me introduce myself. I'm Gregg Johnson, Illinois state representative for the 72nd District. I grew up in the county that I now have the privilege of serving. I'm proud to come from a blue-collar union family. My father worked at a local plant, and when it shut down, he lost his job like many other workers in our town. I'm committed to making sure that my hometown has economic promise and resilience so that closures like the one my father had to face don't devastate the future of Rock Island County families. **Infrastructure development happens through important partnerships between private businesses, local, state, and federal governments - and people just like you, Peter.** Adding a rail route from Chicago to Moline, situated at the heart of Rock Island County, will result in tremendous economic opportunities. **We need to expand the rail line and put an Amtrak station in the 72nd District, but it's been held up for decades.** We need to hold the Illinois Department of Transportation, Iowa Interstate Railroad, and Amtrak accountable for providing this critical service to the people of Rock Island County. **Promises were made, and it's long overdue that they be kept.** **[Peter, my friends at United Rural Democrats and I are putting the pressure on government officials to get this rail expansion approved. Will you split a contribution between URD and my campaign as we help expand infrastructure in rural America?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zL_Y8dQw478MnlfgJHtjNUwmnkgYFsT0B81g60T2RwIZWZ1QFFWRTHzl-MSCSYXP3_5ogud56KS_i0AGo5higeZpmObkW_vXTBLfDjc3oMWyBv2DFf75ZQSJXQAE-qSkjb3-U2DptU11aKmUxJatghXylQd8uNQvBp18ij1_ZS-ZK1uSfT-1tL9R3ebsXhEPouOaC8v0rgLw5HYiH1Rff0lkGlRsBkK__5II74AZkoY8dztoWYXQ-L2-Y7ZPIWEfUOMr1P6dx4_5KZ5SKg_RaWdMAQ74jk16v3kBn1jOY1Qy81xNP40eOQ6u6_iI1mxetx51pVTim1gENkjhWLmJsUZNMRev4742hvI9d6-A2avw/3ur/hiStDg67TQimvW-DYaEZPg/h0/qDrM8s3m_uctaTZR0Peiu4P9gz2b-Ct4MCLpj3JlmsA)** **[DONATE HERE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zL_Y8dQw478MnlfgJHtjNUwmnkgYFsT0B81g60T2RwIZWZ1QFFWRTHzl-MSCSYXP3tdxNPwMzBvmXONAIc_r_U7otNublXzyvhL3brKSpF2TOGOOo_ib5mXpnoqHD4VCyvMParhezuSt5PokxqZxwml6OCrKo9TgT2Y659BnmlnCgRQ8FcO7afqRODwzyxzVKNuZPOw3TUQXct30ZT_le5j-RaeDqOEYkmil2YC7sGiw1lI-dN1Mfg_kwmwt0GC8AyReznqMV6l78-S_Epi2kUbq3IA5SWM0Z5T2lW6po_vpZD2QBSBxb0SEm-4QSGpMD4RMvtQgan5hFR6CBsV5X1Lv2QWsU5mJXfAJF_nuBqMA/3ur/hiStDg67TQimvW-DYaEZPg/h1/V3eq-ryO38M7bdTqtA4DKU50ROBmKyakE-d8csLnIIU)** Thank you for your support, Peter.

clean_body: I need your help to get it done, Peter. | | | Hi Peter – Let me introduce myself. I'm Gregg Johnson, Illinois state representative for the 72nd District. I grew up in the county that I now have the privilege of serving. I'm proud to come from a blue-collar union family. My father worked at a local plant, and when it shut down, he lost his job like many other workers in our town. I'm committed to making sure that my hometown has economic promise and resilience so that closures like the one my father had to face don't devastate the future of Rock Island County families. Infrastructure development happens through important partnerships between private businesses, local, state, and federal governments - and people just like you, Peter. Adding a rail route from Chicago to Moline, situated at the heart of Rock Island County, will result in tremendous economic opportunities. We need to expand the rail line and put an Amtrak station in the 72nd District, but it's been held up for decades. We need to hold the Illinois Department of Transportation, Iowa Interstate Railroad, and Amtrak accountable for providing this critical service to the people of Rock Island County. Promises were made, and it's long overdue that they be kept. Thank you for your support, Peter. -Gregg Johnson United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

Sinema had a lot to say about her former partymates:
* Sinema gave the literal (not metaphorical) **middle finger to President Biden’s Chief of Staff, Ron Klain** , in a room full of Republican lobbyists and bragged about not returning his calls.
* Sinema called Senate Democratic caucus lunches **“ridiculous”** and **“dumb”** and reiterates: “I’m not caucusing with the Democrats”
* Sinema**“derides” Chuck Schumer in “harshly critical terms”** according to Republican sources and even**“mocked” Joe Manchin.**
* When a Republican donor said Sinema “carried the water for us in this last Congress,” she responded: “You’re hired.”
* **“She’s the biggest egomaniac in the Senate”** said one of her colleagues.
* “One potential arrangement: Sinema could remain an independent but caucus with the Republicans in exchange for a ceasefire in spending.”

**[We have to let everyone in Arizona know all that’s at stake–could you make a contribution to help us get the word out?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcRPzdKhnXWZRb6mxngInpV_Ym5cGqWtgUWkapuYA3cw-930ZKMtqkHi3A9k2hl0eC7BhAxZFOIR-T4Kyg8QNvl30Qx1n5zCeGnH0TmgPG63OiJJwDHvWonVN7UvIg2A_DVOzIrxPvPIj7xuLfo9fwPgrpBZt_azKw4J0I2lrrLm-zkD8tyUBf-T6OL4K9PGdZ8X_kqhNCaZbj-C29hmVbjSq5--6GCI1wu-enTgMJt_vDVwvpts8lN2yrofb_B2aTGKaWhB1iL5c3lDCAFgQEbZbedjofO0xqrWVw9goD7dL-dkzWTwSMt9DR6dEpoyMVa5mvJgI6VNJmyoJ6HOWLRg/3ur/eT_WuEVpQQKmYwMpQOmrAA/h7/Bvy01Knr-B18WuUhqScFz7RsCUemIclvDVg5cDSGzFI)**

clean_body: Sinema is trash talking Dems to court GOP donors | | Peter – did you see our message yesterday? Yesterday Politico published an explosive story detailing how Kyrsten Sinema bashed Democrats and even“quite literally gave the middle finger to President Biden’s White House.” All so she could raise a ton of money from Republicans and hedge fund managers. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Sinema had a lot to say about her former partymates: Sinema gave the literal (not metaphorical) middle finger to President Biden’s Chief of Staff, Ron Klain , in a room full of Republican lobbyists and bragged about not returning his calls. Sinema called Senate Democratic caucus lunches “ridiculous” and “dumb” and reiterates: “I’m not caucusing with the Democrats” Sinema“derides” Chuck Schumer in “harshly critical terms” according to Republican sources and even“mocked” Joe Manchin. When a Republican donor said Sinema “carried the water for us in this last Congress,” she responded: “You’re hired.” “She’s the biggest egomaniac in the Senate” said one of her colleagues. “One potential arrangement: Sinema could remain an independent but caucus with the Republicans in exchange for a ceasefire in spending.” We depend on small, grassroots fundraising to keep our campaign going, unlike Sinema. So we’re really grateful for all your support. -Replace Sinema & Change for Arizona 2024 —Previous Email— Peter – did you see this? reporting gives us a look at fresh comments Kyrsten Sinema has made about Democrats, and they’re not pretty. Sinema even had the audacity to give the middle finger to President Biden’s Chief of Staff in a room full of Republican lobbyists! She trashed Chuck Schumer and even Joe Manchin. No Democrat was spared in her attempts to suck up to Republicans for campaign cash. Sinema is obviously gearing up for 2024 , and she has more fundraisers scheduled in Maui and California. Here’s one hair-raising scenario newly floated today: “Sinema could remain an independent but caucus with the Republicans in exchange for a ceasefire in spending from the National Republican Senatorial Committee and McConnell’s Super PAC.” We need to raise** several million dollarsin order to beat Sinema, beat the Republicans, and make sure a Democrat wins this race. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | -Replace Sinema PAC & Change for Arizona 2024 Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC. | | Sent via . name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: We never want to take your support for granted
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We know that you've been receiving a lot of emails lately, but it's
because we're currently facing a make-or-break deadline for our movement.
The future of Justice Democrats is on the line.

Our team has been working hard to interview and vet potential 2024 JD
candidates, and now we're focusing in on a group of five corporate
Democrat incumbents to target — all supported by corporate PACs. But in
order to finish the candidate recruitment phase and begin supporting these
insurgent campaigns, we need the resources to hit our $250,000
end-of-quarter fundraising goal.

To expand our power in Congress and defeat out-of-touch incumbents, we
need to keep growing our movement every year. We need the support of as
many people as possible — including you,
Peter. But according to our records, you have
yet to chip in to support our mission to elect progressive champions like
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez.

We understand you may not have been in a position to donate before, but
with our first end-of-quarter deadline of 2023 coming up quickly, we're
hoping we can count on you to make your first donation today.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132189?refcode=em20230324-28141&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=28141%2E1203867%2EIFk4dJ ]Will you consider making your first $3 donation right
now to help elect the next slate of Justice Democrats?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132189?refcode=em20230324-28141&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=28141%2E1203867%2EIFk4dJ ]Donate $3

Everything we do — from cutting-edge political research on districts and
incumbents, to recruiting revolutionary progressive leaders to run for
office, to supporting their insurgent campaigns from start to finish, to
helping our victorious candidates transition to their new seats in
Congress — it all comes down to the resources we fundraise from our own
grassroots base.

Support from committed people like you, all over the country, powers our
work and allows us to build a better future for our communities cycle
after cycle. None of this could happen without you, which is why we're
coming to you today to humbly ask for your help to hit our $250,000
end-of-quarter goal.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132189?refcode=em20230324-28141&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=28141%2E1203867%2EIFk4dJ ]Peter, if
you're able, please make your
first donation
immediately to boost our fundraising ahead of March 31.

Thanks for your support today,

Justice Democrats

*This data only reflects donations made online with this email address. If
you’ve made a previous contribution via check or with a different email
address, you may not see it here — but know that the entire Justice
Democrats team is deeply grateful for your support.

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1006&akid=28141%2E1203867%2EIFk4dJ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1007&akid=28141%2E1203867%2EIFk4dJ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230324-28141-footer&t=1008&refcode2=28141_1203867_IFk4dJ&akid=28141%2E1203867%2EIFk4dJ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1009&akid=28141%2E1203867%2EIFk4dJ

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932

name: Ronda Kennedy
subject: Ready for the Fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ronda Kennedy for Senate**
body:
My race for the U.S. Senate has already been called a "nail-biter."

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478076:JPZwKZGaN:m:1:3365131770:E16D0C36F64BEFF6E1702F906C2B969C:r "Headline") Peter, My race for the U.S. Senate has already been called a "**nail-biter**." I entered this race because I knew, like the pundits have opined, that my opponent is "extremely vulnerable." But it's early and that's why I need your early support. **[Will you help me ensure the GOP wins another U.S. Senate seat? Donate TODAY to keep my opponent"extremely vulnerable" and help me keep the momentum going!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478076:JPZwKZGaN:m:1:3365131770:E16D0C36F64BEFF6E1702F906C2B969C:r "Will you help me ensure the GOP wins another U.S. Senate seat?
Donate TODAY to keep my opponent “extremely vulnerable“ and help me keep the momentum going!")** Jacky Rosen has been a rubber-stamp for the radical leftist policies of Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer. **It 's catching up with her and that's why she only has a 37% favorability rating.** [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478076:JPZwKZGaN:m:1:3365131770:E16D0C36F64BEFF6E1702F906C2B969C:r "Compare") **She votes with Chuck Schumer 100% of the time and Bernie Sanders 95% of the time.** With Jacky in the U.S. Senate, they'll continue to:
* Spend trillions on wasteful programs.
* Regulate our banks with laws written by Elizabeth Warren.
* Force Businesses to comply with policies written by Bernie Sanders.
* Fund propaganda that teaches our children to hate our country and to obtain gender reassignment surgeries.
* Codify abortion into federal law, and
* Advocate for laws that erase our 2nd Amendment Rights.

The left knows the odds. They know their agenda could be in jeopardy and that's why we can't assume they'll take this news lying down. **[Donate today and help me return America back to a nation of Greatness that our children can enjoy for generations to come.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478076:JPZwKZGaN:m:1:3365131770:E16D0C36F64BEFF6E1702F906C2B969C:r "Donate today and help me return America back to a nation of
Greatness that our children can enjoy for generations to come.")** I'm spent my life keeping government accountable to the people. And with the demographics in Nevada changing, I'll have more in common with our voters who are tired of the same old politicians who promise a lot and delivery very little. As a mother, wife, businesswoman, attorney, patriot and the great, great granddaughter of a runaway slave, I have the personal fortitude it takes to stand up to Biden and the radical left. **I 'm the force that will not stop.** I'm running to keep America free from the left's tyranny and unconstitutional edicts that seek to control us. I'm the force that will stand up to Biden, Schumer and their leftist allies and say:
* No More trampling on our Constitution
* No More defunding the police
* No More criminal-first agenda
* No More Amnesty programs.
* No More progressive spending programs
* No More radical progressives in the courts.

But I can't do that unless you help me keep up the momentum. **[Please donate TODAY and put a conservative fighter in the U.S. Senate.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478075:JPZwKZGaN:m:1:3365131770:E16D0C36F64BEFF6E1702F906C2B969C:r "Please donate TODAY and put a conservative fighter in the U.S.
Senate.")** My opponent will now be leaning heavily on liberal billionaires and the K- Street crowd to overcome her new "extremely vulnerable" status, and we need to work twice as hard to keep her where she belongs--on the sidelines. Your support will be the only thing that keeps her there. **[Help me fight for our nation!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478076:JPZwKZGaN:m:1:3365131770:E16D0C36F64BEFF6E1702F906C2B969C:r "Help me fight for our nation!")** For a Better Tomorrow, Ronda Kennedy
Republican for Senate
---
| **Paid for by Ronda Kennedy for Senate**
---

name: Delegate John McGuire III
subject: Sour Grapes
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire
body:
---
| | | | | | Seventy Plus Endorsement List [Click Here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hGneDk_5K0XzcjIjIh5BJyS2aQVtA4_VlJHAnrEWmUdbyQPncz06ZXWogDaA_v7XEXTsAkhHUfuAgLvnPLaRb6ZenbAAVKMsDCneoo2gwPQCgMlqubizDhnGHVsvH0-BtLwoI2fskja7q-oGXkdwb8I9x5zHEDvpmMJW3AwvKgEzYZkQv9CljA==&c=J-t9Bk9xg2j-h3fTLIV-vtlRS7oYiozJUPp9MZWnfPLNIzdVjajpqA==&ch=43cTzu18VeCZYlV0mnkyQuo6xnFvoKUB-cVUbFsO9vrTdhLGiElHeA==)
---
|
---
| Sour Grapes
---
| Wednesday night, we sent out a [highly watched video Click Here ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hGneDk_5K0XzcjIjIh5BJyS2aQVtA4_VlJHAnrEWmUdbyQPncz06ZeU2-oYo5RDI5_yAVTVUnCJ0SKxtg1kNtXr8X9EAqzGlgdSpWqHDsVqL9g2vYjJxOneW3k5Twzh6hnXbPuiF7yJxL5xdeUpxKFOAjMm8kya6PydGP4ouaI0tw8GS8Fx3T1pU4hYASWaetjrzcPBW2gsGvTGo64DLzF_f8oBO4u_WC9laORw_KLXd-w2hEjISywQOzfoLCw56Qsh1EuyQRtY=&c=J-t9Bk9xg2j-h3fTLIV-vtlRS7oYiozJUPp9MZWnfPLNIzdVjajpqA==&ch=43cTzu18VeCZYlV0mnkyQuo6xnFvoKUB-cVUbFsO9vrTdhLGiElHeA==)with the closing comments from the Louisa GOP Debate. This video was highlighted by my opponent, now running as a Republican, Duane Adams, having a Meltdown and Mudslinging. Clearly, this video evidence was effective as we received comments across the district of Adam's supporters flipping to McGuire because of Duane's behavior, his history of running three times as a Democrat for the House of Delegates, his recent record of raising taxes in Louisa County each year, and more.
Quote:
"I was supporting a different candidate, but switched to McGuire yesterday after seeing the debate video. That video showed me nothing will rattle McGuire and we need more leaders that won't be rattled."
I stand by my conservative record and achievements in the House of Delegates and I am proud to be one of only nine, out of one hundred and forty legislators, to earn the highest award for conservatism in Virginia. I do not have a history of flip-flopping between parties or raising taxes. You will not have to guess how I will vote in the Senate, and I will never forget the Senate District 10 seat belongs to the people.
Duane doubled down on Sour Grapes by sending out a video the next day from his official campaign YouTube channel with Bob Good, explaining why he supports three-time Democrat Duane Adams, who clearly still governs/ behaves like a Democrat.
I'm not going to get into mudslinging with Duane or Bob. But I disagree with many of the statements made by both of them. Bob is supporting Duane because, when referring to John McGuire in the video, Bob said, "He tried to primary me". Most reasonable people will say, "So what?" or "What does that even mean?" More importantly, our country is hanging by a thread, so we should be working together as Republicans to do something about it.
Facts:
During redistricting, my team and I considered and explored many options to continue serving, that is true; especially since my House of Delegate district was chopped into five pieces.
The fact is though, I never primaried Bob, never filed for the 5th, never raised a dollar for the 5th, and never announced for the 5th.
Bob can endorse whomever he wants, and honestly it is none of my business. It is a free country, but I will say being upset about someone having the "gall" to consider a run against you probably should not be the criteria to support a candidate for Senate. Especially when that candidate is a three-time democrat, who continually raises taxes and calls others, including a constituent, a coward.
But, I am going to focus on Virginia. Republicans control the House and the Governor's mansion but Senate Democrats keep killing our efforts to un-California Virginia. This race is too important to have personal vendettas. We need to send a solid conservative to the Senate to take back our beloved Commonwealth and un-California Virginia. God willing, and with your help, we will win the convention May 6 at Buckingham County high School!
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hGneDk_5K0XzcjIjIh5BJyS2aQVtA4_VlJHAnrEWmUdbyQPncz06ZdFLiq8KTRRx2_I1NmyOIXk3jUiOw9Vw2nmo9ABC3BmsTiMB8cTYsEils9H47zs8cXVVFWc90vRjSof6wU8RV-daOv4XEo-5dOzf2xaYioCa&c=J-t9Bk9xg2j-h3fTLIV-vtlRS7oYiozJUPp9MZWnfPLNIzdVjajpqA==&ch=43cTzu18VeCZYlV0mnkyQuo6xnFvoKUB-cVUbFsO9vrTdhLGiElHeA==)
---
| Convention Form Deadline Friday March 24
Powhatan County
---
| We will have a Senate District 10 Convention on May 6. You will not be able to vote for me unless you complete the Delegate Form.
The deadline to turn in delegate forms for Powhatan County is 5pm Friday March 24. Please let your friends know they can go to www.john4va.com and easily print the form. You can then scan the delegate form and email to me john@mcguireforvirgina.com
Please ask/ share this email with friends and family.
At the top of the form for "Unit" put your county. Reach out to our team at john@mcguireforvirginia.com or call 804 588 2646 with questions and to turn in your form.
---
| I'm running for State Senate so we can un-California Virginia. It starts with election integrity. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district!
---

clean_body: | | | | | | Seventy Plus Endorsement List == | | Sour Grapes | Wednesday night, we sent out a the closing comments from the Louisa GOP Debate. This video was highlighted by my opponent, now running as a Republican, Duane Adams, having a Meltdown and Mudslinging. Clearly, this video evidence was effective as we received comments across the district of Adam's supporters flipping to McGuire because of Duane's behavior, his history of running three times as a Democrat for the House of Delegates, his recent record of raising taxes in Louisa County each year, and more. Quote: "I was supporting a different candidate, but switched to McGuire yesterday after seeing the debate video. That video showed me nothing will rattle McGuire and we need more leaders that won't be rattled." I stand by my conservative record and achievements in the House of Delegates and I am proud to be one of only nine, out of one hundred and forty legislators, to earn the highest award for conservatism in Virginia. I do not have a history of flip-flopping between parties or raising taxes. You will not have to guess how I will vote in the Senate, and I will never forget the Senate District 10 seat belongs to the people. Duane doubled down on Sour Grapes by sending out a video the next day from his official campaign YouTube channel with Bob Good, explaining why he supports three-time Democrat Duane Adams, who clearly still governs/ behaves like a Democrat. I'm not going to get into mudslinging with Duane or Bob. But I disagree with many of the statements made by both of them. Bob is supporting Duane because, when referring to John McGuire in the video, Bob said, "He tried to primary me". Most reasonable people will say, "So what?" or "What does that even mean?" More importantly, our country is hanging by a thread, so we should be working together as Republicans to do something about it. Facts: During redistricting, my team and I considered and explored many options to continue serving, that is true; especially since my House of Delegate district was chopped into five pieces. The fact is though, I never primaried Bob, never filed for the 5th, never raised a dollar for the 5th, and never announced for the 5th. Bob can endorse whomever he wants, and honestly it is none of my business. It is a free country, but I will say being upset about someone having the "gall" to consider a run against you probably should not be the criteria to support a candidate for Senate. Especially when that candidate is a three-time democrat, who continually raises taxes and calls others, including a constituent, a coward. But, I am going to focus on Virginia. Republicans control the House and the Governor's mansion but Senate Democrats keep killing our efforts to un-California Virginia. This race is too important to have personal vendettas. We need to send a solid conservative to the Senate to take back our beloved Commonwealth and un-California Virginia. God willing, and with your help, we will win the convention May 6 at Buckingham County high School! | == | Convention Form Deadline Friday March 24 Powhatan County | We will have a Senate District 10 Convention on May 6. You will not be able to vote for me unless you complete the Delegate Form. The deadline to turn in delegate forms for Powhatan County is 5pm Friday March 24. Please let your friends know they can go to www.john4va.com and easily print the form. You can then scan the delegate form and email to me john@mcguireforvirgina.com Please ask/ share this email with friends and family. At the top of the form for "Unit" put your county. Reach out to our team at john@mcguireforvirginia.com or call 804 588 2646 with questions and to turn in your form. | I'm running for State Senate so we can un-California Virginia. It starts with election integrity. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district! | Seventy Plus Endorsement List == | | | | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Running for == in 2023 Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro-Life == Pro-Gun America 1st Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 == NFIB 100 Endorsement List == == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | Friends of John McGuire | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

name: Allen West
subject: Subject or citizen?
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62477876:6kHtKZGNn:m:1:3391001263:DA0F3731A9D25AC557C355F625DAC084:r)
---
| | Are you a Citizen? Or a Subject? It's time to decide. Because there is a well-funded, well-organized and growing movement to take away the single most important Constitutional Freedom that keeps us free ... The Constitutional Right keeps the wolves at your door and the tyrants in our government at bay ... It's your Right to KEEP AND BEAR ARMS -- and it's the one you're in imminent danger of losing if we, the people, don't stand up to protect it. [**Will you take a stand for your Second Amendment Rights today?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62477876:6kHtKZGNn:m:1:3391001263:DA0F3731A9D25AC557C355F625DAC084:r) Peter, there's reason I was issued a rifle when I joined the Army ... It's because when all else fails, a firearm is ultimately what determines who's in charge. I know it... You know it ... **That's why Joe Biden and his friends on the Radical Left want you dis-armed.** They'd much rather RULE over SUBJECTS than ANSWER to CITIZENS! There are a lot of groups out there "pledging" to protect your Second Amendment Rights. You've probably got a drawer full of their folding knives ... A few of their duffle bags ... Maybe even a vest or a membership card in your wallet. BUT HERE'S THE THING ... After 50 years of sending out membership renewal notices, pocketknives, and plastic cards, why are your 2nd Amendment Rights in more danger of being taken away from you than they have ever been? But that's where you'll find the Second Amendment Institute. The Second Amendment Institute is a brand-new kind of Amendment advocacy group. A group more concerned with action than image ... [**Will you join the growing membership of the Second Amendment Institute through a donation today?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62477876:6kHtKZGNn:m:1:3391001263:DA0F3731A9D25AC557C355F625DAC084:r) Your much-needed support will help us run into the fight with a multi-pronged attack -- just like our enemies have launched against us:
---
* Legal Battles to protect your 2nd Amendment Rights ... * Our one-of-a-kind Outreach to young people on college campuses * Our Partnership with pro-2nd Amendment Legislators * Our National Conferences and Online Community
---
You don't have to come to one of our conferences, testify in a courtroom or march in the street to get involved with what we're doing here at SAI. That's why our membership and online community has now surpassed the 4.2 MILLION mark!! But one name is missing from that list of over 4.2 million -YOURS!! [**Can you spare a donation to join the Second Amendment Institute and save your Second Amendment Right to bear arms today?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62477876:6kHtKZGNn:m:1:3391001263:DA0F3731A9D25AC557C355F625DAC084:r) If this seems like a strange way to ask for your support today, you're right -- I told you that SAI is different! But different is good -- it's going to get the job done -- it's going to save your Right to Keep and Bear Arms. Now let's get to work together. God bless you and God Bless America,
---
---
Lieutenant Colonel Allen B. West (US Army, Ret) Member, 112th US Congress
---
P.S. Here's something else that's different about The Second Amendment Institute -- you get to choose your membership cost. That's right -- you read that correctly. Tyler Yzaguirre, the President of SAI, has shared with me that if [**everyone I write to today could spare a gift, that should just about cover what they have planned in the months ahead, and even allow them to grow their outreach efforts**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62477876:6kHtKZGNn:m:1:3391001263:DA0F3731A9D25AC557C355F625DAC084:r)
---
[**DONATE NOW**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62477876:6kHtKZGNn:m:1:3391001263:DA0F3731A9D25AC557C355F625DAC084:r)
---
|
---
|
---

name: Greisa at United We Dream Action
subject: Atrévete a ser feliz
body:
All women deserve to be unafraid to take pride in who we are and where we come from. | | | Peter, This Women’s History Month, I’m reminded why I dedicate my work to my mom, Elia Rosas. Growing up in Texas, I watched my parents work hard to give me and my sisters a good life. But at every turn, I also saw deep injustice and felt like we were not always welcome. I saw injustice toward my mother, who lived her life without health insurance and who, because of her lack of status, struggled to get the care she needed for her cancer diagnosis. But even through dark days, my mother never wavered in her convictions. She dared us to defy those who tried to tear us down by finding joy. She would say to my sisters and I, **_“Atrévete a ser feliz. Dare to be happy.”_** She instilled a fierce determination and discipline of hope in us. Hope that we could demand better for ourselves, our families, and our entire community. And that hope was manifested in action. **Hope channeled into action fueled my work as an organizer for immigrant justice, and it fuels my work today as the Executive Director of UWDA** — where we’re fighting to win dignity for undocumented youth, and ALL people. I joined the movement and found my political home in UWDA fighting for citizenship so that families like mine can:
* Have better access to health and reproductive care

* Take advantage of educational and job opportunities that have previously been denied to us

* Win the right to vote so we can deepen our political power

We’re working to ensure UWDA is a space where future generations of immigrant women of all identities are able to grow their leadership and build power — to show that we are undeniable and we are here to stay. **So, Peter, I’m personally asking: Will you make a donation to help UWDA build a better future for women and all immigrants? We’re counting on the support of grassroots allies like you to help us expand our movement, win our demands for permanent protections, and prepare for the critical immigration fights ahead.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8GLJTxvuqB6K6VPQU50VUPbPd-9qFS7vqi4n2nPHbubwuO_PYq28KQrZbXqHWkDngZg8IwOiH8Hn9Iz8dYcfm1ospCshtSUO2fAec8BT0fF-x8q8paiGf-6PtNYbB33E1Sj02x79JKqm54mLY_0OHsE2h8Ywrfwc9xFMOjsI_orDwmaO5DnECKlPMU6-KEQyRr65RaoNwMTdolq4pa7OTKgc3KGppyn9hBbXQfy4N10vhV_I426jt7vDdoMXJ2tnNB2VY9r97kB9OIWw6i9U2LNV5OlcUIJpHmwg5N102c0xy4aU3-LZnbe8vToKRJzOHILeEXnR71n48HFYHdAlj7CdquKg5eADlxnUKVAtK_VY/3ur/Bke7o7hNRqajfrNCft5jrA/h0/wAzDTslY0Qg3jYb6V2l41NTfxf8DqvQ7BWOyWHxOGWM)

clean_body: All women deserve to be unafraid to take pride in who we are and where we come from. | | | Peter, This Women’s History Month, I’m reminded why I dedicate my work to my mom, Elia Rosas. Growing up in Texas, I watched my parents work hard to give me and my sisters a good life. But at every turn, I also saw deep injustice and felt like we were not always welcome. I saw injustice toward my mother, who lived her life without health insurance and who, because of her lack of status, struggled to get the care she needed for her cancer diagnosis. But even through dark days, my mother never wavered in her convictions. She dared us to defy those who tried to tear us down by finding joy. She would say to my sisters and I, “Atrévete a ser feliz. Dare to be happy.” She instilled a fierce determination and discipline of hope in us. Hope that we could demand better for ourselves, our families, and our entire community. And that hope was manifested in action. Hope channeled into action fueled my work as an organizer for immigrant justice, and it fuels my work today as the Executive Director of UWDA — where we’re fighting to win dignity for undocumented youth, and ALL people. I joined the movement and found my political home in UWDA fighting for citizenship so that families like mine can: Have better access to health and reproductive care Take advantage of educational and job opportunities that have previously been denied to us Win the right to vote so we can deepen our political power We’re working to ensure UWDA is a space where future generations of immigrant women of all identities are able to grow their leadership and build power — to show that we are undeniable and we are here to stay. So, Peter, I’m personally asking: Will you make a donation to help UWDA build a better future for women and all immigrants? We’re counting on the support of grassroots allies like you to help us expand our movement, win our demands for permanent protections, and prepare for the critical immigration fights ahead.** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | I will continue to dare to be happy — atrévete a ser feliz — just as my mother, Elia, taught me. And I will continue to lead with fierce determination and a discipline of hope. Because all women deserve to be unafraid to take pride in who they are and where they come from. Not just on months designated to us — but every single day. Thank you for your support, Greisa Martínez Rosas Executive Director |

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: 7 days and 60 seconds
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
We only have 7 days left until this campaign’s first FEC public filing deadline.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=75%2E135344%2Epn_kEL)
**7 days. And 60 seconds. That’s what we’re asking for today.**
We only have 7 days left until this campaign’s first FEC public filing deadline on March 31. That date is the one-month mark of our Senate campaign, And importantly, it’s our first big chance to show just how strong Team Slotkin is.
That’s 7 days to put up the strongest number possible. The money we raise before this deadline will help us get in touch with voters sooner and show outside groups that we won’t be deterred by the potential of large sums of money that will be spent against us.
**And 60 seconds.**
You can make your first contribution to Elissa's Senate campaign in less than 60 seconds.
Even a quick donation of $10 is enough to help Elissa build up this campaign. Your support makes a big difference as we hire staff and plan events, like our recent launch tour, that help Elissa connect with Michiganders across the state. And with only 7 days left, we need your help now more than ever.
It may not seem like $10 will make the difference, but if everyone reading this email pitches in what they can, we’ll be able to build a campaign free of corporate PAC money that is focused on improving the lives of Michiganders and Americans alike.
[ **So here’s our ask: Can you make your first $10 contribution to Elissa Slotkin's Senate campaign? We only have 7 days left to show just how strong this team is.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-mar23.udOA3N&refcode=em230324-1-30&t=2&akid=75%2E135344%2Epn_kEL)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michigan=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: MIGOP Stands Strong to Protect YOUR Rights
body:
The Michigan Republican Party is standing strong to protect and defend your Constitutional rights. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e6e3b6acbdb8/migop-stands-strong-to-protect-your-rights?e=a2af77507c)
---
| |
---
| | Michigan Republicans,

We will not bow to the Democrat Party and the outrage mob. Yesterday the Democrat Party and their comrades in the media attempted to demand an apology from Chair Karamo.

The MIGOP communications team posted to social media a gut-wrenching photo depicting the thousands and thousands of rings of people murdered during the Holocaust. This is a result of unarmed citizens with a tyrannical government.

We MUST learn from history.

History repeats itself. This is what happens to defenseless citizens when evil people rise to power.

This administration will not apologize. Accusations of us trivializing a genocide, are false.

We must ask ourselves, why the outrage? One of the most horrific events in human history should not garner just sadness, it should also serve as learning, to _never happen again_.

We believe many of the people wanting to change our gun laws are misinformed.

Others, not so much.

They don’t want people to connect the dots, between one of the worst mass murders in human history, and the current push to disarm us.

The Michigan Republican Party upholds our platform. We will fight to defend the Constitutional Rights of _every_ American. Even those who despise us.

This administration will not apologize nor bow to the outrage mob.

Watch Chair Karamo defend our Constitutional right to keep and bear arms.

[](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=3dbf3e9b7f&e=a2af77507c)
[WATCH HIGHLIGHTS FROM PRESS CONFERENCE HERE](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=c8ecfc68ed&e=a2af77507c)

The Michigan Republican Party depends on your financial support to ensure we are operating optimally to defend **your** rights! We need to ensure our children and grandchildren inherent their usable God-given unalienable rights.

[**DONATE TODAY**](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=412265882c&e=a2af77507c)

_In Liberty,_

_The Michigan Republican Party_

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: CNN just broke the news:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---
| | This is incredible. [**CNN just reported that 18 House Republicans sit in districts that President Biden won.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60665501/397861272/1694452237?refcode=20230324_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzA5NTcyOC02MWNhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ktRbro0autUB_naYzYzilzYT5YyscX-gD9gKtdklHdc=) Let me be clear: – These districts will decide the fate of the House Majority.
– If we win them, we win the Majority — it’s as simple as that.

The Party Line — An Indiana Republican Party Newsletter
