---
# _Happy Birthday, Republican Party!_
---
On March 20, 1854, in Ripon, Wisconsin, a coalition of voters came together to form a new political party to oppose the advancement of slavery into the western United States. That party would come to be known as the Republican Party. A few months after that monumental meeting in Ripon, a well-known newspaper publisher picked up on the name "Republican," writing in his paper, "We should not care much whether those thus united _against slavery _were designated 'Whig,' 'Free Democrat' or something else. Though we think some simple name like 'Republican' would more fitly designate those who had united to restore the Union to its true mission of champion and promulgator of Liberty rather than propagandist of slavery." From our very beginning, we have been the party of freedom, opportunity, and prosperity; there's perhaps no better example of that then our first Republican president, Abraham Lincoln. And since then, we've been a party of great leaders — like Dwight Eisenhower, Ronald Reagan, and more. But that's true here in Indiana, too — think of statesmen like Benjamin Harrison, Dick Lugar, Dan Quayle, Dan Coats, Mitch Daniels, and Mike Pence, As a party, we have a proud history and an unmatched record of success. And we will continue to work to build upon this history, to fight for our proven agenda, to reach more Hoosiers, to grow our party, and elect Republicans up and down the ballot. Enjoy this week's newsletter. Sincerely,
---
---
Chairman Kyle Hupfer

# **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| |
# _Op-ed: It's Time to Toss the Textbook Tax_
---
---
| | _This week,**Governor Eric Holcomb** joined local officials and leaders and employees of Blue Buffalo, the nation’s leading natural pet food company, as they announced plans to expand the company’s operations in Richmond, creating 50-60 new jobs by the end of 2024. _
---
In a Sunday [op-ed](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/03db69bd5d786afe/f10df5f17ab10e6ec3d6b838967d376c/40313) for the Times of Northwest Indiana, **Gov. Holcomb** called for ending "the textbook fees that parents pay." "A child’s education is the key that opens the doors to their dreams and every child’s success is greatly determined by their parents and educators. That’s why I’m proud of the work we’ve accomplished thus far in making unprecedented investments in K-12 and I am committed to continue along the path of prioritizing education and your child’s future. Consistent with that mission, let’s remove barriers and provide students a free education; let’s end the textbook fees that parents pay. "In my 2023 State of the State Address, I introduced Mandy Allen, an educator in the South Vermillion School Corporation, who paid about $630 for the 2022-2023 school year for her four children. She’s not alone. Hoosiers across the state are impacted. It could be your friend, your neighbor or it could be you. Click [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/03db69bd5d786afe/ca4570c6014ee75cc3d6b838967d376c/40313) to read the full piece.

# _Indiana Republican Party Announces Members of Third Cohort of Diversity Leadership Series Program_
---
This week, we announced the members of the third cohort of our nationally-recognized seminar and leadership training program, the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series (IRDLS). The program provides the preparation and necessary resources to increase the civic engagement of minority Republicans throughout the state and bring them into leadership positions. “Each year our program has welcomed a group of Hoosiers that are driven to make a real difference in their communities, and this year is certainly no different,” stated **Chairman** **Kyle Hupfer**. “With some participants already running for local office and others getting involved in the party in other ways, I’m excited to see how this cohort will engage with the program and use it to help them develop into strong, effective leaders.” The cohort of 16 Hoosiers represents a wide range of backgrounds and includes entrepreneurs, ministers, lobbyists, financial advisors and more from communities across Indiana. Click [here ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/03db69bd5d786afe/30af4ef358204263c3d6b838967d376c/40313)to read the full news release and click [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/03db69bd5d786afe/68f0711ec950d910c3d6b838967d376c/40313) to learn more about the cohort.

# _This Week at the Statehouse_
---
Bills are once again moving from committees — some for the last time — while others have more to go through and others are headed to the governor's desk. _Priority Bills of Governor Holcomb_ All bills have been assigned to committee, with [HB 1591](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/03db69bd5d786afe/7f611fedb7489d08c3d6b838967d376c/40313) passed one of two committees this week. _Priority Bills of House Republicans_ All bills have been assigned to a committee, with [HB 1007](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/03db69bd5d786afe/264a5320675314f1c3d6b838967d376c/40313) and [1009](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/03db69bd5d786afe/7a8c89c919fcd4adc3d6b838967d376c/40313) both passing the Senate and sent back to the House with amendments. _Priority Bills of Senate Republicans_ All bills have been assigned to a committee. To stay up-to-date, visit [iga.in.gov](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/03db69bd5d786afe/d6586082957da1e2c3d6b838967d376c/40313) and the governor's bill watch page [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/03db69bd5d786afe/6e81714fa7362180c3d6b838967d376c/40313). **TOTAL BILLS SIGNED: 2**

clean_body: The Party Line — An Indiana Republican Party Newsletter | | | | Happy Birthday, Republican Party! On March 20, 1854, in Ripon, Wisconsin, a coalition of voters came together to form a new political party to oppose the advancement of slavery into the western United States. That party would come to be known as the Republican Party. A few months after that monumental meeting in Ripon, a well-known newspaper publisher picked up on the name "Republican," writing in his paper, "We should not care much whether those thus united against slavery were designated 'Whig,' 'Free Democrat' or something else. Though we think some simple name like 'Republican' would more fitly designate those who had united to restore the Union to its true mission of champion and promulgator of Liberty rather than propagandist of slavery." From our very beginning, we have been the party of freedom, opportunity, and prosperity; there's perhaps no better example of that then our first Republican president, Abraham Lincoln. And since then, we've been a party of great leaders — like Dwight Eisenhower, Ronald Reagan, and more. But that's true here in Indiana, too — think of statesmen like Benjamin Harrison, Dick Lugar, Dan Quayle, Dan Coats, Mitch Daniels, and Mike Pence, As a party, we have a proud history and an unmatched record of success. And we will continue to work to build upon this history, to fight for our proven agenda, to reach more Hoosiers, to grow our party, and elect Republicans up and down the ballot. Enjoy this week's newsletter. Sincerely, Chairman Kyle Hupfer | Forwarded this newsletter from a friend? | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Op-ed: It's Time to Toss the Textbook Tax | | This week,Governor Eric Holcomb joined local officials and leaders and employees of Blue Buffalo, the nation’s leading natural pet food company, as they announced plans to expand the company’s operations in Richmond, creating 50-60 new jobs by the end of 2024. In a Sunday for the Times of Northwest Indiana, Gov. Holcomb called for ending "the textbook fees that parents pay." "A child’s education is the key that opens the doors to their dreams and every child’s success is greatly determined by their parents and educators. That’s why I’m proud of the work we’ve accomplished thus far in making unprecedented investments in K-12 and I am committed to continue along the path of prioritizing education and your child’s future. Consistent with that mission, let’s remove barriers and provide students a free education; let’s end the textbook fees that parents pay. "In my 2023 State of the State Address, I introduced Mandy Allen, an educator in the South Vermillion School Corporation, who paid about $630 for the 2022-2023 school year for her four children. She’s not alone. Hoosiers across the state are impacted. It could be your friend, your neighbor or it could be you. Click to read the full piece. | | | Indiana Republican Party Announces Members of Third Cohort of Diversity Leadership Series Program This week, we announced the members of the third cohort of our nationally-recognized seminar and leadership training program, the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series (IRDLS). The program provides the preparation and necessary resources to increase the civic engagement of minority Republicans throughout the state and bring them into leadership positions. “Each year our program has welcomed a group of Hoosiers that are driven to make a real difference in their communities, and this year is certainly no different,” stated Chairman Kyle Hupfer. “With some participants already running for local office and others getting involved in the party in other ways, I’m excited to see how this cohort will engage with the program and use it to help them develop into strong, effective leaders.” The cohort of 16 Hoosiers represents a wide range of backgrounds and includes entrepreneurs, ministers, lobbyists, financial advisors and more from communities across Indiana. Click read the full news release and click to learn more about the cohort. | This Week at the Statehouse Bills are once again moving from committees — some for the last time — while others have more to go through and others are headed to the governor's desk. Priority Bills of Governor Holcomb All bills have been assigned to committee, with passed one of two committees this week. Priority Bills of House Republicans All bills have been assigned to a committee, with and both passing the Senate and sent back to the House with amendments. Priority Bills of Senate Republicans All bills have been assigned to a committee. To stay up-to-date, visit and the governor's bill watch page . TOTAL BILLS SIGNED: 2 | Reps. Yakym, Houchin Join House Republican Leadership for Press Conference On Sunday, Reps. Rudy Yakym and Erin Houchin joined House Republican leadership to discuss the progress made on their Commitment to America, creating an economy that's strong, a nation that's safe, a future that's built on freedom, and a government that's accountable during their annual retreat. Click to watch their remarks. | Now Hiring Interns If you know a college student that's interested in stepping into the world of Hoosier politics, we've got them covered. We're looking for young, talented Hoosiers to join us at our headquarters in Indianapolis. This opportunity allows them to get hands-on experience working for Indiana's largest and most successful political organization, providing administrative support to staff and taking on special projects (and more) while helping build their resume, gain insight into the political and legislative processes, and make valuable connections. And we'll do this all while helping them earn college credit. Have someone in mind? Send them to for more information and to apply! | | Upcoming Events Across the State Mar. 25: Mar. 30: Apr. 7: Apr. 10: Apr. 11: Apr. 13: Apr. 13: Apr. 13: Apr. 14: Apr. 14: Apr. 20: Apr. 20: Apr. 21: Apr. 21: May 4: May 6: Events past theses dates are available on our website and will be added here as we approach them. mailto:lthomas@indiana.gop?subject=Information%20for%20Upcoming%20GOP%20Event | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb on Monon South Trail Lt. Your support now is so important if we’re going to defeat Boebert in 2024. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60666448/397865219/-1392034954?refcode=X_032423_Frisch_actrs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGI2MDY1Yy02NWNhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=avXqIM2tRTvEO033yUz2yZhvu4nO0TNvbF20r86QrqA=) **** Hello, **[_In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign for Congress against Lauren Boebert._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60666450/397865222/-1392034954?refcode=X_032423_Frisch_actrs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGI2MDY1Yy02NWNhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=avXqIM2tRTvEO033yUz2yZhvu4nO0TNvbF20r86QrqA=) But before I do, please let me explain why your support now is so important if we’re going to defeat Boebert in 2024.** Very few people believed we could win in 2022. All of the national pundits said it was a “Safe Republican” seat. So when the results started coming in on Election Night, the talking heads on cable news couldn’t believe their eyes. The race went to a recount, and ultimately, after all the ballots were counted, we came just 546 votes short of defeating Boebert. Ours was the closest race in the entire country. By driving 24,000 miles in my red pickup truck to every corner of the district, showing up, meeting people where they were, and listening to everyone. We put in the work, and people like you who volunteered, donated, made phone calls, etc... You made it all possible. This time, things are going to get even nastier. I’m sure of it. Boebert’s Super PACs will try to smear me on every TV across the district. **We can counter their lies and win, but I’m counting on your support now to do it. My team has set a goal of getting 50,000 Founding Donors to our campaign so we have the resources we need to start strong and defeat Boebert:** [**If you’re able to, can I count on you to make a donation to my campaign right now – no amount is too small – to help us hit our goal and finally kick Lauren Boebert out of Congress? clean_body: Your support now is so important if we’re going to defeat Boebert in 2024. | = ** Hello, = But before I do, please let me explain why your support now is so important if we’re going to defeat Boebert in 2024. Very few people believed we could win in 2022. All of the national pundits said it was a “Safe Republican” seat. So when the results started coming in on Election Night, the talking heads on cable news couldn’t believe their eyes. The race went to a recount, and ultimately, after all the ballots were counted, we came just 546 votes short of defeating Boebert. Ours was the closest race in the entire country. By driving 24,000 miles in my red pickup truck to every corner of the district, showing up, meeting people where they were, and listening to everyone. We put in the work, and people like you who volunteered, donated, made phone calls, etc... You made it all possible. This time, things are going to get even nastier. I’m sure of it. Boebert’s Super PACs will try to smear me on every TV across the district. We can counter their lies and win, but I’m counting on your support now to do it. My team has set a goal of getting 50,000 Founding Donors to our campaign so we have the resources we need to start strong and defeat Boebert: = Early resources are critical to building and sustaining a campaign that can meet every voter and win. name: Anna Paulina Luna
subject: Private Campaign Memo
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS
body:
[CONFIDENTIAL] For your eyes only
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62476720:6OD5dZGNB:m:1:3331421248:9E21164214F1C50C8D9C8A757415F242:r)
---
Peter,
---
I'm forwarding you this confidential internal memo from our team so you know where we stand as I close out my first quarter as a member of Congress.
---
Your support means so much to me. If you could find a way to help us out before the 31st, I'd be eternally grateful.
---
[**Please read the memo below - and when you're finished reading it, please consider contributing to help us get back on track before next week's fundraising deadline with the Federal Election Commission. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62476720:6OD5dZGNB:m:1:3331421248:9E21164214F1C50C8D9C8A757415F242:r)
---
Thank you so much,
---
-Anna
---
\- - - - Forwarded Message - - - -
---
INTERNAL MEMO - ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS
---
PREPARED FOR: SUPPORTERS AND DONORS
---
Our grassroots fundraising was an indispensable part of our campaign last year.
---
Without our impressive fundraising totals, it would have been extremely difficult for Anna to win - if not downright impossible.
---
**But so far this year, our numbers have dipped dramatically.**
---
We were always anticipating a drop-off coming into an off year.
---
Anna has also spent the overwhelming majority of her time working in Congress, so she's had very little time to fundraise in the last few months.
---
However, we've seen a drop-off far below what we were anticipating.
---
**There 's just over a week to go in the first quarter of 2023, and so far, we've raised _less than 10%_ of what we raised in the final quarter of 2022.**
---
Unless we turn things around quickly in the final week before the deadline, we're going to come up short of our Q1 target and fall behind budget.
---
_With Anna 's seat being one of the Democrats' top targets in 2024, that's extremely dangerous for her reelection chances. _
---
The Democrats' fundraising has barely slowed down at all since the heat of the election cycle, and they're building a record-breaking war chest to try and take back the House majority next year.
---
_They 're likely going to spend millions of dollars of that war chest right here in the district to blast the airwaves with attack ads. _
---
**That formula worked for them in 2022, especially against Republican candidates who lacked the grassroots fundraising to compete, and we can expect them to double down on this strategy next year.**
---
To put it simply, we cannot afford to get left behind so early in the cycle, or we may never be able to catch up.
---
Support from our friends like you is the only way for us to get back on budget and ensure Anna has the resources she needs to defend this seat.
---
Thank you, and let's save America!
---
-Team Luna
---
[CONTRIBUTE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62476720:6OD5dZGNB:m:1:3331421248:9E21164214F1C50C8D9C8A757415F242:r)
---

---
PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS
---
PO Box 23064, St. Petersburg, FL 33742
---

name: Andy Kim
subject: Budgets reflect priorities.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
I am a firm believer in the idea that our country's budget reflects our country's priorities.

The House Freedom Caucus, a group of extremist, Washington Republicans, has proposed a new budget, and their priorities are clear.

Their budget proposal includes deep cuts, like demanding states return American Rescue plan dollars, defunding the IRS so more tax cheats can avoid paying their fair share, and reversing billions of dollars in climate change investments.

It does not include any taxes for wealthy corporations, and it will not reduce the deficit.

Instead, it hurts families by endangering public safety, raising costs, shipping manufacturing jobs overseas, undermining American workers, weakening national security, and hurting seniors.

I am deeply concerned about this proposal and that Republican leadership has not spoken out against it. As leaders, our priority should be on the people who sent us here to govern – not playing politics or enriching wealthy corporations.

My priority will always be people.

Andy

subject: [LISTEN] My Remarks on ‘Ruthless’ Podcast
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Listen to the podcast >>>
| | | Peter, This week, I sat down with the _Ruthless_ Podcast to talk about __ why I stand by my commitment to fair play, FOR ALL, and how I’ve re-introduced my _Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act_!
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/d521f6c0a1bf0622/ad797d30ae400b97c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
[**LISTEN NOW**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/d521f6c0a1bf0622/b9eb90811a6591a0c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Throughout my coaching career, I saw the**incomparable success of Title IX** and the educational and personal opportunities sports have provided to millions of female athletes. The positive impacts of a fair playing field in women’s sports are unmatched, but the Biden Administration is forcing female athletes to the sidelines by allowing biological males to compete where they do not belong. We cannot stand by and let girls and women in sports lose to the radical left’s agenda!
---
[**LISTEN NOW**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/d521f6c0a1bf0622/b85cef7cf5b0e5cfc3d6b838967d376c/33013)

– Coach

name: Jocelyn Benson
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Hello friend,

Earlier this year, Michigan’s long-serving Senator Stabenow announced her retirement from the U.S. Senate. In the months since her announcement, I’ve heard from many of you and received a great deal of encouragement from Michiganders across the state asking me to seriously consider becoming a candidate in 2024 for her open Senate seat. I’m deeply grateful for the confidence so many of you have in me as a leader in our state and in our country. It is a clear sign that our movement to protect elections and advance our democracy is strong, and that your trust in me to continue protecting our elections as Michigan’s chief election official is equally strong.

Friend, I appreciate that trust. We all know the immense challenges our elections, and democracy itself, have endured these last few years. And the back and forth on imminent indictments this week alone underscores how we’ve yet to see real accountability for those at the center of attempts to overturn the 2020 presidential election - and reminds us we could likely see a repeat of those attempts in 2024.

That’s why I’d like to tell you directly – I firmly believe that the best way to serve you and our democracy is to not be a candidate for any other office, role, or position this election cycle. I am committed to being singularly focused on my job as Michigan’s Secretary of State, protecting our elections and fighting on the front lines for our democracy, in 2024. And I’m excited to fulfill that commitment.

Watch >> [https://twitter.com/JocelynBenson/status/1639308085687730181]

As I say in the above video, I want to be very clear: The biggest battle on the ballot in 2024 will be protecting our democracy. And we all need to be fully focused on ensuring that truth prevails over those who willingly spread lies about our elections to advance their own agenda.

That’s why I’ll be spending this year and next year working every single day with every one of you to ensure our democracy prevails.

I know we will succeed. Just like we did in 2020 and 2022.

And then, after we get through the 2024 election, we will still have a lot of work to do together. Stay tuned. Because I’m just getting warmed up.

Onward,
Jocelyn
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]

Peter,

We thought the government was pressuring Big Tech to censor stories about Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings and his laptop days before the 2020 presidential election...**then brave journalists exposed the Twitter Files.**

We thought that it was likely that COVID came from a lab. Then FBI Director Christopher Wray confirmed last week that coronavirus likely stemmed from a lab leak in Wuhan.

With the CCP buying up more and more land in America, it’s critical that we elect leaders who aren’t afraid to take a tough stand to stop them. While Democrats are rolling out the red carpet for communist spies, we need principled conservatives who will DEFEND American intelligence. Peter, I’m officially sounding the alarm: the CCP is the #1 threat to America. They are determined to overtake us as the world’s dominant superpower, and I didn’t put my life on the line for America to let ANYONE push us around. We owe it to our men and women in uniform to make sure their hard work defending our country isn’t lost in vain to the CCP. name: Team Cori
subject: Did you see this article about Cori in The Nation?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Take a look:
#
Peter,
St. Louis gave Cori a mandate to organize, advocate, and legislate for the needs of the people, and that’s _exactly_ what she’s doing.
_The Nation_ recently highlighted Cori’s relentless efforts to secure $213.9 million in national climate relief funding to repair transit systems damaged by climate disasters like the historic and catastrophic flooding that left St. Louis underwater last July. Take a look:
[](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230324.xjoA0P&refcode=em20230324-2389&t=1&akid=2389%2E1082990%2EGffqMK)
Peter, Cori knows what it means to rely on public transportation to visit the doctor, access childcare, and go to work — that’s why she’s bringing these experiences to Congress with her every day, and it’s why she’s centering public transit as we work to combat the climate crisis.
This is exactly the kind of people-first leadership we need to make sure Congress passes policies that lift ALL of us up.
**All of Cori's legislating and organizing work is powered by everyday people like you.**[**Can you make a $5 donation right now so Cori can continue to focus on this work?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230324.xjoA0P&refcode=em20230324-2389&t=2&akid=2389%2E1082990%2EGffqMK)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230324.xjoA0P&amount=5&refcode=em20230324-2389&t=21&akid=2389%2E1082990%2EGffqMK)**
In solidarity,
Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230324?refcode=em20230324-2389-footer&t=22&refcode2=2389_1082990_GffqMK&akid=2389%2E1082990%2EGffqMK) **
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.

name: Aminah Ghaffar
subject: Aminah debriefs the week advocating in DC, federal EJ updates and action alerts!
body:
Can you help protect communities and call your reps today? | | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/8HToISgnFTOc8o1RQ8FP12MH4E6Sf6vQJvE_ojio4Yj6cBoP2vcn6KEpSm74SwRHohHAX8g5ATnPCv71yIyljYKEL7y4fDqHaI8IztpoOKrdO9ubOgFe5BwtfSC4GGsWkWCzd2wrzdzTGjVH8NseruyPX-9LiOpY_nInG6wI3seAAETKBxJIs4S8_kTAIRXg62yq4SudTIcsVPNRjrfTriqNJT0E8Fj435C-JILzSWLuZjvKDAfWIjTnn0kvDXH-zD0U-SEClcQCZTF4_ZsUmEfNQssAayGoYjrZQjGOPbJq7EIbHziNvtXx3KBYRN012yzqa92fZsWkOpF-W4WUSDSA0reXL673mFH2bp8GnMLcS4e0s3rpAHOtrxgucxFp/3ur/WcOxuidiQmW9nZwBhTp2-Q/h0/dEKtED6mz78mWZ2sawLfc_GBbm6pAw8xK1_WHdEQANY)
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhpDXzwhDThKvnfqjUMUTTkOAxk5tl3SyloPm_5n6IfskL6XWh-5Lbq5Lg630m9TG-D5bi8BB41o7aDv3m1QXBEqY49Or1wgD_bUobT8BUZnkZAalmBLjA6pg_psaeohr8wPRRNPRdJCpDy-pT37nbDOi5m4y3tzq3g4-ZhqtLkMJcZtRqGfzL7aJmMKm7P9AqbHiaB7E7bJCuZQ2xP2ueojcERoOiSFQ8PG8bvJhWUpVgjfQ1nyXSVc8Xf4k1SdPOU-oj0VO0JU_XCkxulC02xcedE6t4Ft6J7frjhAYjM0MyFzpU0fD8JKU5MSr1TWe02Zo9LoGYOS9zDeEoZwatBA6h7MsQVbZrm6qYxFHvk4f/3ur/WcOxuidiQmW9nZwBhTp2-Q/h1/zVrgKlLMj3jUyTl1ddVzX5Z0fgavPcehIw_AK3yd6w0)
---
Tanake, **** It’s Aminah, 7 Directions of Service Policy Director. This week, 7DS and our partners from [POWHR](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/1XQbiUZqIgkFRQxQopJGKdCPNchRQqm-AbJSVmdV9FtMZade-HImOIw6tFhpJiHd3PrUf4OSlhlIKTLe54kIEoRDO1KuW0UpQAo1zxiev7X1NbX3fSxdy5y577jRtlQ7_TSgYXHwx-MelKz-8r9dfIW39wmsMhdNvw0btEPYjJlkpWgsaUsxgrnWQr41SAVXqykEihs01TGUljG47JQjty-MKEDYL5j6_SJeIPeUW4cQw53K9jlXOiqCYnIWWpbwpCzWSRziCm89BXI8mzAcjZiQX7wTcBymdoUTg2CwL8PVusxJ3yBVZmf3HcMHfDVVskB1l3G5_aXmkdglNHPQmFJqE2cVUpZq_b-UYFZ5aVM/3ur/WcOxuidiQmW9nZwBhTp2-Q/h2/_KYyzdreW41oo9AeyY4zPCJqdPJZiA5wyO1zcXVs4Dw) met with officials across DC, from the Pentagon to Congress, about the status of MVP. **** We shared stories about the harms frontline folks are facing along the route, as MVP continues to build without necessary permits that have been denied. We asked FERC to increase transparency and make commenting more user friendly, and **asked all officials to reject the US Fish and Wildlife’s biological opinion (if you haven’t yet, sign the[petition here](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkd9OMAk9omA_9FkVRYGSEhUfAmF4pqxOrC_FNCIsrX0Ipt1N5L-Au2_rIWXF2gxfColvpMkbmtbK77Gcxao1ANYaip9O1TG1HPTgTosUz0KeaKmS8WdeAWS-AbuZjSCYZWp8Pp-JH_IrkIuNhc2t3yRHzwrV-al5rZoYcwm-OlodozzFrAJnK4CqjQEHYv4e4eWDDaTS2i1plLXe8coaznXm86uU5jDtX9n3bbDIx7HFXJ1uwjDWwcVlUbod6t2V1Zoxn5AP7tQkII5XE2z9TWL0LUCC0Xk07ydT5r4R_gic_QwlOdrvGB5jONn6kGIfJxE2unCWalyzcrImyibyEXRltRp9mZhDAQofvwHTjgOBUra6WGXDEi-lSO3Q8zBHE-Pwu_ArBSH5HjUABA1tMg/3ur/WcOxuidiQmW9nZwBhTp2-Q/h3/jXBDNKD4hPVXwIXGxlIFnJ_Ng6bZCjEoR-Adh3BG47Y)).** **** I spoke at the Roosevelt Institute’s clean and renewable energy panel reinforcing the message that frontline communities and EJ leaders must have a seat at the table in any development project with impacts on our health. The Environmental Justice for All Act was introduced this week, and it does exactly that. **** In Robeson County NC, where I grew up, we have over 800 polluters and our area has become an energy sacrifice zone, much like other rural, under-resourced, Indigenous, and Black communities. By strengthening NEPA, mandating impacted folks have a seat at the table, and giving people the ability to sue corporations for harms caused by polluters, the EJ for All Act is for communities like ours. **** On the opposite side of the spectrum, the H.R.1 bill fast-tracks pipelines, weakens NEPA (National Environmental Policy Act), keeps communities in the dark, and puts environmental review in the hands of developers. Just yesterday, Congressperson Carol Miller of West Virginia introduced an amendment to H.R.1 that would greenlight MVP. **Whether we lobby in person, make calls or write letters, we have to keep making our voices heard!**
---
|
---
Can you take two minutes to call your reps using the script below? >> [Find their numbers here!](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDFYYEk0x5j1OJuJcOK--mMlfqMHmTq3YioJFOp-c-LpNgdRwt1vEmQhaJHcxf5ow6_l9CNlulo_otH98Lhl_MSQ8c1_0S976fAHKjPOrperqVJtO6kiRDcrAkafz0tw20wQglMSjUNx4RZTWbMZn4DpaxyV24vBARCEnKtN623zn51y09mEhfwts2cKbB1OFBIIXT7dgJ1fmkUvIIbg_s9suWuYICEXlrJW62jBkr0KHpGzHi9ECLatmC2waZssMBGNrMKZe0aAb1eFY3toWB2dfqxmK2nZa1fYYP_Ugb03tPXa__ZMJWP37pBtuVJre4qFC46ulSyCT7tnFv5PaitKpOUFJA6cf5o5xnUU-zlPdUJJSctY6Kq45vjgy23fH8UeQ0oIA6fqVGsGHFIL709I/3ur/WcOxuidiQmW9nZwBhTp2-Q/h4/kbgb50C2MTDodzYZDD3yVuWGZI1QO5woZzZbVo6JhhY) << Hi, my name is ____ and I live in ____. I am calling to ask you to oppose H.R.1, which fast-tracks methane gas pipelines, weakens NEPA, keeps communities in the dark and puts environmental review in the hands of developers. Please vote against these harmful rollbacks, and any attempts to bend federal review requirements for the destructive Mountain Valley Pipeline. This Congress has the opportunity to advance justice and equity by voting for the Environmental Justice for All Act, and I ask that you support this community-driven legislation. Please support the strengthening of NEPA and the critical protections put forth by the EJ for All Act.
---
[ FIND YOUR REPS! ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDFYYEk0x5j1OJuJcOK--mMlfqMHmTq3YioJFOp-c-LpNgdRwt1vEmQhaJHcxf5ow6yzaw6C0x0MbwskgcqsjuyAyGOOf5Vsij0GbnOQhcvybMEscpAjA2cVvKp_PYWaoYDKssUlX00atQiWsIHDAxUVe8ulcfCc93jQId4NNpF0xpqf1SZ5Q8ezW1rPzP0E3HZpUxG-qiCc9mqC4XXNkuhiMkji8fwT0OHGP4RLkM7oJn6aGu-5MNCtDluzwcxJRSNqRtpndYj0HKavQktnvL0RAfmG53qEmFbf8Y-BU22XxDVJQ2iuBqM9urOxCLIwc4vmhWJPb7XffhODS5sbfUk60H17uzzUTBl-EmL3Ihr0MulA7AvoAq0lhhMGhppApCyrqHKbFIXpStRB8oD7K0Gw/3ur/WcOxuidiQmW9nZwBhTp2-Q/h5/5xSv13rZgVq-kgMoegN0nTX6AqkPayeoJ0feVzpGlvc)

clean_body: Can you help protect communities and call your reps today? | | | Tanake, ** It’s Aminah, 7 Directions of Service Policy Director. This week, 7DS and our partners from met with officials across DC, from the Pentagon to Congress, about the status of MVP. We shared stories about the harms frontline folks are facing along the route, as MVP continues to build without necessary permits that have been denied. We asked FERC to increase transparency and make commenting more user friendly, and asked all officials to reject the US Fish and Wildlife’s biological opinion (if you haven’t yet, sign the). I spoke at the Roosevelt Institute’s clean and renewable energy panel reinforcing the message that frontline communities and EJ leaders must have a seat at the table in any development project with impacts on our health. The Environmental Justice for All Act was introduced this week, and it does exactly that. In Robeson County NC, where I grew up, we have over 800 polluters and our area has become an energy sacrifice zone, much like other rural, under-resourced, Indigenous, and Black communities. By strengthening NEPA, mandating impacted folks have a seat at the table, and giving people the ability to sue corporations for harms caused by polluters, the EJ for All Act is for communities like ours. On the opposite side of the spectrum, the H.R.1 bill fast-tracks pipelines, weakens NEPA (National Environmental Policy Act), keeps communities in the dark, and puts environmental review in the hands of developers. Just yesterday, Congressperson Carol Miller of West Virginia introduced an amendment to H.R.1 that would greenlight MVP. Whether we lobby in person, make calls or write letters, we have to keep making our voices heard! | Can you take two minutes to call your reps using the script below? >> << Hi, my name is __ and I live in . I am calling to ask you to oppose H.R.1, which fast-tracks methane gas pipelines, weakens NEPA, keeps communities in the dark and puts environmental review in the hands of developers. Please vote against these harmful rollbacks, and any attempts to bend federal review requirements for the destructive Mountain Valley Pipeline. This Congress has the opportunity to advance justice and equity by voting for the Environmental Justice for All Act, and I ask that you support this community-driven legislation. Please support the strengthening of NEPA and the critical protections put forth by the EJ for All Act. | Further actions you can take! WRITE YOUR REPS ONLINE: EJ FOR ALL ACT TOOLKIT:** In Solidarity, Aminah 7 Directions of Service | | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from 7 Directions of Service, please .

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: The RECOMPETE Pilot Program:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Right now, 1/6 of the U.S. population lives in economically distressed communities, where workers are being left behind and experiencing unemployment rates higher than the national average.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60669440/397876320/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjA5MGVlYmQtNmRjYS1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ot23b28A_iYvhJZHCweAKP6xCtVdGPUZpJ-1uyZGDfs=&emci=f715fc3a-53ca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=b090eebd-6dca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=3595835)
&anbsp;
Peter,

Right now, 1/6 of the U.S. population lives in economically distressed communities, where workers are being left behind and experiencing higher unemployment rates than the national average.

Growing up in Port Angeles, I saw firsthand what happens when an economy struggles. When the timber industry took it on the chin, many of my friends' parents lost their jobs, which left a lasting impact on me. That's why I'll never stop working to protect workers and communities so that **no one** gets left behind in our economy.

**I introduced the RECOMPETE Act to establish a new grant program to invest in communities that have faced long-term economic challenges**. And I'm proud to have seen a pilot version of this program be signed into law as part of the CHIPS and Science Act of 2022!

Beginning this year, hard-hit communities can use these grants to invest in workforce, infrastructure, and more to help communities get back on their feet.

**[Peter, I am working to make sure the American people have economic opportunity – regardless of what zip code they live in. If you support the RECOMPETE Act and believe that it should be here to stay, will you show your support by adding your name next to mine?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60669450/397876324/-748696215?ms=em23_230324_recomp_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em23_230324_recomp_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em23_230324_recomp_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230324_recomp_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=kWARzfxH1BnOY140J9xabe8J/zRQsdMRmZPWptKOz/WBDhwak20a5XKwJrcNRwZS8DZ9F0COKvy2LnPKvMITrTATH1Gv4AkCSBcNntXH+qbH7kFyzphvflTzh2cZO8T7tpigfXnnGTFZ3RhcLYGwnXsQwdVc6F7cm9utztWCEMw=&refcode2=b090eebd-6dca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjA5MGVlYmQtNmRjYS1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ot23b28A_iYvhJZHCweAKP6xCtVdGPUZpJ-1uyZGDfs=&emci=f715fc3a-53ca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=b090eebd-6dca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=3595835)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60669451/397876334/-748696215?ms=em23_230324_recomp_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em23_230324_recomp_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em23_230324_recomp_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230324_recomp_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=kWARzfxH1BnOY140J9xabe8J/zRQsdMRmZPWptKOz/WBDhwak20a5XKwJrcNRwZS8DZ9F0COKvy2LnPKvMITrTATH1Gv4AkCSBcNntXH+qbH7kFyzphvflTzh2cZO8T7tpigfXnnGTFZ3RhcLYGwnXsQwdVc6F7cm9utztWCEMw=&refcode2=b090eebd-6dca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjA5MGVlYmQtNmRjYS1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ot23b28A_iYvhJZHCweAKP6xCtVdGPUZpJ-1uyZGDfs=&emci=f715fc3a-53ca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=b090eebd-6dca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=3595835)
As always, it's an honor to serve you,

Derek

But after a week marred with leaked reports threatening a *looming arrest from Soros’ witch-hunt-crazed prosecutor, there’s one thing above all else that would make President Trump’s day... ...Seeing a sea of MAGA patriots like YOU at tomorrow’s rally. The Democratic rule is officially over, and house Republicans have promised to hold the out-of-touch Democrats accountable by launching major investigations. YET, this won’t stop the Democratic-controlled Senate from taking advantage of their majority and passing restrictive gun bills that harm law-abiding gun owners like **YOU** – as they continue to do nothing to prevent the rising crime rates facing our major cities.

name: 2016 Revenge
subject: Hillary Clinton is trying to fix her greatest mistake…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Courts America |
body:
Hillary Clinton has a new pet cause...and you should be terrified!| | | Peter, _She's baaaaaaaaaack!_ **Hillary Clinton is back on the scene, and it may surprise you what her top priority is:**_[**the Wisconsin State Supreme Court race**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=bcba6ccf8f3848ed80aa08d2a362e636&_e=09eo_wVYdSOURc9y_nc1MQjUptks1TwtOSgFjHpJlMK52MW2C6p4eMnAYM7NH_9Z5RDc623ejzxlh6Q-ZZFR0RP_LkkqQCPlzM3d_67ceQZXPIOwoVlEcljJNdQNTsrEn3Ojobt-YxDI-IHPC67mW1OENQXTvkJL3nWvfQT5qYG5wty9_dS_rpZ24F1Sua86WQyGRAO7rs0OkkyipbYJVuj0QnuK3hXWIgy2J-lWkU8uckjLEVslo118oJGpbtBf7zYY5eFpvclY-B2d9eM5n4uyzhyfNkCP8Tth6YuwZmcqFQs67x-6zdyhA621uXGg9pzA7AB9VPN4gyGqME9zCh4rd2m3wle0uCTfNx1S0UhwuYo6zJ3bzeeypwjxHDR2yZOYMTlg2SOo2t_iskAkHdxmDTS7A9dqlApdNHLPUAI%3D)_**.** She's raising money for radical progressive judicial candidate Janet Protasiewicz. And it makes sense — just like Hillary, she's a far-left, pro-abortion progressive.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=bcba6ccf8f3848ed80aa08d2a362e636&_e=09eo_wVYdSOURc9y_nc1MQjUptks1TwtOSgFjHpJlMK52MW2C6p4eMnAYM7NH_9Z5RDc623ejzxlh6Q-ZZFR0RP_LkkqQCPlzM3d_67ceQZXPIOwoVlEcljJNdQNTsrEn3Ojobt-YxDI-IHPC67mW1OENQXTvkJL3nWvfQT5qYG5wty9_dS_rpZ24F1Sua86WQyGRAO7rs0OkkyipbYJVuj0QnuK3hXWIgy2J-lWkU8uckjLEVslo118oJGpbtBfMSC8aOyipVqXEzegOKOeqtRLMvTi4iNmWm0nkWqo8uRyhMotaEUOwa8orQe8GsljZsa1kSgEYMpTobjTHVILXoPQ_792ELbJTe895-nfJkRAj6Le-mSTxmIfIrZtkFFXeHneyvHm3vmXz0QcJFr_UzeGYGYygfb3qq2pGyLCuhg%3D)
---
But plenty of state-level races have progressive candidates...why is Hillary so invested in this one? **Because there's one thing Hillary knows after her bitter loss to President Donald Trump in 2016:****Wisconsin is KEY to any national Democrat victory****.** She learned the hard way that Wisconsin NEEDS to be a part of "the blue wall" for any Democrat candidate. When the Left loses Wisconsin, they lose the White House.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=bcba6ccf8f3848ed80aa08d2a362e636&_e=09eo_wVYdSOURc9y_nc1MQjUptks1TwtOSgFjHpJlMK52MW2C6p4eMnAYM7NH_9Z5RDc623ejzxlh6Q-ZZFR0RP_LkkqQCPlzM3d_67ceQZXPIOwoVlEcljJNdQNTsrEn3Ojobt-YxDI-IHPC67mW1OENQXTvkJL3nWvfQT5qYG5wty9_dS_rpZ24F1Sua86WQyGRAO7rs0OkkyipbYJVuj0QnuK3hXWIgy2J-lWkU8uckjLEVslo118oJGpbtBfWejnNQ_IwF1GbJwhYxs3iE-dW6fYqteDl7pSdxcvOgqRv6MZUQi2TlSafYakyf3fbhKxjJ_bpMovkfON_RQ9aYF4q-6Jyb-WtxabDNrDnpiHw85ShcRHsMAEoWNl9-GrWVBK1KW7V-JeBLruYg_9y1LGLNPCC5NRNSly23ujTz8%3D)
---
It's why the Left is so passionate about capturing Wisconsin’s state supreme court—to make sure a loss in this purple state never happens again. _Because if the Left controls the highest court..._
* A progressive majority can rule against any laws combatting voter fraud
* A progressive majority can change the rules about how the state conducts elections
* And a progressive majority can rule on any legal challenges to the vote totals.

Hillary’s preferred judicial candidate, Janet Protasiewicz, is already on record blasting "rigged" congressional maps and promising to "take a fresh look" at them if elected. **Translation: She won't believe Wisconsin elections are fair until they are rigged in favor of Democrats.**
---
[**DON’T LET THE LEFT STEAL WISCONSIN**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=bcba6ccf8f3848ed80aa08d2a362e636&_e=09eo_wVYdSOURc9y_nc1MQjUptks1TwtOSgFjHpJlMK52MW2C6p4eMnAYM7NH_9Z5RDc623ejzxlh6Q-ZZFR0RP_LkkqQCPlzM3d_67ceQZXPIOwoVlEcljJNdQNTsrEn3Ojobt-YxDI-IHPC67mW1OENQXTvkJL3nWvfQT5qYG5wty9_dS_rpZ24F1Sua86WQyGRAO7rs0OkkyipbYJVuj0QnuK3hXWIgy2J-lWkU8uckjLEVslo118oJGpbtBfPTldP17LsjyR833eJs0o-qPUboBOJErLoRpdKwzPEYp5OkBWNdLb-zcCKJYtZXHM-QF0IBmKktk4hLxB2wbDNse7bwXVsWsHXqDb5SlJT3xV4aBQO1XDCZTwMU6Q4J6sOwQvWE7g7WW1_jH97lTH46T4aHT9NXCx_aKauOYz0iw%3D)
---
Let's be clear: If Democrats control their state supreme court, Wisconsin will go from swing state to solidly blue..._even if they have to bus in voters from Chicago._ [**We have to stop Hillary's revenge and make sure that Wisconsin's elections don't fall into the clutches of progressive judicial activists.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=bcba6ccf8f3848ed80aa08d2a362e636&_e=09eo_wVYdSOURc9y_nc1MQjUptks1TwtOSgFjHpJlMK52MW2C6p4eMnAYM7NH_9Z5RDc623ejzxlh6Q-ZZFR0RP_LkkqQCPlzM3d_67ceQZXPIOwoVlEcljJNdQNTsrEn3Ojobt-YxDI-IHPC67mW1OENQXTvkJL3nWvfQT5qYG5wty9_dS_rpZ24F1Sua86WQyGRAO7rs0OkkyipbYJVuj0QnuK3hXWIgy2J-lWkU8uckjLEVslo118oJGpbtBfehYeUiMY2DClm4oo0KjbLb16bp6xKfQjc6jclMpT2DQP1B1F-fOHo6IZt59zi2HAntqGzMdnX8QK7dOPI4X5iQlqmgnFWPvZQACuaCob5AjHw5U9lOF0R4BGniS6zVSale3A4xU8M0cannTZcZ1FJ7vxx3tBGHlz90PPufry1U8%3D) Our organization is fighting tooth and nail to elect solid conservative Justice Daniel Kelly back to the Wisconsin Supreme Court. But we only have a few weeks left to go...and now that Hillary’s directed her MASSIVE political operation to aid radical Janet Protasiewicz, we need every conservative to pitch in so we fight back. **_Can we count on you?_**
---

subject: the strength of our grassroots movement

The first FEC quarterly deadline is just _**ONE WEEK AWAY.**_ This is our first FEC fundraising deadline of the year, and our final fundraising numbers will be publicly available, so we need to show the strength of our grassroots movement. Even though the election seems far away right now, we’ve been rated a toss-up district again, and the race is heating up. Republicans are looking for candidates to challenge me in 2024, and they’ve already started to run ads attacking me.

Research consistently proves that early money is the best way to win a campaign – partly because it encourages others to also give, but mostly because potential opponents are scared off by incumbents who have plenty of cash on hand. [_**Defending my seat won’t be easy, but we’ve won tough races before, and I know we can do it again. Will you contribute $10 or whatever you can to my re-election campaign today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60670285/397878844/-1109429433?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230324-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjZiMWNkYy02ZWNhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fpw007GaEiMYI3gXR_6OyTO21N0C0Jl6W7oJXz5Mjao=)

body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60670514/397879599/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmU0NTc5NS02ZmNhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5mUhej5GeSd_Hub_WT3XInSbnonJ46uFx8SL0MIJGWc=&emci=988212de-c9c9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1fe45795-6fca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9818364)

| | **Last month, we saw over three dozen train cars derail in the small community of East Palestine, Ohio.** About a third of these cars were carrying hazardous chemicals that were then released into the air, water, and soil. This is nothing short of an environmental disaster, the consequences of which will be felt for generations to come. For years, **Republican lawmakers – funded by the railroad industry and its lobbyists – fought against Obama-era regulations to make trains safer and prevent derailments** , until finally, these rules were repealed under Donald Trump. Back in 2017, Ron raised serious concerns that the rollback of these rules would gut safety measures and increase the risk of derailments. Unfortunately, he was proved right. We need a Congress that will stand up to corporate lobbyists and prioritize Americans' safety over profits. [**Chip in now and help us build the movement to elect leaders like Ron, who will fight for Americans – not corporations****.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60670515/397879600/-2044921950?refcode=2023-03-24-trains&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=1fe45795-6fca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmU0NTc5NS02ZmNhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5mUhej5GeSd_Hub_WT3XInSbnonJ46uFx8SL0MIJGWc=) This accident and those that have followed were preventable. **Republicans have repeatedly shown us that they are willing to sacrifice anything, even American safety, to stay in power.** **[The next election will be here before we know it, and we have to be ready to hold the GOP accountable for their disregard for the American people. Can you donate now and join our movement for change?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60670516/397879601/-2044921950?refcode=2023-03-24-trains&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=1fe45795-6fca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmU0NTc5NS02ZmNhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5mUhej5GeSd_Hub_WT3XInSbnonJ46uFx8SL0MIJGWc=)** This fight won't be easy. name: Sara (personal)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230324_em_sjj_eoq1 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230324_em_sjj_eoq1]
Friends - this year is already flying by! I can hardly believe that one week from today is officially the end of the first quarter of 2023.
During my time in Washington, DC, I've learned that the end of March means two things: first, that the cherry blossoms are in full bloom, and second, that the first major fundraising deadline of the year has arrived.
These end-of-quarter FEC deadlines are a key part of our federal campaign finance system, allowing for public reporting of funds and a level of transparency around political donations. In other words, they let everyone - from the press to our opponents - see exactly how our re-election campaign is doing.
It’s really important to me that we show our strength in this first FEC report of the election cycle - especially since we have a newly announced extremist opponent who’s already gearing up for a fight next November. We’ve got an incredible team - you show me every day. But now is our chance to show the rest of the world, too.
To do that, my team has set a goal of reaching 400 grassroots donors by the March 31st deadline. Will you make a donation of any amount right now to help get there? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230324_em_sjj_eoq1]
We have a lot on our plates between now and November 2024 - from pushing as much progressive legislation as humanly possible through the GOP-held House to making sure we’re doing everything we can to elect strong Democrats and take back our majority, the to-do list is long. And the truth is, without the support of a grassroots team, all of it gets a lot harder.
So right now, I’m hoping you’ll step up and help build the strong foundation we need to pave the way for progress.
Will you chip in any amount and become one of the 400 grassroots donors we need to secure before next Friday’s deadline?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.
Donate $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=20230324_em_sjj_eoq1]
Donate $75 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=20230324_em_sjj_eoq1]
Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=20230324_em_sjj_eoq1]
Donate other amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230324_em_sjj_eoq1]
I’m so grateful for your support.
More soon,
Sara
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/89313/images/SDS/SJJ-DigitalHeadshot-USE.png]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District
P.S. Over the next week or so, we’re going to be pushing hard on this goal, because it’s so important to my campaign. That said, if you know that you’re not able to contribute and you’d like to opt out of our end-of-quarter goal updates, please add your name here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/z1y5OSxgJ0O2tmjzpVn83w2] and my team will remove you from these emails until we’re back to our normal business. At the end of the day, nothing is more important to me than building a strong relationship with my supporters and constituents so I can better represent you.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230324_em_sjj_eoq1]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230324_em_sjj_eoq1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230324_em_sjj_eoq1]

CONTRIBUTE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230324_em_sjj_eoq1]

If you'd like to receive less email from us, please click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/1ZAJdGZqA02o6mVNL1jNkQ2] and we'll adjust your preferences. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/hyl6jC1aX0el_nwy_DShOA2?unsubscribedata=Ndrn2tJkyBxXQnt9RbyH2Y3gi%2B%2FK1C6HAEXo6fpNVUhezO%2Bx5G%2By1NiOc4llxyd1N3WX%2FTcphOSnpqcu7xsKpp3ElQaZDuKgFYCfoJEWGYMBOk6pSJcnoGA7F0W5Q14BNGV%2F%2BZQBHHrOIiuQovoWMxgYVEUtWRtV%2BMzYNImtPgmNc7vzXiOYHMbI4NmJ91yd5RfFIyfxkkqrJWpfAjMXddwZV%2BzekzeoOQp5PLyiYr81CFlLN3r9Wch9AlEfkLVYqHGpCnPc%2BxSweILp9zBZvjcuIpAK%2B0swAbOC8qIyQS3wImSiupgMPNqNf2DXfljno5TkzapIcA6c3fkRVGL4uGuqseYCPOwpQkkoNbJBB1w5GkE76y00GqU9zrhEIkeHr4eORe3XcUYQmnHWb%2Fg6RGrhuMu5k0uJ4QSTtUDv8lYqXH5pq3hFpt%2FZXj%2Fsd1Es

That said, if you know that you’re not able to contribute and you’d like to opt out of our end-of-quarter goal updates, please add your name here [] and my team will remove you from these emails until we’re back to our normal business. At the end of the day, nothing is more important to me than building a strong relationship with my supporters and constituents so I can better represent you. CONTRIBUTE [] [] Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States [] [] [] CONTRIBUTE TODAY [] We believe these emails are a critical way for Sara to stay in touch with supporters and constituents. If you'd like to receive less email from us, please click here [] and we'll adjust your preferences. CARLSON CENTER – FAIRBANKS, ALASKA

Sat., March 25 - 10am to 6pm
Sun., March 26 - 11am to 5pm**

#### **Kodiak Please Contact To Sign the Petition!!!
Dan Powell 907-942-1312
Thank You Dan!!!**

#### **Alaskans For Honest Elections (Repeal Rank Choice Voting)**
#### **Vs**
#### **Alaskans For Better Elections (Pro-Ranked Choice Voting)**
#### [**Watch Today By Clicking Here**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=641e21c44997cd51d7b94d69&u=https%3A%2F%2Ffb.watch%2FjmSZar4Ruq%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_641e204b8d897b46b68c0c7f&l=en-US&s=2eY7CdjoFssRus87N7frI5nLeh4%3D)
[**(According to many, we unanimously beat the Pro-RCV group in this debate / discussion)**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=641e21c44997cd51d7b94d69&u=https%3A%2F%2Ffb.watch%2FjmSZar4Ruq%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_641e204b8d897b46b68c0c7f&l=en-US&s=2eY7CdjoFssRus87N7frI5nLeh4%3D)
---
[“Ranked choice voting is the product of millions of dollars from non-Alaskan, dark-money advertisements, which were spoon-fed to Alaskans by a barrage of ads before the election.” ](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=641e21c44997cd51d7b94d69&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.adn.com%2Fopinions%2Fletters%2F2023%2F03%2F05%2Fletter-end-ranked-choice-voting%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR0rh087RsDvZkhljKpaIwKYLeJ90GPwpDxCSeDQ5wlOlobKQOs1WynmmiY&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_641e204b8d897b46b68c0c7f&l=en-US&s=UpnqHJYN4B_SVjuSRruxK9X0ZP0%3D) Letter To The Editor Anchorage Daily NewsAs recently as January, House Speaker Kevin McCarthy trashed the system [during a podcast appearance with Donald Trump Jr.](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=641e21c44997cd51d7b94d69&u=https%3A%2F%2Frumble.com%2Fv27a5jw-1-on-1-with-the-speaker-of-the-house-in-nancy-pelosis-former-office.html&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_641e204b8d897b46b68c0c7f&l=en-US&s=Js_MFIo83OBisVDWAaB1bxK3FYs%3D) Business Insider["Someone could get the most votes, and not win!" said McCarthy. "So if you come in 3rd, you win. What? 'I got a lot of second votes, I got a lot of 3rd vote — what does that mean?'"](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=641e21c44997cd51d7b94d69&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.businessinsider.com%2Fsarah-palin-cpac-election-system-house-seat-ranked-choice-voting-2023-3%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR3Jknc7C6zK7VNe7krxknXbi80F8gFjREiHTI3U8mtD-8C3OFMn-GWQoVA&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_641e204b8d897b46b68c0c7f&l=en-US&s=1B3vq_aPL3GvhG6DUtlQglCit2s%3D) Business Insider
---
### **450+ At Our Anchorage Event, Over 1,000 at the Palmer Train Depot, Over 600 over 3 days in Fairbanks.**
---
[**You Must Sign The Petition In Person, Online Signatures Do Not Count. If you are outside of Anchorage and want to watch the Kickoff, please click here or see our Facebook Page**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=641e21c44997cd51d7b94d69&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fprofile.php%3Fid%3D100088118914747&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_641e204b8d897b46b68c0c7f&l=en-US&s=tDjn2YATHQWDMzi2sH0OGSDqOy8%3D)
---
#### **Help Us Gather Signatures Today, Sign Up On Our Website or Send Us an Email!!!**
---
#### [**Click Here to See Our Store and Show Your Support**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=641e21c44997cd51d7b94d69&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2Fstore%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D641e204b8d897b46b68c0c7f%26ss_email_id%3D641e21c44997cd51d7b94d69%26ss_campaign_name%3DANC%252C%2BMAT-SU%252C%2BFBX%252C%2BRepeal%2BRanked%2BChoice%2BSigning%2BEvents%2BAll%2BWeekend%2521%2521%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-03-24T22%253A19%253A05Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_641e204b8d897b46b68c0c7f&l=en-US&s=hwrXrFITIVsbQo5ROHb14W5IaUk%3D)
---
#### **More Signing Dates Below, Make Sure To Share with Friends & Family**
---
**admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com or call 907-802-8116****We only need 26,000 signatures, which is the lowest amount in history since we had the lowest turnout by percentage in history. Rank Choice Voting has made our job even easier. Let’s Do This Alaska.****If you would like to help us collect signatures, please sign up here** https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures**The Pro Rank Choice Voting group paid $300k and used mostly out of state signature gatherers, we want this done “By Alaskans, For Alaskans”**
---
#### **An Alaska Senator has said that our Bill is the Most Important Bill for the 2024 Election. We need you to get there. Help us Today!!!**
---
---
|
---
### **Come Sign Today**
#### **Want To Sign The First Petition To Get Rid Of Rank Choice Voting!!!**

There are 40 House Districts, we need at least 35 or 75% of the districts. Attached is a breakdown of how many signatures we need per district. We will need signature gatherers in each district. The sign up link is the only way we can keep track of all of the people who are getting petition books. The group that passed Ranked Choice Voting in 2020 spent over $300,000 just on the signature gathering process, they paid an out of state firm to gather signatures here in Alaska. We want to have Alaskans in charge this time around. They collected 40,000 signatures, we want to collect 75,000.
Link to sign up for a Petition Book
[https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=641e21c44997cd51d7b94d69&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2Fpetition-signatures%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D641e204b8d897b46b68c0c7f%26ss_email_id%3D641e21c44997cd51d7b94d69%26ss_campaign_name%3DANC%252C%2BMAT-SU%252C%2BFBX%252C%2BRepeal%2BRanked%2BChoice%2BSigning%2BEvents%2BAll%2BWeekend%2521%2521%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-03-24T22%253A19%253A05Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_641e204b8d897b46b68c0c7f&l=en-US&s=PvTv7GalaI7wvS5jxW9SXEYglvU%3D)Please use the link below to find your house district or include your address if you do not know your house district. Scroll to the bottom and it has a search by address, which should tell you Your House and Senate Representatives.
[https://akleg.gov/Districts.php](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=641e21c44997cd51d7b94d69&u=https%3A%2F%2Fakleg.gov%2FDistricts.php&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_641e204b8d897b46b68c0c7f&l=en-US&s=UsyMAc1I5q33uh_-Y2R1ohMcMLQ%3D)**To get involved please email**[**Admin@AlaskansForHonestElections.com**](mailto:admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com?subject=Newsletter%20Contact)
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
### Please Share with Friends, Family, and Co-Workers!
---
**We have completed two parts to the Petition Process, please read 3 and 4 below to learn about the next steps.****1.** Collect 100 Sponsor Signatures**(Completed November 23rd, 2022)****2.** After the Lt. Governor approves our initiative, we will need to collect 10% of the most recent General Election, which is the lowest turnout in 12 years, so our actual signatures needed will be less than 40,000. At this point (December-January 2022) we are collecting sponsor signatures to take a lead roll in removing Ranked Choice Voting from Alaska.**(Completed January 20th, 2023)****3\. We now need to collect signatures from at least 30,000 Registered Alaskan Voters, we will receive 500 Petition Books, each Book contains 150 Signatures. We need help, please see our timeline and either email, call, or text us if you would like to get involved.****4\. We will need signatures from 75% of the House Districts, We plan to collect signatures from 100% of the 40 House Districts. We will need to collect 10% of the total number of voters in the previous election in each House District. Please let us know if you have questions about this.**
---
[_ _ Call Us or Text Us Here _ _](tel:+19078028116)
---
---
|
---
**Rank choice was sold to Alaska by outsiders as a means to control dark money. Outsiders put more of their money than ever before in our elections. It did not work!****99% of their funding came from out of Alaska.****Rank Choice voting has proven to discourage voter turnout. This past election had the lowest turn out since 2010. It is so complicated that 1000’s did not vote.****Some voters, votes are counted 2 or 3 times. Not fair! It should be 1 person 1 vote.****This is not a partisan issue. Rank Choice voting affected everyone. In at least 1 race the Democrat received less that 15% of the vote.****Rank Choice creates division and bitterness.**
---
[_ _ Email Us Today _ _](mailto:info@alaskansforhonestgovernment.org?subject=Newsletter)
---
---
| | PAID FOR BY ALASKANS FOR HONEST ELECTIONS. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. | | Alaskans For Honest Elections
2521 E. Mtn Village Dr Ste B #904
Wasilla, AK
USA [ Unsubscribe ](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=641e21c44997cd51d7b94d69&u=https%3A%2F%2Fcampaign-preferences.com%2Funsubscribe%2FjME4fRnpYGjAoGubzmDiEx1zpBsZAi318uAdS1aRM_4h2XwYoCYA7M6WHLdw6pFBfhln6Zor36Aq4-zw5hFzn3uoIMxmSW9PXA3gQoL35vy7l_lD0_77GpO70VSnnHFePSeO39HjN2sFkzRL9bG60vdVqUP3_uS9QjSauinstCN40GKTgTuIRQRbpQOObLtlcYfeu6zhwKMwZnDGMtIJOlvokR8AgNZ-mCN6UljGHgu2K7xcBUwcT-EsDwqrtusByWnUt9-m_r2zTIqlLkAojShyaKbL0BSdLfgyV5fnp9dQwPU9kPO7ol58OOFRv6_2-S4RGr5-9oK5pcWB5aoiCJmX1d6Lt_Vvs64tMBRxMY_swaCoVWRXPcI%3D&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_641e204b8d897b46b68c0c7f&l=en-US&s=WGShhJYsyRL7IcKXQuchzYztXcY%3D)

name: Charles Harper, Evergreen Action
subject: Soot is killing tens of thousands. EPA's rule wouldn't change that.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
It's our last chance to speak up.
| | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-strengthen-soot-standard/?utm_source=ema_2023-03-24_Soot_comment_rule_last_chance_&source=ema_2023-03-24_Soot_comment_rule_last_chance_&t=2&akid=13301%2E53494%2ED48pUy)
---
Friend,
Tens of thousands of people die from soot pollution every year. **EPA's new soot rule wouldn't change that.**
EPA's rule would allow Big Polluters to keep pumping dangerous levels of soot into our air. We have one last chance to demand they keep us safe with a stronger rule that aligns with the science.
[_**We're up against the deadline to submit an official public comment in favor of a stronger soot rule. We saw you hadn't signed a comment yet—we need you to join thousands of other Evergreen supporters and be an advocate now. It only takes a few seconds.**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-strengthen-soot-standard/?utm_source=ema_2023-03-24_Soot_comment_rule_last_chance_&source=ema_2023-03-24_Soot_comment_rule_last_chance_&t=3&akid=13301%2E53494%2ED48pUy)
[SIGN ON](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-strengthen-soot-standard/?utm_source=ema_2023-03-24_Soot_comment_rule_last_chance_&source=ema_2023-03-24_Soot_comment_rule_last_chance_&t=4&akid=13301%2E53494%2ED48pUy)
---
Soot pollution increases rates of infant mortality, cardiovascular disease, cognitive impairment, diabetes, and more. And as is all too often the case, these horrible burdens are disproportionately borne by low-income communities and communities of color. Stronger soot rules will also cut the carbon pollution driving the climate crisis.
[_**EPA is legally required to read every public comment. This is your opportunity to have your voice heard. All you have to do is sign your name, and we'll take care of the rest—but we need to receive your response by midnight.**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-strengthen-soot-standard/?utm_source=ema_2023-03-24_Soot_comment_rule_last_chance_&source=ema_2023-03-24_Soot_comment_rule_last_chance_&t=5&akid=13301%2E53494%2ED48pUy)
[SIGN ON](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-strengthen-soot-standard/?utm_source=ema_2023-03-24_Soot_comment_rule_last_chance_&source=ema_2023-03-24_Soot_comment_rule_last_chance_&t=6&akid=13301%2E53494%2ED48pUy)
---
We all deserve to breathe clean air. Thank you for your advocacy today to ensure we have the strongest possible soot standards and healthier communities.
Onward,
Charles Harper
Power Sector Policy Lead, Evergreen Action
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=13301%2E53494%2ED48pUy). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---
All content © 2023 EVERGREEN ACTION, All Rights Reserved

name: =?utf-8?Q?Russ=20Vought?=
subject: When President Biden attacks you
body:
you know you've rattled the D.C. cartel | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-10347671?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | | Friends,

The budget and debt ceiling debate in Washington is heating up. **And we’re right in the middle of the fight. **

As a prelude to the debt debate, the House Freedom Caucus recently rolled out their “Shrink Washington, Grow America” plan to cut the “wasteful, woke, and weaponized” federal bureaucracy that mirrors large parts of our [our budget plan](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=5079ffc8e5&e=17913c7d6d).

With these America First patriots in Congress leading the charge, we have continued to relentlessly define and [expose the underbelly](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=a8877bd38e&e=17913c7d6d) of woke and weaponized government, putting the Center for Renewing America (CRA) in the crosshairs of the D.C. cartel.

That’s why President Biden is **once again attacking CRA and House Freedom Caucus patriots in Congress**.
---
|
---
| They know Americans don’t want to fund castration surgeries for gender-confused children, Critical Race Theory indoctrination in our schools, or gain of function virus research. They know their best shot is to claim our budget plan cuts federal programs Americans rely on.

**Read:[Woke Weaponized Examples of Cuts](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=1e9430ded9&e=17913c7d6d)**
---
| **White House Lashes Out at The Center and House Freedom Caucus**
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=2f0184e917&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| At a recent press conference defending his bloated and weaponized budget, President Biden [once again](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=76a32a8134&e=17913c7d6d) attacked me for working with members of Congress on a budget that works for the American people, saying “ _Trump’s former director of budget advising the MAGA Republicans in Congress_.”

I can’t say I'm surprised, but it shows just how desperate the White House and their allies have become. Their baseless claims that we want to eliminate everything in the rest of the Federal budget are patently false and our detailed budget plan proves it.

**Read:[Defining “Woke” in the the Federal Budget and Appropriations Process](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=cbab99caa1&e=17913c7d6d)**

But as I recently [told my friend](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=351c836993&e=17913c7d6d) Larry Kudlow, _we’re excited to have this debate_. We’re excited to expose how Medicaid is funding health coverage for illegal immigrants. How these programs are being used to provide “gender-affirming” care to our children, how millions of able-bodied Americans on the program could be shifted to employer-sponsored plans, saving taxpayers hundreds of billions of dollars.

Rest assured, President Biden’s attacks are only the beginning. The D.C. cartel is flailing, lashing out at The Center and our allies in Congress for fighting to eliminate the weaponized federal bureaucracy.
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=8d0ea847a6&e=17913c7d6d)
---

clean_body: you know you've rattled the D.C. cartel | | | | | | | | | | Friends, The budget and debt ceiling debate in Washington is heating up. And we’re right in the middle of the fight. As a prelude to the debt debate, the House Freedom Caucus recently rolled out their “Shrink Washington, Grow America” plan to cut the “wasteful, woke, and weaponized” federal bureaucracy that mirrors large parts of our . With these America First patriots in Congress leading the charge, we have continued to relentlessly define and of woke and weaponized government, putting the Center for Renewing America (CRA) in the crosshairs of the D.C. cartel. That’s why President Biden is once again attacking CRA and House Freedom Caucus patriots in Congress. | | They know Americans don’t want to fund castration surgeries for gender-confused children, Critical Race Theory indoctrination in our schools, or gain of function virus research. They know their best shot is to claim our budget plan cuts federal programs Americans rely on. Read: | White House Lashes Out at The Center and House Freedom Caucus | | At a recent press conference defending his bloated and weaponized budget, President Biden attacked me for working with members of Congress on a budget that works for the American people, saying “ Trump’s former director of budget advising the MAGA Republicans in Congress.” I can’t say I'm surprised, but it shows just how desperate the White House and their allies have become. Their baseless claims that we want to eliminate everything in the rest of the Federal budget are patently false and our detailed budget plan proves it. Read: But as I recently Larry Kudlow, we’re excited to have this debate. We’re excited to expose how Medicaid is funding health coverage for illegal immigrants. How these programs are being used to provide “gender-affirming” care to our children, how millions of able-bodied Americans on the program could be shifted to employer-sponsored plans, saving taxpayers hundreds of billions of dollars. Rest assured, President Biden’s attacks are only the beginning. The D.C. cartel is flailing, lashing out at The Center and our allies in Congress for fighting to eliminate the weaponized federal bureaucracy. | | Friends, my team tells me this is an opportunity to ask our supporters to stand by the Center for Renewing America as we take on the woke and weaponized federal bureaucracy and D.C. cartel fighting to protect it, so I’ll say this: If you’re ready to in our fight to save America, now would be the time to Thank you for standing by us as we work 24/7 to stop those who are working to destroy our country. | Sincerely, Russ Vought President Center for Renewing America | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 Center for Renewing America, All rights reserved. name: Sharice Davids
subject: one week from today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Hi, I need to reach you before the weekend.

It’s been a busy few weeks for our campaign, and the stakes for 2024 keep getting higher.

First, our campaign was added to the Democrats’ Frontline program — a list of the **most competitive** Democratic seats in 2024.

Then, Republicans officially labeled my seat in Congress as **one of their top targets** in next year’s election.

Now, we have **our first public Federal Election Commission (FEC) quarterly filing deadline of the year** coming up one week from today and we need your help to have a strong report when our numbers go public.

**[Can you chip in today to help us show our strength ahead of next week’s crucial FEC deadline? We’re aiming to raise another $20,000 from our grassroots supporters before midnight next Friday.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60671061/397881195/-1334289778?amount=20&contactdata=jhS0AIrO561+BKC1rgB/d5/2t6AD5BtbfGEvgKgMTSloRbm84hF0FAXHiltrrqCeu6eeZf1GQ4aCTVsB/K8bEna1LDo5SDha/A9H1k8Y2j2ZkQSdp8IxgGMzBxiTWskcLoK/UfSN5cXIm88ucIVvjw==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230324_FR_1.1_0_1MO_candidate_NA_NA_eoq&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTQzMTkyNi03MmNhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wPljokY_vokYLzmHeYw6J5rMtf6FV3ujkNmkQKFeZ-c=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: | Hi, I need to reach you before the weekend. It’s been a busy few weeks for our campaign, and the stakes for 2024 keep getting higher. First, our campaign was added to the Democrats’ Frontline program — a list of the most competitive Democratic seats in 2024. Then, Republicans officially labeled my seat in Congress as one of their top targets in next year’s election. Now, we have our first public Federal Election Commission (FEC) quarterly filing deadline of the year coming up one week from today and we need your help to have a strong report when our numbers go public. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Marriage equality, climate action, creating thousands of new jobs, improving our supply chains, lowering the costs of prescription drugs, winning tough races... This team has accomplished a lot. As we look towards building our campaign for 2024, I know we can win if our team once again puts the pedal to the metal. = Thanks, Sharice * | = | Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list.
