name: Emilia Sykes
subject: I promised that I’d work across the aisle to deliver for Northeast Ohioans.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
And Peter, my bipartisan RAIL Act is a promise kept.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60675678/397898959/-1745762055?refcode=em_eng_2023.03.24_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTE5NDAwMS04MWNhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OCG6PdeGmtrAMx_IwahXWJdvJZe8i07SbEDXA2ejNeg=)
Peter,

I want you to be one of the first to know that I just introduced the bipartisan _Reducing Accidents in Locomotives (RAIL) Act_ alongside my colleague, Republican Rep. Bill Johnson.

After the train derailment disaster in East Palestine, Rep. Johnson and I knew that we couldn’t wait to enact commonsense public safety legislation – _we knew we had to act quickly and work together._

Our legislation aims to prevent future railway accidents, hold railroad companies accountable, and protect the hundreds of thousands of Americans residing near railroad tracks, including many right here at home in Ohio.

**Keeping our communities safe is not a partisan issue.** Whether you’re a Democrat or Republican – _whether you voted for me, voted for my opponent, or chose not to vote at all_ – I vowed to work across the aisle and deliver bipartisan solutions to the issues facing our families and communities.

And so I’m proud to say that the bipartisan _RAIL Act_ is a promise kept.

As always, thank you for entrusting me to serve.

_Emilia_
---

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

[**Can we count on you to chip in a few dollars to Emilia's campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60675679/397898960/-1745762055?refcode=em_eng_2023.03.24_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTE5NDAwMS04MWNhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OCG6PdeGmtrAMx_IwahXWJdvJZe8i07SbEDXA2ejNeg=) | [**DONATE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60675680/397898961/-1745762055?refcode=em_eng_2023.03.24_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTE5NDAwMS04MWNhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OCG6PdeGmtrAMx_IwahXWJdvJZe8i07SbEDXA2ejNeg=)

body:
Abortion pill access under threat
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc8e19adc-b012-40de-8bfe-28131b138c26/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| |

| | | | | Peter, **_The obscure Trump judge & Christian Right activist, Matthew J. Kacsmaryk, is about to overturn the FDA's approval of mifepristone--one of the more popular & safest methods of obtaining an abortion in the U.S._** **_Not only will the unqualified hack who's attacked contraception & LGBTQ rights __ban mifepristone in red states, but across the United States. _Yep, blue states too__. _THIS. IS. NOT. A DRILL._** [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action in donating $5, $10, or $50, to the Center for Reproductive Rights, who formed the Abortion Defense Network to fight every one of these sick attacks on our fundamental rights as Americans?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6fc76ea9-51c8-4479-8363-c160c9c8365e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**_His ruling will go beyond Dobbs: Yes, a_**_ _**_ national ban_** _. B__ _ecause one white, male, extremist thinks he knows better than the vast majority of lawyers, judges, doctors, FDA and scores of European countries that legalized mifepristone_.

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Right now, we need folks (especially women) in elected office who will vigorously defend the right to choose.
It’s important that every one of us is committed to voting for the pro-choice candidate in every single race, up and down the ballot. We need fighters with us, not folks looking to strip our rights away.
[**So will you take just a moment today and commit to being a pro-choice voter this election? We’re hoping we can count on you.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60676371/397900599/835998525?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230324_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTRhNTliY2EtODJjYS1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IdElUSM8--DTMUVPlgUNmZRhRoE-qUdAUTIXWOeu9v4=&emci=a542a4c3-82ca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=54a59bca-82ca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1720400)

clean_body: This is a golden opportunity to show national Republican groups how much support we have behind this campaign. | = | Peter, It’s Abigail. I wanted to reach out personally with one week to go before our first FEC fundraising deadline of the cycle. As I’m sure you know, once this deadline passes, we’ll need to report our first-quarter fundraising totals to the FEC. This is a golden opportunity to show national Republican groups how much support we have behind this campaign. = | = Races in VA-07 will always be close, which is why the early work we put in now is so important to our campaign’s long-term success. And with Republicans naming me a top target and already spending tens of thousands of dollars attacking me, we have to capitalize on this vital deadline. The more we raise, the more resounding a message we send to Republicans that VA-07 is staying blue. I need your support ahead of this crucial deadline – = | | | = | = | = | = | = With sincere appreciation, Abigail * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. name: Matthew Davis, LCV
subject: [ TAKE ACTION ] Massive dirty energy vote imminent: Your representative NEEDS to hear from you
body:
Help us reach 5,000 comments to overcome corporate polluters.? Tell the EPA:
PROTECT COMMUNITIES FROM CHEMICAL DISASTERS
The EPA is now seeking public input on a new rule to require industrial facilities to disclose the hazardous chemical risks posed by their operations, take stronger actions to prevent accidents, and move quickly should an accident occur.

Corporate polluters have already killed this rule once, when Trump decided to allow these dangerous facilities to operate in secrecy. We cannot allow them to succeed again.

GOAL: 5,000 actions
TAKE ACTION https://links.messages.lcv. ? ?
? Peter ? a critical new rule from Biden's EPA would finally require dangerous industrial facilities to disclose any hazardous chemicals they contain ? and take steps to prevent and mitigate harmful accidents.

This rule will especially protect people living closest to these facilities, which are overwhelmingly low-wealth communities and communities of color, as well as workers. Decades of environmental racism ensured these hazardous facilities were located in the neighborhoods with the least resources to fight back, meaning these frontline communities are disproportionately exposed to chemical accidents and harmful pollutants that have jeopardized their health.

Here's the problem: powerful interests, like the oil and gas industry and the chemical industry, are demanding the EPA once again abandon these important protections. Unless our movement speaks up right now, we may miss out on this opportunity to advance environmental justice and worker safety, and create healthier communities and workplaces.

Please TAKE ACTION right now to protect communities from chemical hazards. To beat the chemical industry, we need to urgently deliver 5,000 comments supporting the EPA's proposed rule. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/vNR6fe_NPKS0/M3B6RStUVXJzdEJva0ViaVcyVDF4WUU4V2tKODErczM5L1RiU2VOZEExczFLMEEwTGN0QTBBaFprVE5xaDdQS0x5ck5oVTRBMEsvV0E0VXRaMFh1U2JubzFtNjZIWXBYN2pHQjl6cENpUVk9S0/R0E0TVJpZTdlRkwvdi9LTGd5czBhL2d6RHQyTUF2R0luaXlSV2ZKME1GQjJLUDB1YjRNN2ZXL0lRWnRXTzlZYjZ6L2J2aHBLc0dURmhPbkdQVG03VldHUFJCWUdGSWFiLzNkQmNhcnUwbmM9S0

We've already seen the dangers these facilities can pose. In 2013, an explosion of ammonium nitrate fertilizer killed 15 people and destroyed a school, nursing home, and many homes in the city of West, Texas. The Obama administration began a painstaking process to prevent similar disasters, culminating in enhanced protections for minimizing and managing chemical risks.

But after an aggressive campaign from the chemical industry and other corporate polluters, the Trump administration abandoned the rule, choosing to prioritize corporate profits over the health of vulnerable communities and workers.

Under President Biden, the EPA can now reverse this dangerous decision and finally help protect people, especially environmental justice communities, from hazardous pollution and chemical disasters.

Don't let corporate polluters undermine critical environment protections. TAKE ACTION now to help us deliver 5,000 comments supporting environmental justice and corporate accountability. https://links.messages.lcv.

Thank you for taking action to protect people and workers from environmental disasters.

Sincerely,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director
League of Conservation Voters ? ? ? ? ? This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9328997&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTcwMDYzMjE1NAS2&spReportId=MTcwMDYzMjE1NAS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9328997&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTcwMDYzMjE1NAS2&spReportId=MTcwMDYzMjE1NAS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv. ? ? ? ? https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/WabwQxXkgLs8/M3B6RStUVXJzdEJva0ViaVcyVDF4WUU4V2tKODErczM5L1RiU2VOZEExczFLMEEwTGN0QTBBaFprVE5xaDdQS0x5ck5oVTRBMEsvV0E0VXRaMFh1U2JubzFtNjZIWXBYN2pHQjl6cENpUVk9S0/

As usual, there is a lot going on to keep track of in the climate movement, so I’ll give you a short summary:

**💰** President Biden approved a new oil drilling venture, "Willow" in Alaska, which will result in the equivalent of 66 coal fired power plants’ worth of greenhouse gas emissions over the next 30 years.

**🌎** A recent climate report from the Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change warns the Earth will hit a critical threshold for global warming by 2030 if we don't act to phase out fossil fuels ASAP.

**🌞 **But there is hope - the Jane PAC team just endorsed Climate Champions in Colorado and Pennsylvania, and is working hard to identify candidates in key races up and down the ballot this year and beyond!

**The bottom line is the clock is ticking and we need to take climate action before it's too late,_but we cannot do it alone._**

We need to move the needle in the right direction by calling out Big Oil's lies, electing climate champions up and down the ballot, and pushing for policies that tackle the problem at it's roots - fossil fuels. clean_body: We are just one week away from our crucial March fundraising deadline, and I need your support. | = | Hi, it's Jane Fonda. I hate to reach out on a Friday, but this is important. We are just one week away from our crucial March fundraising deadline, and I need your support. = | = | = As usual, there is a lot going on to keep track of in the climate movement, so I’ll give you a short summary: 💰 President Biden approved a new oil drilling venture, "Willow" in Alaska, which will result in the equivalent of 66 coal fired power plants’ worth of greenhouse gas emissions over the next 30 years. 🌎 A recent climate report from the Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change warns the Earth will hit a critical threshold for global warming by 2030 if we don't act to phase out fossil fuels ASAP. 🌞 But there is hope - the Jane PAC team just endorsed Climate Champions in Colorado and Pennsylvania, and is working hard to identify candidates in key races up and down the ballot this year and beyond! The bottom line is the clock is ticking and we need to take climate action before it's too late,but we cannot do it alone. We need to move the needle in the right direction by calling out Big Oil's lies, electing climate champions up and down the ballot, and pushing for policies that tackle the problem at it's roots - fossil fuels. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for taking action, Jane Fonda = | | = Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: 👋🏾 Hey Starbucks, union-made coffee tastes better.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
I believe workers deserve a seat at the table — not just serving coffee at it.
#
Peter,
Earlier this week, _**workers at over 100 Starbucks stores across the nation went on strike**_ to demand an end to Starbucks’ illegal union-busting campaign.
In October, I joined 30 of my colleagues in Congress in signing a letter to Starbucks CEO, Howard Schultz, requesting a fair bargaining process for all Starbucks workers.
And, in Congress, _**we’re still fighting to pass the Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act**_ which would protect workers’ right to organize and bargain for higher wages, better benefits, and safer working conditions.
**I believe workers deserve a seat at the table — not just serving coffee at it. That’s why I proudly stand with striking Starbucks workers, and why I won’t stop fighting for their and all workers’ rights.**
[**Peter, will you stand with me as I fight to support and protect workers’ rights in Congress by making a $3 contribution to my campaign now?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/16153?c0=20230324._CYBz1&refcode=em20230324-2305&t=1&akid=2305%2E420207%2EmKrLpW)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/16153?c0=20230324._CYBz1&refcode=em20230324-2305&t=20&akid=2305%2E420207%2EmKrLpW)**
_**Your donation will help me fight against the lobbyists and special interests**_ who are working to ensure corporations like Starbucks have an upper hand against their workers.
[Send Starbucks and corporate interests like it a message that you support workers’ rights by making a $3 contribution now.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/16153?c0=20230324._CYBz1&refcode=em20230324-2305&t=21&akid=2305%2E420207%2EmKrLpW)
In solidarity,
Pramila
P.S. _**Starbucks**_ , union-made coffee just tastes better. 😉

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230324-2305-footer&t=22&refcode2=2305_420207_mKrLpW&akid=2305%2E420207%2EmKrLpW)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

Folks — Over the past few years, our campaign has poured significant resources into helping elect strong Democrats who share Martin’s values of protecting our public lands and waters, tackling climate change, expanding access to healthcare, and more. We’ve helped keep the New Mexico State Legislature blue to ensure that women have the fundamental right to make their own healthcare decisions, and make massive investments into early childhood education. At the national level we not only took back the U.S. Senate but we expanded it, too, by electing battleground candidates like Reverend Raphael Warnock, Mark Kelly, and more. And we’ve seen Martin and Senate Democrats take that majority and turn it into incredible wins, like addressing inflation and instituting clean energy policies with the _Inflation Reduction Act_. Now, Martin’s Senate seat in New Mexico is on the ballot during an election cycle that will require us to defend all 23 Democrat-held Seat seats up for re-election. **In other words, we can’t afford to lose even one seat to Republicans. That’s where you come in:** **[Grassroots support has made a huge difference in the past, and this election cycle will be no different. As the first end-of-quarter deadline of the year approaches, can you help us report strong public numbers and prepare for the battle ahead by pitching in $10 or any amount?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60676694/397901334/1070860144?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20230324_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWQ3ZTRiNS04NGNhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4ypkhEb9Xm-ocHaov56tO7jDHb2JdheP3mos8PO4FoQ=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60676696/397901335/1070860144?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20230324_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWQ3ZTRiNS04NGNhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4ypkhEb9Xm-ocHaov56tO7jDHb2JdheP3mos8PO4FoQ=)

clean_body: Folks — Over the past few years, our campaign has poured significant resources into helping elect strong Democrats who share Martin’s values of protecting our public lands and waters, tackling climate change, expanding access to healthcare, and more. We’ve helped keep the New Mexico State Legislature blue to ensure that women have the fundamental right to make their own healthcare decisions, and make massive investments into early childhood education. At the national level we not only took back the U.S. Senate but we expanded it, too, by electing battleground candidates like Reverend Raphael Warnock, Mark Kelly, and more. And we’ve seen Martin and Senate Democrats take that majority and turn it into incredible wins, like addressing inflation and instituting clean energy policies with the Inflation Reduction Act. Now, Martin’s Senate seat in New Mexico is on the ballot during an election cycle that will require us to defend all 23 Democrat-held Seat seats up for re-election. In other words, we can’t afford to lose even one seat to Republicans. clean_body: [Watch ▶️] | | | Friend, The Deep State's prosecutors are threatening me with a possible ARREST. They're hoping that I'll throw in the towel and end our America First campaign. But I will NEVER give up on our movement! Not only am I more committed now than ever, but I'm also going to send a STRONG message in response to the Deep State's threats... ... That's why I have released a video that explains a 10-step plan to completely DISMANTLE the Deep State! | | Everything the corrupt establishment has done to me is all about preserving their own power and control over the American people. The corrupt establishment has spent the last 7 years fighting me for one reason ... because I fight for YOU! In 2016, Obama-Biden government officials fraudulently obtained warrants through FISA courts to SPY on our campaign. While I was in the White House, government officials routinely and selectively leaked information to the Fake News to keep pushing the phony Russia collusion hoax. In 2020, bureaucrats from the FBI and DHS colluded with Big Tech companies to CENSOR Americans during the 2020 elections. Now, Joe Biden has weaponized the federal government to target and persecute conservatives, Christians, and the Left's political enemies like never before. But our plan will completely overhaul the federal agencies that have created this political weaponization and clean house of these corrupt faceless bureaucrats. I will declassify and publish every single document on Deep State spying, censorship, and government abuse of power. Our second Trump Administration will weed out corruption in ANY form and make Washington bureaucrats accountable to patriotic Americans once again. But now that I have officially unveiled my plan to DESTROY the corrupt Deep State, they're going to keep coming after us like never before. Thank you, | Donald J. ☀️ **Hi. Please don’t go just yet.** ❤️
In California, we’re fighting to pass a ballot measure that will fundamentally transform the mental health system in our state. name: Michelle Dorothy // Team Chrissy
subject: FWD: an exclusive invitation for Derek
body:
Hi, Derek, it's Michelle Dorothy, Chrissy’s chief political advisor in D.C. I wanted to follow up on our email from earlier this month.
---
**As one of her top supporters, Chrissy is eager to hear from you.**

Sharing with you what’s going on behind the scenes in D.C. and hearing directly from you about your priorities is important to Chrissy. From the prolonged GOP race for Speaker, to the jostling for committee assignments, and what former Speaker Pelosi is doing now, it’s rarely dull in Washington.
******Have you signed up for a monthly recurring contribution yet? If so, you may receive a call from her in the next few weeks!******
| | [RSVP HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60678856/397903817/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk797-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTRlZjBlMC04NmNhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BtN_s_VY1D6Ldmz3SOlrkmTCynzlc4aEnxVp35i9a2k=)
---
We look forward to hearing from you!

\- Michelle Dorothy
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Chrissy Houlahan**
Date: Fri, Mar 10, 2023
Subject: I'd love to give you a call, Derek
| | |
---
Derek, my husband’s family is from Chicago, where the river runs green every year in celebration of St. Patrick’s Day. Bart’s last name, now mine, means “proud” in Gaelic and was first used hundreds of years ago near Limerick. As you can imagine, this is a big holiday in our family.

Do you celebrate? Do you know the origin of your last name? Which is your favorite holiday (I actually have a few)? I’d love to know.
**Recently, I asked my top supporters like you to complete my 100 days survey, and I am grateful for your feedback. Because you're a Founding Member of Team Chrissy, I'd love to chat with you, trade family celebration stories, and generally hear what’s on your mind.**

**The first 10 people to sign up for a monthly recurring contribution to my campaign will receive a call from me in the next few weeks.**
_May your troubles be less
And your blessings be more,
And nothing but happiness
Come through your door.
–Old Irish Blessing_
| | [MAKE A MONTHLY GIFT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60678858/397903818/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk797-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTRlZjBlMC04NmNhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BtN_s_VY1D6Ldmz3SOlrkmTCynzlc4aEnxVp35i9a2k=)
---
I know you share my commitment to securing a better future for folks in our community, so I hope you'll join me in sharing your thoughts. I look forward to speaking with you soon.
There's work to be done. And Happy St. Patrick's Day!

– Chrissy

subject: Update: It's All About Perp-Walking Trump
body:
_**"[Soros-Backed Manhattan District Attorney Alvin] Bragg will not allow Trump to be arraigned virtually, but WILL INSIST ON PERP-WALKING HIM into a New York City courtroom. That's all the evidence you need..." -Gary Bauer**_
_** UPDATE: **_ Meanwhile, President Donald J. Trump is asking **_WHY_** Bragg is searching for even more witnesses after disgraced attorney Michael Cohen's testimony was _**" CRUSHED"**_ by Cohen's _**OWN**_ attorney Robert Costello and after hinting that an indictment would come on Tuesday:

_**" So after getting CRUSHED yesterday by Cohen's highly respected attorney with the case against me FULLY DISPROVEN, why is the D.A. searching for yet another 'witness?' TRUMP DERANGEMENT SYNDROME!"**_

President Trump adds: _" While Congress is at it, they should also look at the Corrupt Attorney General of New York State, Leticia James, who got elected solely on a 'I WILL GET TRUMP' platform, without knowing anything about me."_

And while we're at it, _**WHY ARE POLICE ON STANDBY AGAINST YOU?**_

It's getting ugly out there folks and the Radical Left is no longer denying the truth of the matter...

_**[ IT'S ALL ABOUT PERP-WALKING PRESIDENT TRUMP! THE RADICAL LEFT WILL NOT REST UNTIL THEY GET THEIR PERP-WALK OUT OF PRESIDENT TRUMP! THE RADICAL LEFT HAS DECLARED WAR AND IF YOU BELIEVE IN PRESIDENT TRUMP, IT'S TIME TO JOIN THE FIGHT NOW!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62476890:JSC77ZGbN:m:1:3331421248:6DF045322AA49DC5898BA86D27F2625F:r)**_

_**" THE FAR & AWAY LEADING REPUBLICAN CANDIDATE & FORMER PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES OF AMERICA WILL BE ARRESTED ... PROTEST, TAKE OUR NATION BACK!" -President Donald J. Trump**_
The time for choosing is upon you. There is no way to avoid it!

Do you believe that our elected officials must take action to stop the baseless political attacks and politically motivated arrests against President Trump?

Do you believe they're going to do it if patriotic Americans, like you, don't demand that they do it?

President Trump said **_["PROTEST ... TAKE OUR NATION BACK."](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62476890:JSC77ZGbN:m:1:3331421248:6DF045322AA49DC5898BA86D27F2625F:r)_**

Some people may be planning to take to the streets.

You may not be able to do that but there is no reason why you can't tell our elected officials how you feel and demand that they take action now.

But, then again, that's only **_if_** you believe that these attacks against President Trump are baseless... that's only **_if_** you believe that the liberals are weaponizing the courts against him.

If you don't believe it, then do nothing, but if you do believe it then doing nothing is the same as supporting what the Radical Left is trying to do to President Trump.

**_[If you believe, Now is the time to DEMAND THAT CONGRESS TAKE ACTION!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62476890:JSC77ZGbN:m:1:3331421248:6DF045322AA49DC5898BA86D27F2625F:r)_**

* * *

_**Police On Standby... The Left Is Ready For You.**_
The Radical Left is waiting for your peaceful protests... they are ready for you.

Manhattan District Attorney Alvin Bragg has already stated that he will _" not tolerate"_ any _" threats"_ from supporters of the former president and the New York Police Department is apparently going to deploy a special 700 man unit to quell these threats.

_**Threats?... Peaceful Protests?... As far as some of these Radical Leftists are concerned, it's six of one, a half-dozen of the other.

**_ We're going to be frank here. Physical demonstrations and taking to the streets right now is very risky.

There is no guarantee that even your peaceful protests will not be met with physical resistance and arrests from law enforcement.

There is no guarantee that the stranger you just met, who seems to be reasonable, and is standing next to you is planning on doing something that is peaceful.

The bottom line is that some of these Radical Leftists who are embedded in positions of authority are ready for you... they're waiting for you.

Make no mistake, the people who are so full of blood-lust that they would willingly _" perp walk"_ a former President of the United States will not be inclined to practice restraint when it comes to you.

And as the Radical Left tries to transform the United States into a third-world cesspit, brutal third-world police tactics will become more common.

They want you to think that it's useless to voice your concerns and petition for redress of grievances so that you will take to the streets.

Don't give these bottom-dwellers the satisfaction... **_[SEND BLAST FAXES AND SEND THEM NOW.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62476890:JSC77ZGbN:m:1:3331421248:6DF045322AA49DC5898BA86D27F2625F:r)_**

* * *

_**It's The Constitutional Solution.**_
The First Amendment to the Constitution of the United States clearly says that you have the God-given right to _" petition the Government for a redress of grievances."_

Don't let the Radical Left bully you or shame you into thinking otherwise.

It doesn't matter what they think... it doesn't matter what your relatives or co-workers think... it doesn't even matter what we think...

If you believe that the Radical Left is railroading a former-President of the United States, then you have every right to voice your grievances to our elected officials.

If not, then our Republic is already lost!

If not, then our great nation is already a third-world country!

body:
No matter what happens...
| | | [ ](https://email.info.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9kEFvhCAQhX8N3jQ4IujBQ1u7h266SQ9Nm142COPuNIJGsZv998XNtgkh4XuPgfewyaWqZQ25EoltZCdyZRNqgEPBCxCQ81KIDGSZC9V3qotyXWgmOPl-zOzo9WC_w7y6KTOjS86N6gTyEnvOjexUaRFzsDnnopK2r0yRDM05hGlhxQODXVwLmnXG7EJ-RrsN2Zj-wVQ7nMno9HskH9J-9XbWtJA_pdHkKATEaPVmUD2vUNSy0CDKsupYsVuDOzq0tDpWtOg0DQzkBpdxnQ1GaOio78xoN2k6-Uj_cv8pow_oQxQqoaoIj34gG4-vL4fL9V09PH3d4JlsDNQ-a75_z2ulk7mx04WGgRapYlmn7Qe3guJTA_XXhqlHBnC7B3DrAvbi8fMg9x_7NoWpektbWYrLpsJT3MN1wn_rfUp2TwZMtb-kT4xA)

Friend,
No matter what happens, our 2024 campaign will go on!

name: DanKildee.com
subject: We need to keep working to lower insulin costs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| Team,

Dan knows we need to lower prescription drug prices. That’s why he passed a new law capping the cost of insulin for seniors on Medicare at $35 a month.

This is a great first step, but Dan won’t stop fighting until we lower the price of insulin for ALL Americans. He’s introduced a bill, the _Affordable Insulin Now Act_ , to cap the cost of insulin for everyone, regardless of their age or insurer.

Dan knows how much the high cost of prescription drugs affects working families. A father of a type-1 diabetic, he will continue to fight until every Michigander has access to life-saving drugs at a reasonable cost.

Dan’s efforts have already forced big pharmaceutical companies to lower their insulin prices:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60684293/397907066/1038348551?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230324_SV_1.1_0_3MO_website_NA_NA_insulin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDM4ZTlkNi04OWNhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydvGHzb7SsZ84Yno8nktNDFM5YkoHtmTYWTEP6NsBRA=&emci=ce9391d0-89ca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=8438e9d6-89ca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=31479900)
But our work is not over—many Michigan families, including the neediest who don’t have insurance, are still paying far too much for insulin.

clean_body: | Team, Dan knows we need to lower prescription drug prices. That’s why he passed a new law capping the cost of insulin for seniors on Medicare at $35 a month. This is a great first step, but Dan won’t stop fighting until we lower the price of insulin for ALL Americans. He’s introduced a bill, the Affordable Insulin Now Act , to cap the cost of insulin for everyone, regardless of their age or insurer. Dan knows how much the high cost of prescription drugs affects working families. A father of a type-1 diabetic, he will continue to fight until every Michigander has access to life-saving drugs at a reasonable cost. Dan’s efforts have already forced big pharmaceutical companies to lower their insulin prices: But our work is not over—many Michigan families, including the neediest who don’t have insurance, are still paying far too much for insulin. — Team Kildee Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! = | = | = Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee Friends of Dan Kildee P.O. Box 248 Flint, MI 48501 United States **

name: Team Maggie
subject: Democrats lost the House. Now what?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Since Democrats lost the house, every penny raise – or don’t raise – will be scrutinized and used as a proxy for Democrats’ vulnerability.
| | |
---
We’ll get down to brass tacks: we just looked at our fundraising for the quarter. We’re concerned.
→ We’re still paying down the debt we accrued in order to stop an anti-choice election denier from winning here in New Hampshire, and our fundraising could really **[_use a boost._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60684433/397907101/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2238-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWZmZWVhYS04OWNhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rgC_YHmkgEHDZFx--s_dtDJ0kEeOMH-_lLfDYb2-s2M=)**
→ The majority of our fundraising happens online. A reliable **[stream of $3 donations to emails](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60684439/397907102/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2238-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWZmZWVhYS04OWNhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rgC_YHmkgEHDZFx--s_dtDJ0kEeOMH-_lLfDYb2-s2M=)** like this one are what power the work in purple states.
→ At the end of every quarter, we have to turn our campaign fundraising numbers public. The end of this quarter is one week away, and we’re still in the red. **[Are you able to help?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60684444/397907103/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2238-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWZmZWVhYS04OWNhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rgC_YHmkgEHDZFx--s_dtDJ0kEeOMH-_lLfDYb2-s2M=)**
Look, we know that it can feel like donations in March don’t matter. But the truth is, the money we raise now is the most important money we raise. Since Democrats lost the House, every penny we raise – or don’t raise – will be scrutinized and used as a proxy for Democrats’ vulnerability.
**The public fundraising deadline is March 31st. It’s our first big test since the 2022 elections. Democrats lost the House.[If you can, please make a donation of $3 or any amount right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60684448/397907104/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2238-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWZmZWVhYS04OWNhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rgC_YHmkgEHDZFx--s_dtDJ0kEeOMH-_lLfDYb2-s2M=)**
Thank you,
Team Maggie

name: JD Vance
subject: BREAKING: I’m Endorsing DJT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vance Victory, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and comprised of JD Vance for Senate Inc
body:
four more years

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62477066:JZ7P7ZGFN:m:1:3331421248:8A3E2375BACE2F64194B3346DDE1A1AB:r)
---
Hey Peter,

**I 'm thrilled to share with you that I am endorsing Donald J. Trump for President in 2024. ** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62477066:JZ7P7ZGFN:m:1:3331421248:8A3E2375BACE2F64194B3346DDE1A1AB:r)
There's just no way around it: America today is not the America we all know and love. Our freedoms are under attack, our Constitution is eroded daily, and the Radical Democrat Party is driving us off a leftwing cliff.

**_I won 't stand for it._ **
In times like these, we need a fighter who will stand up for our conservative values, defend what is just, and do what is right.

**THAT CONSERVATIVE FIGHTER IS, WITHOUT A DOUBT, DONALD J. TRUMP.**
| [**STAND WITH TRUMP**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62477065:JZ7P7ZGFN:m:1:3331421248:8A3E2375BACE2F64194B3346DDE1A1AB:r)
---
[**STAND WITH 45**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62477065:JZ7P7ZGFN:m:1:3331421248:8A3E2375BACE2F64194B3346DDE1A1AB:r)
---
[**SEND BIDEN PACKING**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62477065:JZ7P7ZGFN:m:1:3331421248:8A3E2375BACE2F64194B3346DDE1A1AB:r)
---

Under President Trump, our economy was booming, our border was secure, and families were protected.

He brought America back to greatness, and he will do it again. It's high time we get our country back on track. ****It 's time to secure the border, fix the economy, make our communities safe again, and support parents fighting for their children at school. ****

I need to know that you're with me and support another four years of Donald Trump's success in the White House. It's what's best for our country, and it's what we need to bring America back to greatness.

**[Join me and confirm your support for Donald Trump here. It's time to get to work. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62477066:JZ7P7ZGFN:m:1:3331421248:8A3E2375BACE2F64194B3346DDE1A1AB:r)**

Fighting for what's right won't be easy, but it will be worth it.

_Sincerely,_

JD Vance

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our
economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans.
Ohio needs JD Vance.

Paid for by Vance Victory, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and comprised of JD Vance for Senate Inc., Working for Ohio and Ohio Republican Party.

##### Fellow liberty lovers,
##### Haven't you heard? Dear friend,

Unlike other people who run for office, my goal is to be honest and transparent with you and that is why I am sending you this email to keep you in the loop.

Over the past years, I have fought day and night to defend the country we love. But recently, it seems harder than ever to keep the momentum going. Right now, Democrats continue to raise crazy amounts of dark money all across America. And meanwhile, I am running low on funding for my campaign.

If we keep on like this, we have little chance of winning in 2024 and flipping the Senate. I never thought we would be up against such radical, socialist ideas, but now that we are, the fight to preserve conservative values should be at the top of our agenda.

Fellow Conservative,

We thought the government was pressuring Big Tech to censor stories about Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings and his laptop days before the 2020 presidential election...**then brave journalists exposed the Twitter Files.**

We thought that it was likely that COVID came from a lab. Then FBI Director Christopher Wray confirmed last week that coronavirus likely stemmed from a lab leak in Wuhan.

We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the **Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016.**

**With every new bit of infomation we find that the truth is always worse than we thought.**

Whether it is the CDC or the DOJ, the FBI and social media companies taking down posts and limiting speech, **federal agencies are targeting the American people who they are supposed to serve**. And the Democrats? **They always seem to turn a blind eye and move on.**

**I am in Washington to fight for YOU**. I don’t think the government should be targeting people on the Right OR the Left. **About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

| | | **Democrats to Skip Another Border Hearing, Claim GOP Going to Texas 'to Attack' Biden**
_BREITBART_
I AM LIVID! This is a matter of national security, and the Democrats can't even show up for work...

This is not about attacking Joe Biden. It's about securing the southern border from the unprecedented influx of illegal immigrants, drugs, and terrorists.

Now that we are in the majority in the House, we can finally DO something about the unmitigated humanitarian & national security catastrophe Joe Biden is trying to sweep under the rug. But, of course, these Open-Borders Democrats are boycotting our hearings. Not only have they opened the southern border and ignored the crisis, but they are actively REFUSING to do their jobs...

This is an absolute dereliction of duty - but it's not surprising. My Republican colleagues and I made a Commitment to America - a commitment to YOU - when we asked for your vote last fall. Now, we are delivering. Democrats can't even show up for work.

We WILL secure the border, but we can't do it without YOU. If you are as serious as we are about securing the southern border, please stand with us TODAY.

**I'm setting an emergency goal of $20,000 by the end of the day to help House GOP's efforts to secure the southern border. Can I count on you for a small gift of $15 to $35?**

name: Ro Khanna
subject: To restore our economy, we must provide student debt relief
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
Congress can put an end to uncertainty by passing the College for All Act.
#
Friend,
President Biden’s plan to cancel between $10,000 and $20,000 in student loans for most borrowers represents one of the most significant actions on the student debt crisis to date.
But conservatives have been quick to challenge it, pushing it all the way to the Supreme Court. Now, the Court’s decision has the potential to either ease the burden of student loans for tens of millions of Americans or reinvigorate the cycle of crushing debt that has stunted economic growth.
[**Congress can put an end to uncertainty by passing the College for All Act to erase student debt and make two- and four-year public colleges and universities tuition-free.**](https://act.rokhanna.com/signup/college-for-all/?t=6&akid=2662%2E946728%2EQK9Kss)
Student debt relief is critical to get our economy back on track. It would give tens of millions of Americans a fresh start, allowing them to buy homes, start businesses, and plan for the future. That’s why I proudly support the College for All Act. The bill would erase the existing $1.7 trillion in student debt through a tax on Wall Street, providing relief to millions of people and setting them on a path to success. And it would be an investment in America’s future by making two- and four-year public colleges and universities accessible to everyone.
Will you join me? [**Tell Congress: Pass the College for All Act.**](https://act.rokhanna.com/signup/college-for-all/?t=7&akid=2662%2E946728%2EQK9Kss)
In solidarity,
Ro

Peter, This is urgent.

Our FIRST FEC end of quarter deadline is in just a few days, and I wanted to take a moment to explain why it’s so important that we make this goal.

I know you see at a lot of talk about deadlines every month, but end of quarter deadlines are the BIGGEST benchmarks in the industry.

They show where we are in the larger scheme of the campaign world, and showing up with weak numbers makes it seem like we don’t have grassroots support for our mission.

_And I know that’s not true._

[**Please, with the FEC deadline just a few days away, pitch in NOW so we can show up strong for our FIRST end of quarter deadline EVER.**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=7245c87c9b5b46fdb696b345c3574350&_e=UtieExZ3EZ_Ug0UWbPc98NXiTc46q_YTlB3-j1qPTn6K-gifbp5Mwu999p5FKiigp93a5p8cySw8WxQR5PrBSfIITKFw7DUtc_ShpbqbMGYj663aDtaQC7YNuQSb9eJnvW0BNpX_5j0CfCWvG0KuyRshlCeRm1Lhgvws3LlOWboJngY8cgX3Mj2JXp1Pv2IjsSk5mVIWuCBS2SPNgAhFudznb5zeSsGUWeTydrdIyJRtyvbjQye72xH5dFDkxrfwKn5oOAq38WKiM8Hmf5_jlm1v7ZEg_uAPxopxzis5JJgah7sAyO1uzotGdgz6XDBgfyfy1JzSNZsGyMbzykmsfBmdNbuGKzQS-lVgf_k40VE%3D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?GNHGP?=
subject: Spring Social Saturday 1PM! Claire's Corner Copia
body:
And more upcoming events! | |
---
| | |
# Spring Social Tomorrow (Saturday)
Claire's Corner Copia, New Haven
1-3PM
---
|
---
|
---
|
#### **We are the Party of People, Planet, and Peace!**
---
| The need for an independent left party is clear. We are an ecosocialist peace party who fight for social, economic, and environmental justice. Come to our meetings and events to meet us and get involved!
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
### SPRING SOCIAL!
Claire's Corner Copia
Saturday 3/25 at 1PM
Open and friendly get together for anyone interested. Suggested to wear your Green Party regalia or the color Green! Get your free "CT Green Party" bumper sticker!
---
|
---
| |
---
**Greater New Haven Green Party**
At our monthly meeting 3/23, we discussed our chapter Bylaws and plans for organizing our chapter.** ** See minutes [HERE](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=352ba9c888&e=91a3f04de5)**. We need candidates for officer positions: Vice-Chair, Secretary, and Deputy Treasurer, we plan to hold elections at our April Meeting! (TBD)
Will [_you_](mailto:greaternewhavengreens@gmail.com?subject=GNHGP) answer the call?**
---
|
---
| More Upcoming Events
---
|
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=315b3d6da0&e=91a3f04de5)
---
### GPUS: Campaign 101
March 28, 9:00PM
This 90-minute webinar is for candidates and campaign staff who are new to running for office and the functioning of a campaign. We will cover the basics that will form the foundation for your current and future campaigns: **setting goals, assessing your resources, budgeting, organizing people and planning events.**
Register for this Zoom event [HERE](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=70592fce59&e=91a3f04de5).
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=a3389adef2&e=91a3f04de5)
---
### Green Party of CT
Monthly Meeting
March 29, 7:00PM
The state central committe will meet by Zoom for our regular monthly business meeting. Chapter updates, GPCT annual meeting plans, call for GPCT officer candidates (co-chair, secretary, and treasurer), update on Green Amendment, Reports from March 18 actions, Endorsement of New Haven May Day, Update on Golden Rule CT visit, Announcements and upcoming events.
---
| Join this meeting by Zoom at https://us02web.zoom.us/j/84873546739?pwd=cUVFcjlGRStZTEk2YUhzaDBsZTB6UT09
---
|
---
| [ ](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=5f86e8a9a5&e=91a3f04de5)
---
### 10,000 Hawks needs your help to stop Tweed Expansion! The Environmental Assessment is out, and we need public comment demanding a more thourough "Environmental Impact Statement." Attend the Public Meeting and Official Public Hearing, both on Saturday April 1, if you can!
|
---
|
---
| Also coming up - MAY DAY on the New Haven Green - stay tuned!
---
|
---
| The Greater New Haven Green Party is a chapter
of the Green Party of Connecticut!

Find our chapter Bylaws [HERE](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=e420c6b756&e=91a3f04de5).
Read minutes of our past meetings [HERE](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=2ee9990991&e=91a3f04de5).
---
|
---
| | | Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/profile?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=18b5d036be&e=91a3f04de5&c=8551773cda) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=18b5d036be&e=91a3f04de5&c=8551773cda).

Hi, we hope you caught yesterday's email — Wanda and Lady Bear have gotten treats for their enthusiasm!

We do want to emphasize the importance of our March 31 deadline: **it's the first time this cycle that our numbers will be made public.** It's critical that we put up a strong result to demonstrate our grassroots strength as Republicans begin mobilizing in their efforts to flip VA-10 (a district that, if it goes red, could well keep Republicans in control of the House).

[**To remain on pace for our goal, we need 28 more donations today. Can you help and chip in any amount?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60692539/397913886/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_2303243NPD_EOQ_TW_9_G_N_L2&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzE1YTdmNy04ZmNhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8XKzQbZn1UnVXyk_1h4VKXXxiUZ6z7D-zy9qw_EYjMY=)

> [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60692540/397913887/-1786109964?refcode=EM_FR_2303243NPD_EOQ_TW_9_G_N_P1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzE1YTdmNy04ZmNhLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8XKzQbZn1UnVXyk_1h4VKXXxiUZ6z7D-zy9qw_EYjMY=) We're so excited, human friend of Jennifer's: **it's National Puppy Day!**
>
> Are we too old to be considered pups anymore? Yes...but when we're in such a loving household like the Wextons' — with all the back rubs and walks and play sessions you could ever imagine after nearly 7 years — we feel young every day. So we're still celebrating!
>
> The care and love that Jennifer gives us are just small examples of what she tries to do for everyone — human, dog, or even cat. We're so proud of all she's done to help lower drug prices, make the air cleaner, and defend peoples' basic rights.
>
> We're reaching out to you today (yes, we are very smart and can use computers!!!) because Jennifer needs some more human support to keep up her amazing work. In just over a week, she faces her first FEC filing deadline of the year.
>
> We're barking and jumping up and down in excitement to encourage her — but she will need her fellow humans to chip in a few dollars where they can (we already looked under the couch for change and found nothing).
>
> [**So will you donate $10, $25, $50, or more to support our amazing mom and keep her in Congress fighting for Northern Virginia? clean_body: = Hi, we hope you caught yesterday's email — Wanda and Lady Bear have gotten treats for their enthusiasm! We do want to emphasize the importance of our March 31 deadline: it's the first time this cycle that our numbers will be made public. It's critical that we put up a strong result to demonstrate our grassroots strength as Republicans begin mobilizing in their efforts to flip VA-10 (a district that, if it goes red, could well keep Republicans in control of the House). = Thank you, Team Wexton — Begin Forwarded Message — = We're so excited, human friend of Jennifer's: it's National Puppy Day! Are we too old to be considered pups anymore? Yes...but when we're in such a loving household like the Wextons' — with all the back rubs and walks and play sessions you could ever imagine after nearly 7 years — we feel young every day. So we're still celebrating! The care and love that Jennifer gives us are just small examples of what she tries to do for everyone — human, dog, or even cat. We're so proud of all she's done to help lower drug prices, make the air cleaner, and defend peoples' basic rights. We're reaching out to you today (yes, we are very smart and can use computers!!!) because Jennifer needs some more human support to keep up her amazing work. In just over a week, she faces her first FEC filing deadline of the year. We're barking and jumping up and down in excitement to encourage her — but she will need her fellow humans to chip in a few dollars where they can (we already looked under the couch for change and found nothing). = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = --- | | = --- | = --- | | = --- | = --- | | = --- WOOF WOOF!! — Wanda & Lady Bear Wexton Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America. **=** --- Paid for by Wexton for Congress Wexton for Congress PO Box 650550 Sterling, VA 20165 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: Charges dismissed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Scott Jensen for Governor
body:
my license under attack | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/license-victory?e=9828080a05)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

For the fifth time, the Board of Medical Practice has dismissed all charges against me! This is a victory for all of us. [Please watch my video message of gratitude to YOU for your support through all of this:](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=99c9453cb0&e=9828080a05)
---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=8f5f9fd323&e=9828080a05)
---
| These complaints were politically motivated and aimed at tarnishing my professional legacy as a family doctor. It has been a difficult and trying time for me and my family, but I am grateful for the support and encouragement that so many Minnesotans have given me throughout this journey.

I could not have made it through without your support and encouragement. It is so critical that doctors (and all people) have free speech in this country; it is a bedrock I'm passionate about and will never back down from. I've always said, "if it can happen to me, it can happen to you too." There will be more to come in the weeks and months ahead, but for now - I am just grateful.

Thank you.
And please stay tuned.

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Former Republican Candidate for Governor
Minnesota Family Doctor
---
|

clean_body: my license under attack | | | | | | | Peter, For the fifth time, the Board of Medical Practice has dismissed all charges against me! This is a victory for all of us. | | These complaints were politically motivated and aimed at tarnishing my professional legacy as a family doctor. It has been a difficult and trying time for me and my family, but I am grateful for the support and encouragement that so many Minnesotans have given me throughout this journey. I could not have made it through without your support and encouragement. It is so critical that doctors (and all people) have free speech in this country; it is a bedrock I'm passionate about and will never back down from. I've always said, "if it can happen to me, it can happen to you too." There will be more to come in the weeks and months ahead, but for now - I am just grateful. Thank you. And please stay tuned. In Freedom, Dr. Scott Jensen Former Republican Candidate for Governor Minnesota Family Doctor | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Dr. Scott Jensen for Governor P. O. Box 1348, Minnetonka, MN 55345 Copyright © 2023 Dr Scott Jensen for Governor, All rights reserved.

body:

| | **Is Biden Slipping or Sinister !?️**
---
| | [| | |
---|---|---](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=af6a2c4377d24bf99bc2becc23e71b38&_e=6iZbRVxjtkh2E6xwCMb05ckq_-TXX6tXtSwizWCVCLXBo-ITBNnWJMtqZvtDb6jiHkufwi6GWtBQ76_jadjzZxFxz4UgCAmdTUo8rchxaoKIJWiZbHjPh2ClWG_DxDwuKmiIad6SfRGiN_q1JCTxRQY-IckcR4P49fLa75r5nIu2OyqNPxidgAG0EJ7K6ikfmmSd3rJVoBuQWE0WRg_XwUKZVrTvaR_QotQijyu4UVg%3D "Tim Burchett | Biden China Deals")
The [corruption](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=af6a2c4377d24bf99bc2becc23e71b38&_e=6iZbRVxjtkh2E6xwCMb05RK1RpUyFCwMzlgKXoVG3ISjOpwK9uMMWKpayrIDa2jkraeafo28fz_TPlOfNz51C-Z8UuhhdT2L74IPVWS7ok2q9sszvE6foHRvcIW7xC0RSYtxQtY-lmjVDnFVl9R8ZKC6xnz5FfnUtLAip2wFms8aK0sArMNYNqL23d9dlhwTmUhWL7j5MT95yUMzRgI8hCtUmxOUH_hNwTJ4-XGw4-xqvlNeTL_qZgW8MO_qETyg) and [cover-ups](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=af6a2c4377d24bf99bc2becc23e71b38&_e=6iZbRVxjtkh2E6xwCMb05bKcIHKy8B6z7LpuwqStmUjD_m_mpnk87JJZXsnjz6g6akKhQLFkb-r6I_qBozJDItPiTa9q_HNQF_bzbxv8aUnExYOkrjqwCzX1jNI3R-FpObhtXFCgtRho4CgF5OS_kUSW_F8GyI7YCnEx3DF6vqYVgaWsHbDA4d84y6Ct6S2mHe1nJ5qbLxrSC2FuwxDmZ39O1z9jgLbJkgB84-aOoSbe-oQfyQZbjCTxaBDxx0b80WbrQNpFat-QjPyS_QLMxzcVisGwb1e74q52nT_rZgpYC3-s0VoJwk3nTLcIBlWV) are a bottomless pit when it comes to the Biden family, not to mention his whole administration. To add fuel to this dumpster fire, new evidence reveals that [millions of dollars](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=af6a2c4377d24bf99bc2becc23e71b38&_e=6iZbRVxjtkh2E6xwCMb05R08OnFBeeagJ2Fn_hKkkUafsUCT6t-81KD1LiGJk3RTXB54HK_g9iPZGEdt17J3uRZbW-Xu8s_h9jb3_u2qK5BkyetS5xphuxFycJFt1jH_AgYBYDEvTQIGM9Srhea_db-IilCW_pC8eu3ADg8ytZV1EXCVRYjtlfgO5M3M9WXfjSGR4FSh_f8KwhvXbcU8Eqeg2ATZ69I3HeRjjhdlzy9dtSoB4GTNZRoXxQIa9mgKUJio1gt62EPnPS4YihVjr2vO7oemkrd3GUt36mkjCstkYbMKZ3axpTYLONRCSYRI) were wired to the Bidens from a Chinese company in 2017. It’s no surprise that Biden is [denying it](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=af6a2c4377d24bf99bc2becc23e71b38&_e=6iZbRVxjtkh2E6xwCMb05Wow5yOrWfXG1mXQRis_6lCtgo1KSHMIcAX0PSzhR1rQ-wjg9DvzZNjjpb2wfY_fzkCcH10kb3_Dn_7Gww6UKRRzRTL1CsbZ2VWLx9pCn5eDVSWuq4YzdTNqrHHEx0ixrtHaD_0xKOtDyHy5nhe57CP7-6I9LgOUqYn17cpseCowt9zZ01FRpLBfy8v-_ojqKprxYesDGtR9DBRikvr4ha3FfT_IUXZo8lDcxaObtitcpXzgJV-POkps_JjQq6dNn3sOv9mmuaG0tQl2QfYYkAipFg5dwPzsmpT9-gxdpfsQ)—but is he cognitively unable to recall the facts, or is he flat-out fibbing? Here’s my take; This is a corrupt attempt to tidy up this family’s [crooked dealings](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=af6a2c4377d24bf99bc2becc23e71b38&_e=6iZbRVxjtkh2E6xwCMb05RK1RpUyFCwMzlgKXoVG3ITqBVgFT1Y8M6AjcyuAX-rOhmLvq5QSb03-P7G0hNtQXCdBpUjMVCPWc-ITEAbRr6mn1DZ4S1WEyF1-e7ghvGV_EDHlHM6XCFPGtv4sEfOLBI_0mj0O0ZR6i9D8yTuom9urNDSxzWt09Zgg9105KCLAR5LP6_YnNkMe9_ohC5Q-dJ68exESL1tJ74PzSCVrlawhXsWs0NTKF9YTHbjsyqJens5cOXi9dqcNF1UBQul6sEQK-03kS3cIZ9P8Cn_R3kY%3D). We already know they’re going to run and hide like cockroaches when you turn on the light, but I won’t quiet down until we get to the bottom of this. There is no situation where it would be appropriate for a foreign national to make large cash contributions to members of the Biden family, ESPECIALLY COMMUNIST CHINA. The American public wants answers, and I’m going to make sure we get them. We will continue to follow the money trail. Heck, we’ve got the [receipts](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=af6a2c4377d24bf99bc2becc23e71b38&_e=6iZbRVxjtkh2E6xwCMb05RK1RpUyFCwMzlgKXoVG3ITZSyWRraa_CcJLdRZSs3YFhLvLefjW5_n2RzmXuvy9dBy8iZXEo7zOR3kQmy1aKVlDGxcbuS9rmZyengW-_PeeXHkNWkhEqjlizZ5Ij2VH9VyfTqUHkRj03_aIjpzEt9IcPvIS4eHgTsGVyRILmSPZNdVdFVESeg6KusUTa4O_6oAgj5tXXnd2XpU4QW8_YloBwiObs7wmO1E_1eDLl4593m__EIlcgW0ew_8ICe5xPJHMYhStXAvG4OKBkmZUBvzfZlQwwG_1NsbxrbR2CjcN)! If Biden is compromised by his family’s business dealings with China, that is a national security threat. I won’t stand for it.
---
| | |

[](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=af6a2c4377d24bf99bc2becc23e71b38&_e=6iZbRVxjtkh2E6xwCMb05VyO1oMGmNwHVgfAC_dz2IpVUjBn2C-5JctyW7-561MhUaMOnivsuVRpIXBTY0J3coSDNUdPGAA8kbXsAfT3MxoGnnFAzaEEDNlq-0jbCT_Y2bJHVaw42azN3zaGXu-PCdim_eJBSArcHB_2VgSOlcWptPLM0TbPkr83tnxXxNgGo5HTNL_6R-KhvS-ajEVXEFvWuQxI0lhPfulBDD_fvT7V5jRV-JAQvI9A7xOYsAQM)

| | What an incredible season it was for the Tennessee Volunteers! Last night’s game against Florida Atlantic was nothing short of thrilling. As a graduate of the University of Tennessee, I couldn’t be more proud. March Madness always proves to be a whirlwind full of twists and turns. Although the Vols’ appearance in the Sweet 16 wasn’t the outcome we hoped for, I’m impressed by the team’s notable run for the championship this season. I’d like to extend a heartfelt congratulations to the team on a job well done. Your hard work, dedication, and passion for the game have made all of us in Big Orange Country proud. Let's hope the lady Volunteers can pull it out tomorrow night. Go Vols!
---

clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | | | | | | Is Biden Slipping or Sinister !?️ | | "Tim Burchett | Biden China Deals" The and are a bottomless pit when it comes to the Biden family, not to mention his whole administration. To add fuel to this dumpster fire, new evidence reveals that were wired to the Bidens from a Chinese company in 2017. It’s no surprise that Biden is —but is he cognitively unable to recall the facts, or is he flat-out fibbing? Here’s my take; This is a corrupt attempt to tidy up this family’s . We already know they’re going to run and hide like cockroaches when you turn on the light, but I won’t quiet down until we get to the bottom of this. There is no situation where it would be appropriate for a foreign national to make large cash contributions to members of the Biden family, ESPECIALLY COMMUNIST CHINA. The American public wants answers, and I’m going to make sure we get them. We will continue to follow the money trail. Heck, we’ve got the ! If Biden is compromised by his family’s business dealings with China, that is a national security threat. I won’t stand for it. | | | | | Cheering on the Volunteers 🏀 | | What an incredible season it was for the Tennessee Volunteers! Last night’s game against Florida Atlantic was nothing short of thrilling. As a graduate of the University of Tennessee, I couldn’t be more proud. March Madness always proves to be a whirlwind full of twists and turns. Although the Vols’ appearance in the Sweet 16 wasn’t the outcome we hoped for, I’m impressed by the team’s notable run for the championship this season. I’d like to extend a heartfelt congratulations to the team on a job well done. Your hard work, dedication, and passion for the game have made all of us in Big Orange Country proud. Let's hope the lady Volunteers can pull it out tomorrow night. subject: Reminder: This Saturday - Coffee with Canepa
body:
| | | |
---
| | | **Join Us this Saturday!**
---
| [ ](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ba42e4752f&e=c0babbc643)
---
|
---
| Dear friends, Please join me and some special guest speakers for our monthly Caffeinate and Conversate with Canepa series 10 a.m., Saturday, March 25, Drip & Melt Café-Deli, 301 87th St., Broadmoor. We will hear about the resources the county provides related to health equity in partnership with the San Mateo County Office of Diversity and Equity’s Latino Collaborative, which strives to eliminate stigma, oppression, racism and poverty.
---
The Latino Collaborative promotes holistic practices designed to build safe, strong, resilient families in San Mateo County. We work to increase access to stigma-free services and treatment involving mind, spirit and body to all San Mateo County residents, regardless of insurance eligibility. We believe that services that integrate Latino heritage, culture, spirituality and family values will nurture and strengthen the health of Latino individuals and families.

[RSVP HERE!](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=0f6f71024d&e=c0babbc643)
---
|

|

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
Sign the petition! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/163ada26b5c4/n41kepo7ku-443094?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=5d9979c6db&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter,
---
| TIKTOK POSES A SERIOUS THREAT AMONG BIG TECH.

Owned by China, TikTok allows the Communist Chinese Party (CCP) to potentially MONITOR millions of Americans using this app, putting our national security at risk. **[Sign the petition to ban TikTok NOW!](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=15ca7aed6d&e=25844e23a8)**

Several state governments have already prohibited TikTok on government devices, but this is not sufficient. We must demand a complete ban of this hazardous Chinese app on ALL American devices IMMEDIATELY.
---

name: Team AOC
subject: These books are “too woke” for the Republican party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230324-4038-header&t=1&akid=4038%2E2526796%2EtmoZ6Z)
“The Life of Rosa Parks”
This is one of the books that the Republican party has deemed “too woke” and dangerous for public schools.
Right now, Republicans in the House and in states across the country are bringing their culture wars into our classrooms, targeting books that focus on race, the LGBTQ+ community and more. Florida’s Duval County has banned 176 titles including _The Life of Rosa Parks 1_. According to a new report, among the books banned in classrooms and school libraries in the U.S, 41% specifically address LGBTQ issues.2
[**We must stop this Republican attack on LBGTQ rights and people of color. Alexandria spoke out against these bills on the House floor but she needs our support. If you can, please pitch in $3 to help us stop these bills.** ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230324.pAMtwI&refcode=em20230324-4038-P_FND_RES_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4038%2E2526796%2EtmoZ6Z)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230324.pAMtwI&refcode=em20230324-4038-P_FND_RES_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4038%2E2526796%2EtmoZ6Z)**
Banning books is, unfortunately, just the tip of the iceberg. A bill Republicans introduced on the House floor this week includes two provisions that would require K-12 schools to out trans, non-binary, and LGBTQ youth even if it would put said youth in harm's way. It’s disgusting and it must stop.
Republicans want to talk about government overreach and freedom, but this bill is asking the government to force the outing of LGBTQ people before they are ready.
When we talk about progressive values, we know that ours are freedom over fascism.
[**Please chip in today if you’re able to so we can expose the right-wing agenda and fight for legislation that will _protect_ LGBTQ youth, not erase them or out them.**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230324.pAMtwI&refcode=em20230324-4038-P_FND_RES_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=4038%2E2526796%2EtmoZ6Z)
In solidarity,
Team AOC
* * *
1 - [Pen America](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/17934?t=23&akid=4038%2E2526796%2EtmoZ6Z)
2 - [Newsweek](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/17935?t=24&akid=4038%2E2526796%2EtmoZ6Z)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230324?refcode=em20230324-4038-P_FND_RES_MIS&t=25&refcode2=4038_2526796_tmoZ6Z&akid=4038%2E2526796%2EtmoZ6Z)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230324-4038-P_FND_RES_MIS&t=26&akid=4038%2E2526796%2EtmoZ6Z)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=27&akid=4038%2E2526796%2EtmoZ6Z) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=28&akid=4038%2E2526796%2EtmoZ6Z) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=29&akid=4038%2E2526796%2EtmoZ6Z)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=30&akid=4038%2E2526796%2EtmoZ6Z)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=31&akid=4038%2E2526796%2EtmoZ6Z)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

Right now, Republicans in the House and in states across the country are bringing their culture wars into our classrooms, targeting books that focus on race, the LGBTQ+ community and more. Florida’s Duval County has banned 176 titles including The Life of Rosa Parks 1. According to a new report, among the books banned in classrooms and school libraries in the U.S, 41% specifically address LGBTQ issues.2 Banning books is, unfortunately, just the tip of the iceberg. A bill Republicans introduced on the House floor this week includes two provisions that would require K-12 schools to out trans, non-binary, and LGBTQ youth even if it would put said youth in harm's way. It’s disgusting and it must stop. Republicans want to talk about government overreach and freedom, but this bill is asking the government to force the outing of LGBTQ people before they are ready. ## The Federal Reserve**[hiked its target federal-funds interest rate by a quarter of a percentage point Wednesday](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkhkyut-trhiujldw-o/)[ _,_](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkhkyut-trhiujldw-x/) t**he ninth in a series of hikes that started in March 2022.
**Protect Females**
## **[World Athletics votes to EXCLUDE transgender athletes](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkhkyut-trhiujldw-m/)** who have transitioned from male to female after puberty, as Seb Coe vows it will 'protect the female category'.

**Let****'s[ have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkhkyut-trhiujldw-c/)!**

* **[_Hush_ li](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkhkyut-trhiujldw-f/)ttle baby.**
* Sorry to**[disappoint you](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkhkyut-trhiujldw-z/).**

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Military Under Attack – From Within!
body:
Censorship Update!

[INSIDE JW]

Air Force Academy Pushes Critical Race Theory Training on Cadets

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62659&L=29146&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS94Q040RmlIRm5STT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=30376147306811243649bb38d0a78559057cabbbf8ac439402d02f0b106e30b5]
With Russia and China making belligerent noises almost daily, it is
not comforting to watch our military headed down the dark alley of
anti-American wokeism. Yet it is happening, and we now have a clear
picture of it at the Air Force Academy.

We received 167 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62659&L=29128&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NhdGVnb3JpZXMvc3RhcnJzLWRvZC1wYXJ0cy0xLTIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=313552a34cd4c3b12328a0af4b251a8d53f77b2698e04a5eb254d105aa80e124]
of records from the U.S. Department of Defense which show that the
U.S. Air Force Academy (USAFA) has made race and gender instruction a
top priority in the training of cadets.

The records include recommendations that the USAFA considers
“Behavioral Science 362, ‘Class, Race, Gender, and Sexuality’ as
a core class,” that all curriculum be reviewed for “D&I”
(diversity and inclusion) topics, and that all cadets and staff be
educated in “specific D&I concepts and skills in order to decrease
incidents of microaggressions, unconscious bias, etc.”

on behalf of Stand Together Against Racism and Radicalism in the
Services, Inc. (STARRS) against the U.S. Department of Defense for Air
Force Academy records regarding “systemic racism,” as well as
records of critical race theory at the Academy (_Stand Together
Against Racism and Radicalism in the Services, Inc. v U.S. Department
of Defense_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62659&L=29129&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3N0YXJycy12LWRvZC1haXItZm9yY2UtYWNhZGVteS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDI4OTQvXV8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=7c6781ed25ef737f6ada5e61eb7b9982d89b3f8e16ba4cc8ac0169cf08059e2c

In the introduction
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62659&L=29130&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3N0YXJycy12LWRvZC1wcm9kLTEtMDI4OTQtcGdzLTQtNS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=4e6540156b45c047f7c7ad64c409ce8dca1277f1a0b13813f0300f913f13ef9e]
to the September 21, 2020, “U.S. Air Force Academy Internal Racial
Disparity Review,” Superintendent Lt. General Jay Silveria writes:

> Systemic racism exists in our society. Identity groups, whether
> based on race, ethnicity, age, gender, sexual orientation, religion,
> or disability, have all experienced less-than-equal treatment in our
> nation, both historically and persisting in the present day. Ongoing
> events across our nation and around the world are a stark reminder
> that racism and social injustice continue to afflict our society. We
> must acknowledge that at USAFA we are not immune to these issues.
> What happens outside our gates also happens across our installation,
> and throughout the Cadet Wing. We would be naive to think otherwise,
> and negligent to ignore the impact of racism and injustice on our
> cadets, our permanent party and their families and our entire USAFA
> community.
>
> Our military superiority relies on an incredibly diverse force of
> innovative individuals who must work cohesively as a team. There is
> no place in our words or actions for discrimination or racial bias
> of any kind, nor can we allow these behaviors to persist in the
> culture of our institution. A disregard for dignity and respect is
> corrosive to mission success, and will not be tolerated. To address
> these issues we must each, and as a cohesive team, look inward to
> continually examine ourselves and our institution for the prevalence
> of racism, discrimination, and injustice.
>
> To that end, I directed what I hope will be an enduring, lasting
> effort to promote racial understanding and diversity in the context
> of leadership. These actions included the establishment of a
> Critical Conversations Working Group (CCWG), led by the Center for
> Character Development (CCLD), to facilitate recurring USAFA-wide
> critical conversations for cadets and permanent party. In addition,
> my Director of Staff and the Director of Equal Opportunity
> co-chaired an internal assessment and review for biases within our
> policies, processes, practices, curriculum, and artifacts. The
> objective of the assessment was to identify racial disparities
> unique to USAFA.
Under the heading “Limitations
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62659&L=29131&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3N0YXJycy12LWRvZC1wcm9kLTEtMDI4OTQtcGctOS9d4oCdP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=fe410f6f538b9e8793040cc475c812e2fdebc93a180aebe6993491cfedf8725f

inclusion training stems from Marxist-inspired ideology known as
critical race theory. While attractive to those who believe in justice

authority or influence to coerce others into compliance. This

‘the conditioners’ and ‘the conditioned’ in his 1940s book
‘The Abolition of Man.’”

These documents show our military and its rising leadership are under
attack from within. The documents confirm U.S. Air Force Academy
leadership is obsessed with anti-American critical race theory and
seeks to punish and smear cadets through leftist indoctrination
programs.

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62659&L=26386&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctbG91ZG91bi1jb3VudHkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=aca0e212a145e6e769a363a214ba7a4ff344ba48acc4a917283eb2e355b8f300]

You can see that your Judicial Watch is second to none in trying to
expose and stop the CRT menace to the American way. Thank you for your
